CoNavBench takes a first step by introducing the first collaborative long-horizon VLN benchmark with relay-style multi-robot tasks, a collaboration taxonomy, along with graph-grounded generation and evaluation to model handoffs and rendezvous in shared environments. However, existing benchmarks and evaluations often do not enforce strictly synchronized dual-robot rollout on a shared world timeline, and they typically rely on static coordination policies that cannot adapt when new cross-agent evidence emerges. We present Dialog enhanced Long-Horizon Collaborative Vision-Language Navigation (DeCoNav), a decentralized framework that couples event-triggered dialogue with dynamic task allocation and replanning for real-time, adaptive coordination. In DeCoNav, robots exchange compact semantic states via dialogue without a central controller. When informative events such as new evidence, uncertainty, or conflicts arise, dialogue is triggered to dynamically reassign subgoals and replan under synchronized execution. Implemented in DeCoNavBench with 1,213 tasks across 176 HM3D scenes, DeCoNav improves the both-success rate (BSR) by 69.2%, demonstrating the effectiveness of dialogue-driven, dynamically reallocated planning for multi-robot collaboration.

AI.tldr: 提出DeCoNav框架，通过事件触发对话增强长视野协作视觉语言导航，实现多机器人实时自适应协调
AI.motivation: 现有协作VLN基准缺乏严格同步的双机器人共享时间线执行，且依赖静态协调策略无法适应新出现的跨智能体证据
AI.method: 采用去中心化框架，将事件触发对话与动态任务分配和重规划结合，机器人通过对话交换紧凑语义状态，在出现新证据、不确定性或冲突时动态重新分配子目标并重规划
AI.result: 在DeCoNavBench的1,213个任务和176个HM3D场景中实现，双成功率(BSR)提高了69.2%
AI.conclusion: 对话驱动、动态重新分配规划的框架有效提升了多机器人协作性能，证明了实时自适应协调的重要性

title: Elastic Net Regularization and Gabor Dictionary for Classification of Heart Sound Signals using Deep Learning
summary: In this article, we propose the optimization of the resolution of time-frequency atoms and the regularization of fitting models to obtain better representations of heart sound signals. This is done by evaluating the classification performance of deep learning (DL) networks in discriminating five heart valvular conditions based on a new class of time-frequency feature matrices derived from the fitting models. We inspect several combinations of resolution and regularization, and the optimal one is that provides the highest performance. To this end, a fitting model is obtained based on a heart sound signal and an overcomplete dictionary of Gabor atoms using elastic net regularization of linear models. We consider two different DL architectures, the first mainly consisting of a 1D convolutional neural network (CNN) layer and a long short-term memory (LSTM) layer, while the second is composed of 1D and 2D CNN layers followed by an LSTM layer. The networks are trained with two algorithms, namely stochastic gradient descent with momentum (SGDM) and adaptive moment (ADAM). Extensive experimentation has been conducted using a database containing heart sound signals of five heart valvular conditions. The best classification accuracy of $98.95\%$ is achieved with the second architecture when trained with ADAM and feature matrices derived from optimal models obtained with a Gabor dictionary consisting of atoms with high-time low-frequency resolution and imposing sparsity on the models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于弹性网络正则化和Gabor字典的心音信号分类方法，通过深度学习网络对五种心脏瓣膜疾病进行分类。
AI.motivation: 优化时频原子分辨率和拟合模型正则化以获得更好的心音信号表示，从而提高心脏瓣膜疾病的分类性能。
AI.method: 使用弹性网络正则化的线性模型从心音信号和过完备Gabor原子字典获得拟合模型，构建两种深度学习架构：1D CNN+LSTM和1D/2D CNN+LSTM，使用SGDM和ADAM训练算法。
AI.result: 在包含五种心脏瓣膜疾病的心音信号数据库上进行实验，最佳分类准确率达到98.95%，使用第二种架构配合ADAM训练以及高时间低频率分辨率的Gabor字典。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化时频原子分辨率和弹性网络正则化，结合深度学习架构，能够有效提高心音信号分类的准确性，为心脏瓣膜疾病的自动诊断提供有效方法。

title: Social Learning Strategies for Evolved Virtual Soft Robots
summary: Optimizing the body and brain of a robot is a coupled challenge: the morphology determines what control strategies are effective, while the control parameters influence how well the morphology performs. This joint optimization can be done through nested loops of evolutionary and learning processes, where the control parameters of each robot are learned independently. However, the control parameters learned by one robot may contain valuable information for others. Thus, we introduce a social learning approach in which robots can exploit optimized parameters from their peers to accelerate their own brain optimization. Within this framework, we systematically investigate how the selection of teachers, deciding which and how many robots to learn from, affects performance, experimenting with virtual soft robots in four tasks and environments. In particular, we study the effect of inheriting experience from morphologically similar robots due to the tightly coupled body and brain in robot optimization. Our results confirm the effectiveness of building on others' experience, as social learning clearly outperforms learning from scratch under equivalent computational budgets. In addition, while the optimal teacher selection strategy remains open, our findings suggest that incorporating knowledge from multiple teachers can yield more consistent and robust improvements.

AI.tldr: 研究虚拟软体机器人的社交学习策略，探索机器人如何通过向其他机器人学习来加速其大脑优化过程。
AI.motivation: 机器人形态与控制参数之间存在紧密耦合关系，传统嵌套进化学习方法中每个机器人独立学习控制参数，但一个机器人学到的参数可能对其他机器人有价值，因此引入社交学习方法来加速优化过程。
AI.method: 提出社交学习框架，让机器人可以从同伴那里利用优化过的参数来加速自身大脑优化。系统研究教师选择策略（选择哪些机器人、学习多少机器人）对性能的影响，在四个任务和环境中使用虚拟软体机器人进行实验，特别关注从形态相似机器人继承经验的效果。
AI.result: 社交学习方法在同等计算预算下明显优于从零开始学习。虽然最优教师选择策略仍有待探索，但研究发现从多个教师那里获取知识可以产生更一致和稳健的改进。
AI.conclusion: 基于他人经验的社交学习在机器人优化中是有效的，多教师知识整合能够带来更一致的性能提升，但最优教师选择策略仍需进一步研究。

title: T2I-BiasBench: A Multi-Metric Framework for Auditing Demographic and Cultural Bias in Text-to-Image Models
summary: Text-to-image (T2I) generative models achieve impressive visual fidelity but inherit and amplify demographic imbalances and cultural biases embedded in training data. We introduce T2I-BiasBench, a unified evaluation framework of thirteen complementary metrics that jointly captures demographic bias, element omission, and cultural collapse in diffusion models - the first framework to address all three dimensions simultaneously. We evaluate three open-source models - Stable Diffusion v1.5, BK-SDM Base, and Koala Lightning - against Gemini 2.5 Flash (RLHF-aligned) as a reference baseline. The benchmark comprises 1,574 generated images across five structured prompt categories. T2I-BiasBench integrates six established metrics with seven additional measures: four newly proposed (Composite Bias Score, Grounded Missing Rate, Implicit Element Missing Rate, Cultural Accuracy Ratio) and three adapted (Hallucination Score, Vendi Score, CLIP Proxy Score). Three key findings emerge: (1) Stable Diffusion v1.5 and BK-SDM exhibit bias amplification (>1.0) in beauty-related prompts; (2) contextual constraints such as surgical PPE substantially attenuate professional-role gender bias (Doctor CBS = 0.06 for SD v1.5); and (3) all models, including RLHF-aligned Gemini, collapse to a narrow set of cultural representations (CAS: 0.54-1.00), confirming that alignment techniques do not resolve cultural coverage gaps. T2I-BiasBench is publicly released to support standardized, fine-grained bias evaluation of generative models. The project page is available at: https://gyanendrachaubey.github.io/T2I-BiasBench/

AI.tldr: 提出T2I-BiasBench框架，用于评估文本到图像生成模型的人口统计和文化偏见，包含13个互补指标，首次同时解决偏见、元素遗漏和文化坍塌三个维度。
AI.motivation: 文本到图像生成模型在视觉保真度方面取得显著进展，但会继承并放大训练数据中嵌入的人口统计不平衡和文化偏见，需要系统评估框架来全面量化这些偏见。
AI.method: 开发包含13个指标的评估框架，整合6个现有指标和7个新指标，评估三个开源模型和Gemini 2.5 Flash基线，生成1,574张图像，涵盖五个结构化提示类别。
AI.result: 发现：1) Stable Diffusion v1.5和BK-SDM在美相关提示中表现出偏见放大；2) 上下文约束显著减弱职业性别偏见；3) 所有模型都坍塌到狭窄的文化表征范围，包括RLHF对齐的Gemini。
AI.conclusion: T2I-BiasBench为生成模型提供了标准化、细粒度的偏见评估框架，公开可用，证实对齐技术无法解决文化覆盖差距，需要更全面的偏见缓解方法。

title: Audio Source Separation in Reverberant Environments using $β$-divergence based Nonnegative Factorization
summary: In Gaussian model-based multichannel audio source separation, the likelihood of observed mixtures of source signals is parametrized by source spectral variances and by associated spatial covariance matrices. These parameters are estimated by maximizing the likelihood through an Expectation-Maximization algorithm and used to separate the signals by means of multichannel Wiener filtering. We propose to estimate these parameters by applying nonnegative factorization based on prior information on source variances. In the nonnegative factorization, spectral basis matrices can be defined as the prior information. The matrices can be either extracted or indirectly made available through a redundant library that is trained in advance. In a separate step, applying nonnegative tensor factorization, two algorithms are proposed in order to either extract or detect the basis matrices that best represent the power spectra of the source signals in the observed mixtures. The factorization is achieved by minimizing the $β$-divergence through multiplicative update rules. The sparsity of factorization can be controlled by tuning the value of $β$. Experiments show that sparsity, rather than the value assigned to $β$ in the training, is crucial in order to increase the separation performance. The proposed method was evaluated in several mixing conditions. It provides better separation quality with respect to other comparable algorithms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在混响环境中基于β散度的非负分解音频源分离方法，通过结合先验信息提升分离性能。
AI.motivation: 在基于高斯模型的多通道音频源分离中，传统方法通过期望最大化算法估计参数并使用多通道维纳滤波分离信号。需要改进参数估计方法以更好地利用源方差先验信息，提高混响环境下的分离质量。
AI.method: 提出基于β散度的非负分解方法估计源谱方差和空间协方差矩阵参数。通过非负张量分解提取或检测最能表示混合信号中源信号功率谱的基矩阵，使用乘法更新规则最小化β散度，通过调整β值控制分解稀疏性。
AI.result: 实验表明，分解的稀疏性（而非训练中β值的具体设定）对提高分离性能至关重要。在多种混合条件下评估，该方法相比其他可比算法提供了更好的分离质量。
AI.conclusion: 基于β散度的非负分解方法能有效利用先验信息，通过控制稀疏性优化参数估计，在混响环境中实现优于现有方法的音频源分离性能。

title: Mining Large Language Models for Low-Resource Language Data: Comparing Elicitation Strategies for Hausa and Fongbe
comment: 11 pages, 5 figures, 6 tables; to appear in LREC-COLING 2026
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are trained on data contributed by low-resource language communities, yet the linguistic knowledge encoded in these models remains accessible only through commercial APIs. This paper investigates whether strategic prompting can extract usable text data from LLMs for two West African languages: Hausa (Afroasiatic, approximately 80 million speakers) and Fongbe (Niger-Congo, approximately 2 million speakers). We systematically compare six elicitation task types across two commercial LLMs (GPT-4o Mini and Gemini 2.5 Flash). GPT-4o Mini extracts 6-41 times more usable target-language words per API call than Gemini. Optimal strategies differ by language: Hausa benefits from functional text and dialogue, while Fongbe requires constrained generation prompts. We release all generated corpora and code.

AI.tldr: 研究如何通过策略性提示从大型语言模型中提取低资源语言数据，比较不同提示策略对豪萨语和丰语的效果
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型使用了低资源语言社区贡献的数据，但这些语言知识只能通过商业API访问，需要探索如何提取这些数据来支持低资源语言研究
AI.method: 系统比较六种提示任务类型，在GPT-4o Mini和Gemini 2.5 Flash两个商业LLM上进行实验，评估不同策略对豪萨语和丰语的数据提取效果
AI.result: GPT-4o Mini每次API调用提取的目标语言单词数量是Gemini的6-41倍；豪萨语适合功能文本和对话提示，丰语需要约束生成提示；发布了所有生成语料库和代码
AI.conclusion: 策略性提示可以有效从LLMs中提取低资源语言数据，不同语言需要不同的最优提示策略，GPT-4o Mini在数据提取效率上显著优于Gemini

title: From Kinematics to Dynamics: Learning to Refine Hybrid Plans for Physically Feasible Execution
summary: In many robotic tasks, agents must traverse a sequence of spatial regions to complete a mission. Such problems are inherently mixed discrete-continuous: a high-level action sequence and a physically feasible continuous trajectory. The resulting trajectory and action sequence must also satisfy problem constraints such as deadlines, time windows, and velocity or acceleration limits. While hybrid temporal planners attempt to address this challenge, they typically model motion using linear (first-order) dynamics, which cannot guarantee that the resulting plan respects the robot's true physical constraints. Consequently, even when the high-level action sequence is fixed, producing a dynamically feasible trajectory becomes a bi-level optimization problem. We address this problem via reinforcement learning in continuous space. We define a Markov Decision Process that explicitly incorporates analytical second-order constraints and use it to refine first-order plans generated by a hybrid planner. Our results show that this approach can reliably recover physical feasibility and effectively bridge the gap between a planner's initial first-order trajectory and the dynamics required for real execution.

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究如何将混合规划器生成的一阶运动计划细化为物理上可行的轨迹，通过强化学习解决机器人任务中的离散-连续混合规划问题。
AI.motivation: 混合时序规划器通常使用线性（一阶）动力学模型，无法保证生成的计划符合机器人真实的物理约束，导致即使高层动作序列固定，生成动态可行轨迹仍是一个双层优化问题。
AI.method: 通过定义显式包含解析二阶约束的马尔可夫决策过程，使用连续空间中的强化学习来细化混合规划器生成的一阶计划。
AI.result: 该方法能够可靠地恢复物理可行性，有效弥合规划器初始一阶轨迹与实际执行所需动力学之间的差距。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习方法能够成功地将一阶运动计划细化为物理上可行的轨迹，为机器人混合规划问题提供了有效的解决方案。

title: Designing for Error Recovery in Human-Robot Interaction
comment: ef:Proceedings of Errors, Mistakes, and Failures in Humans and Robots at HRI 2026
summary: This position paper looks briefly at the way we attempt to program robotic AI systems. Many AI systems are based on the idea of trying to improve the performance of one individual system to beyond so-called human baselines. However, these systems often look at one shot and one-way decisions, whereas the real world is more continuous and interactive. Humans, however, are often able to recover from and learn from errors - enabling a much higher rate of success. We look at the challenges of building a system that can detect/recover from its own errors, using the example of robotic nuclear gloveboxes as a use case to help illustrate examples. We then go on to talk about simple starting designs.

AI.tldr: 探讨如何在人机交互中设计错误恢复机制，以核手套箱机器人作为案例研究
AI.motivation: 当前AI系统通常关注一次性单向决策，追求超越人类基准，但现实世界是连续交互的。人类能从错误中恢复和学习，而现有系统缺乏这种能力
AI.method: 采用立场论文形式，分析构建错误检测/恢复系统的挑战，以核手套箱机器人作为具体用例进行说明，并提出初步设计思路
AI.result: 识别了构建错误恢复系统的主要挑战，通过核手套箱案例展示了实际应用场景，提出了简单的起始设计方案
AI.conclusion: 需要重新思考机器人AI系统的编程方式，设计能够检测和从错误中恢复的系统，这能显著提高成功率，核手套箱案例为这类设计提供了有价值的参考

title: Intelligent ROI-Based Vehicle Counting Framework for Automated Traffic Monitoring
summary: Accurate vehicle counting through video surveillance is crucial for efficient traffic management. However, achieving high counting accuracy while ensuring computational efficiency remains a challenge. To address this, we propose a fully automated, video-based vehicle counting framework designed to optimize both computational efficiency and counting accuracy. Our framework operates in two distinct phases: \textit{estimation} and \textit{prediction}. In the estimation phase, the optimal region of interest (ROI) is automatically determined using a novel combination of three models based on detection scores, tracking scores, and vehicle density. This adaptive approach ensures compatibility with any detection and tracking method, enhancing the framework's versatility. In the prediction phase, vehicle counting is efficiently performed within the estimated ROI. We evaluated our framework on benchmark datasets like UA-DETRAC, GRAM, CDnet 2014, and ATON. Results demonstrate exceptional accuracy, with most videos achieving 100\% accuracy, while also enhancing computational efficiency, making processing up to four times faster than full-frame processing. The framework outperforms existing techniques, especially in complex multi-road scenarios, demonstrating robustness and superior accuracy. These advancements make it a promising solution for real-time traffic monitoring.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于智能ROI的车辆计数框架，用于自动化交通监控，旨在通过优化感兴趣区域来提高车辆计数准确性和计算效率。
AI.motivation: 视频监控中的车辆计数对交通管理至关重要，但实现高计数准确性的同时保持计算效率仍然是一个挑战，需要开发既能保证精度又高效的计算框架。
AI.method: 采用两阶段框架：估计阶段通过检测分数、跟踪分数和车辆密度三种模型自动确定最优ROI；预测阶段在估计的ROI内高效进行车辆计数，兼容各种检测和跟踪方法。
AI.result: 在UA-DETRAC、GRAM、CDnet 2014和ATON等基准数据集上评估，大多数视频达到100%准确率，计算效率提升至全帧处理的4倍，在复杂多道路场景中优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过智能ROI选择实现了高精度车辆计数和显著计算效率提升，在复杂交通场景中表现出鲁棒性和优越性，是实时交通监控的有前景解决方案。

title: Euler-inspired Decoupling Neural Operator for Efficient Pansharpening
summary: Pansharpening aims to synthesize high-resolution multispectral (HR-MS) images by fusing the spatial textures of panchromatic (PAN) images with the spectral information of low-resolution multispectral (LR-MS) images. While recent deep learning paradigms, especially diffusion-based operators, have pushed the performance boundaries, they often encounter spectral-spatial blurring and prohibitive computational costs due to their stochastic nature and iterative sampling. In this paper, we propose the Euler-inspired Decoupling Neural Operator (EDNO), a physics-inspired framework that redefines pansharpening as a continuous functional mapping in the frequency domain. Departing from conventional Cartesian feature processing, our EDNO leverages Euler's formula to transform features into a polar coordinate system, enabling a novel explicit-implicit interaction mechanism. Specifically, we develop the Euler Feature Interaction Layer (EFIL), which decouples the fusion task into two specialized modules: 1) Explicit Feature Interaction Module, utilizing a linear weighting scheme to simulate phase rotation for adaptive geometric alignment; and 2) Implicit Feature Interaction Module, employing a feed-forward network to model spectral distributions for superior color consistency. By operating in the frequency domain, EDNO inherently captures global receptive fields while maintaining discretization-invariance. Experimental results on the three datasets demonstrate that EDNO offers a superior efficiency-performance balance compared to heavyweight architectures.

AI.tldr: 提出Euler-inspired Decoupling Neural Operator (EDNO)框架，用于高效的全色锐化任务，通过融合高分辨率全色图像的空间纹理和低分辨率多光谱图像的光谱信息来合成高分辨率多光谱图像。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法，特别是基于扩散的算子，虽然提升了性能，但存在光谱-空间模糊问题和高计算成本，这源于其随机性和迭代采样过程。
AI.method: 提出EDNO框架，将全色锐化重新定义为频域中的连续函数映射。利用欧拉公式将特征转换到极坐标系，开发Euler Feature Interaction Layer (EFIL)，将融合任务解耦为两个模块：显式特征交互模块（线性加权方案模拟相位旋转）和隐式特征交互模块（前馈网络建模光谱分布）。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上的实验结果表明，EDNO相比重型架构提供了优越的效率-性能平衡。
AI.conclusion: EDNO通过频域操作和欧拉公式启发的解耦机制，有效解决了全色锐化中的光谱-空间模糊问题，同时保持了计算效率。

title: CIA: Inferring the Communication Topology from LLM-based Multi-Agent Systems
summary: LLM-based Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in solving complex tasks. Central to MAS is the communication topology which governs how agents exchange information internally. Consequently, the security of communication topologies has attracted increasing attention. In this paper, we investigate a critical privacy risk: MAS communication topologies can be inferred under a restrictive black-box setting, exposing system vulnerabilities and posing significant intellectual property threats. To explore this risk, we propose Communication Inference Attack (CIA), a novel attack that constructs new adversarial queries to induce intermediate agents' reasoning outputs and models their semantic correlations through the proposed global bias disentanglement and LLM-guided weak supervision. Extensive experiments on MAS with optimized communication topologies demonstrate the effectiveness of CIA, achieving an average AUC of 0.87 and a peak AUC of up to 0.99, thereby revealing the substantial privacy risk in MAS.

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为CIA的攻击方法，用于在严格的黑盒设置下推断基于LLM的多智能体系统的通信拓扑结构
AI.motivation: 基于LLM的多智能体系统在解决复杂任务方面表现出色，但其通信拓扑结构的安全性受到关注。通信拓扑结构可能被推断，这会暴露系统漏洞并构成知识产权威胁
AI.method: 提出通信推断攻击（CIA），通过构建对抗性查询诱导中间智能体的推理输出，并通过全局偏置解耦和LLM引导的弱监督建模语义相关性
AI.result: 在具有优化通信拓扑的MAS上进行了广泛实验，CIA平均AUC达到0.87，峰值AUC高达0.99，证明了攻击的有效性
AI.conclusion: CIA攻击揭示了MAS中存在的重大隐私风险，表明通信拓扑结构可以在黑盒设置下被有效推断，这对系统安全构成威胁

title: Enhancing Clustering: An Explainable Approach via Filtered Patterns
summary: Machine learning has become a central research area, with increasing attention devoted to explainable clustering, also known as conceptual clustering, which is a knowledge-driven unsupervised learning paradigm that partitions data into $θ$ disjoint clusters, where each cluster is described by an explicit symbolic representation, typically expressed as a closed pattern or itemset. By providing human-interpretable cluster descriptions, explainable clustering plays an important role in explainable artificial intelligence and knowledge discovery. Recent work improved clustering quality by introducing k-relaxed frequent patterns (k-RFPs), a pattern model that relaxes strict coverage constraints through a generalized kcover definition. This framework integrates constraint-based reasoning, using SAT solvers for pattern generation, with combinatorial optimization, using Integer Linear Programming (ILP) for cluster selection. Despite its effectiveness, this approach suffers from a critical limitation: multiple distinct k-RFPs may induce identical k-covers, leading to redundant symbolic representations that unnecessarily enlarge the search space and increase computational complexity during cluster construction. In this paper, we address this redundancy through a pattern reduction framework. Our contributions are threefold. First, we formally characterize the conditions under which distinct k-RFPs induce identical kcovers, providing theoretical foundations for redundancy detection. Second, we propose an optimization strategy that removes redundant patterns by retaining a single representative pattern for each distinct k-cover. Third, we investigate the interpretability and representativeness of the patterns selected by the ILP model by analyzing their robustness with respect to their induced clusters. Extensive experiments conducted on several real-world datasets demonstrate that the proposed approach significantly reduces the pattern search space, improves computational efficiency, preserves and enhances in some cases the quality of the resulting clusters.

AI.tldr: 提出一种可解释聚类方法，通过过滤冗余模式来减少搜索空间并提高计算效率
AI.motivation: 现有的k-松弛频繁模式方法存在冗余问题，多个不同的k-RFP可能产生相同的k-覆盖，导致搜索空间不必要增大和计算复杂度增加
AI.method: 提出模式约简框架：1) 形式化描述不同k-RFP产生相同k-覆盖的条件；2) 通过保留每个不同k-cover的单一代表模式来移除冗余模式；3) 分析ILP模型选择模式的解释性和代表性
AI.result: 在多个真实世界数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著减少了模式搜索空间，提高了计算效率，并在某些情况下保持甚至提升了聚类质量
AI.conclusion: 提出的模式约简框架有效解决了可解释聚类中的冗余问题，提高了计算效率，同时保持了聚类的解释性和质量

title: Operationalising the Right to be Forgotten in LLMs: A Lightweight Sequential Unlearning Framework for Privacy-Aligned Deployment in Politically Sensitive Environments
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in politically sensitive environments, where memorisation of personal data or confidential content raises regulatory concerns under frameworks such as the GDPR and its Right to be Forgotten. Translating such legal principles into large-scale generative systems presents significant technical challenges. We introduce a lightweight sequential unlearning framework that explicitly separates retention and suppression objectives. The method first stabilises benign capabilities through positive fine-tuning, then applies layer-restricted negative fine-tuning to suppress designated sensitive patterns while preserving general language competence. Experiments on the SemEval-2025 LLM Unlearning benchmark demonstrate effective behavioural suppression with minimal impact on factual accuracy and fluency. GPT-2 exhibits greater robustness than DistilGPT-2, highlighting the role of model capacity in privacy-aligned adaptation. We position sequential unlearning as a practical and reproducible mechanism for operationalising data erasure requirements in politically deployed LLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出一种轻量级序列遗忘框架，用于在政治敏感环境中部署的大型语言模型中实现"被遗忘权"要求
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在政治敏感环境中部署时，记忆个人数据或机密内容会引发GDPR等法规下的合规问题，需要将"被遗忘权"法律原则转化为可操作的技术方案
AI.method: 采用轻量级序列遗忘框架，明确分离保留和抑制目标：先通过正向微调稳定良性能力，再应用层限制的负向微调来抑制指定敏感模式，同时保持通用语言能力
AI.result: 在SemEval-2025 LLM遗忘基准测试中，该方法有效抑制了目标行为，对事实准确性和流畅性影响最小；GPT-2比DistilGPT-2表现出更强的鲁棒性，表明模型容量在隐私对齐适应中起重要作用
AI.conclusion: 序列遗忘是政治部署LLM中实现数据擦除要求的实用且可复现机制，为隐私对齐部署提供了有效解决方案

title: X-VC: Zero-shot Streaming Voice Conversion in Codec Space
summary: Zero-shot voice conversion (VC) aims to convert a source utterance into the voice of an unseen target speaker while preserving its linguistic content. Although recent systems have improved conversion quality, building zero-shot VC systems for interactive scenarios remains challenging because high-fidelity speaker transfer and low-latency streaming inference are difficult to achieve simultaneously. In this work, we present X-VC, a zero-shot streaming VC system that performs one-step conversion in the latent space of a pretrained neural codec. X-VC uses a dual-conditioning acoustic converter that jointly models source codec latents and frame-level acoustic conditions derived from target reference speech, while injecting utterance-level target speaker information through adaptive normalization. To reduce the mismatch between training and inference, we train the model with generated paired data and a role-assignment strategy that combines standard, reconstruction, and reversed modes. For streaming inference, we further adopt a chunkwise inference scheme with overlap smoothing that is aligned with the segment-based training paradigm of the codec. Experiments on Seed-TTS-Eval show that X-VC achieves the best streaming WER in both English and Chinese, strong speaker similarity in same-language and cross-lingual settings, and substantially lower offline real-time factor than the compared baselines. These results suggest that codec-space one-step conversion is a practical approach for building high-quality low-latency zero-shot VC systems. Audio samples are available at https://x-vc.github.io. Our code and checkpoints will also be released.

AI.tldr: 本文提出X-VC系统，实现零样本流式语音转换，在预训练神经编解码器的潜在空间中完成一步转换。
AI.motivation: 零样本语音转换系统在交互场景中面临挑战，难以同时实现高保真说话人转换和低延迟流式推理。现有系统无法兼顾这两方面需求。
AI.method: 使用双条件声学转换器联合建模源编解码潜在表示和目标参考语音的帧级声学条件，通过自适应归一化注入说话人信息。采用生成配对数据和角色分配策略减少训练-推理不匹配，并采用分块推理方案实现流式处理。
AI.result: 在Seed-TTS-Eval评估中，X-VC在英语和中文上均获得最佳流式WER，在同语言和跨语言设置中具有强说话人相似性，离线实时因子显著低于基线系统。
AI.conclusion: 编解码空间一步转换是构建高质量低延迟零样本语音转换系统的实用方法，X-VC在流式推理和说话人相似性方面表现优异。

title: HazardArena: Evaluating Semantic Safety in Vision-Language-Action Models
comment: Submitted to conference; 12 pages, 8 figures, including supplementary material
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models inherit rich world knowledge from vision-language backbones and acquire executable skills via action demonstrations. However, existing evaluations largely focus on action execution success, leaving action policies loosely coupled with visual-linguistic semantics. This decoupling exposes a systematic vulnerability whereby correct action execution may induce unsafe outcomes under semantic risk. To expose this vulnerability, we introduce HazardArena, a benchmark designed to evaluate semantic safety in VLAs under controlled yet risk-bearing contexts. HazardArena is constructed from safe/unsafe twin scenarios that share matched objects, layouts, and action requirements, differing only in the semantic context that determines whether an action is unsafe. We find that VLA models trained exclusively on safe scenarios often fail to behave safely when evaluated in their corresponding unsafe counterparts. HazardArena includes over 2,000 assets and 40 risk-sensitive tasks spanning 7 real-world risk categories grounded in established robotic safety standards. To mitigate this vulnerability, we propose a training-free Safety Option Layer that constrains action execution using semantic attributes or a vision-language judge, substantially reducing unsafe behaviors with minimal impact on task performance. We hope that HazardArena highlights the need to rethink how semantic safety is evaluated and enforced in VLAs as they scale toward real-world deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了HazardArena基准，用于评估视觉-语言-动作模型在语义安全方面的表现，揭示现有模型在语义风险下的系统脆弱性。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型评估主要关注动作执行成功率，但忽略了语义安全风险。模型可能在正确执行动作的同时产生不安全结果，存在语义风险下的系统脆弱性。
AI.method: 构建HazardArena基准，包含安全/不安全双胞胎场景，共享相同对象、布局和动作要求，仅语义上下文不同。提出无需训练的安全选项层，通过语义属性或视觉-语言判断器约束动作执行。
AI.result: 研究发现，仅在安全场景训练的VLA模型在对应不安全场景中经常无法安全行为。提出的安全选项层能显著减少不安全行为，且对任务性能影响最小。
AI.conclusion: HazardArena强调需要重新思考VLA模型在扩展至实际部署时如何评估和执行语义安全，为语义安全评估提供了系统框架和缓解方案。

title: Scaling Exposes the Trigger: Input-Level Backdoor Detection in Text-to-Image Diffusion Models via Cross-Attention Scaling
summary: Text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models have achieved remarkable success in image synthesis, but their reliance on large-scale data and open ecosystems introduces serious backdoor security risks. Existing defenses, particularly input-level methods, are more practical for deployment but often rely on observable anomalies that become unreliable under stealthy, semantics-preserving trigger designs. As modern backdoor attacks increasingly embed triggers into natural inputs, these methods degrade substantially, raising a critical question: can more stable, implicit, and trigger-agnostic differences between benign and backdoor inputs be exploited for detection? In this work, we address this challenge from an active probing perspective. We introduce controlled scaling perturbations on cross-attention and uncover a novel phenomenon termed Cross-Attention Scaling Response Divergence (CSRD), where benign and backdoor inputs exhibit systematically different response evolution patterns across denoising steps. Building on this insight, we propose SET, an input-level backdoor detection framework that constructs response-offset features under multi-scale perturbations and learns a compact benign response space from a small set of clean samples. Detection is then performed by measuring deviations from this learned space, without requiring prior knowledge of the attack or access to model training. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SET consistently outperforms existing baselines across diverse attack methods, trigger types, and model settings, with particularly strong gains under stealthy implicit-trigger scenarios. Overall, SET improves AUROC by 9.1% and ACC by 6.5% over the best baseline, highlighting its effectiveness and robustness for practical deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SET的输入级后门检测框架，用于检测文本到图像扩散模型中的后门攻击，通过交叉注意力缩放扰动来区分良性输入和后门输入。
AI.motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型在图像合成方面取得了显著成功，但其对大规模数据和开放生态系统的依赖引入了严重的后门安全风险。现有的防御方法，特别是输入级方法，在部署上更实用，但往往依赖于可观察的异常，这些异常在隐蔽、语义保留的触发器设计下变得不可靠。随着现代后门攻击越来越多地将触发器嵌入自然输入中，这些方法的性能大幅下降，因此需要探索更稳定、隐式且与触发器无关的检测方法。
AI.method: 本文从主动探测的角度解决这一挑战，引入了交叉注意力缩放扰动，并发现了一种称为交叉注意力缩放响应分歧（CSRD）的新现象。基于这一洞察，提出了SET框架，该框架在多尺度扰动下构建响应偏移特征，并从少量干净样本中学习紧凑的良性响应空间。检测通过测量与学习空间的偏差来进行，无需攻击的先验知识或模型训练访问权限。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，SET在各种攻击方法、触发器类型和模型设置中始终优于现有基线方法，在隐蔽隐式触发器场景下表现尤为突出。总体而言，SET将AUROC提高了9.1%，ACC提高了6.5%，突显了其在实际部署中的有效性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的SET框架通过利用交叉注意力缩放响应分歧现象，实现了对文本到图像扩散模型中后门攻击的有效检测，特别是在隐蔽触发器场景下表现出色，为实际部署提供了实用且鲁棒的解决方案。

title: DiffusionPrint: Learning Generative Fingerprints for Diffusion-Based Inpainting Localization
summary: Modern diffusion-based inpainting models pose significant challenges for image forgery localization (IFL), as their full regeneration pipelines reconstruct the entire image via a latent decoder, disrupting the camera-level noise patterns that existing forensic methods rely on. We propose DiffusionPrint, a patch-level contrastive learning framework that learns a forensic signal robust to the spectral distortions introduced by latent decoding. It exploits the fact that inpainted regions generated by the same model share a consistent generative fingerprint, using this as a self-supervisory signal. DiffusionPrint trains a convolutional backbone via a MoCo-style objective with cross-category hard negative mining and a generator-aware classification head, producing a forensic feature map that serves as a highly discriminative secondary modality in fusion-based IFL frameworks. Integrated into TruFor, MMFusion, and a lightweight fusion baseline, DiffusionPrint consistently improves localization across multiple generative models, with gains of up to +28% on mask types unseen during fine-tuning and confirmed generalization to unseen generative architectures. Code is available at https://github.com/mever-team/diffusionprint

AI.tldr: 提出DiffusionPrint方法，用于检测基于扩散模型的图像修复伪造区域定位，解决现有取证方法在扩散模型全图像重建时失效的问题。
AI.motivation: 现代扩散修复模型通过潜在解码器重建整个图像，破坏了相机级噪声模式，使现有图像伪造定位方法失效，需要新的取证信号来应对潜在解码引入的光谱失真。
AI.method: 提出基于补丁级对比学习的框架，利用同一模型生成的修复区域共享一致生成指纹的特性作为自监督信号，采用MoCo风格目标、跨类别硬负样本挖掘和生成器感知分类头训练卷积骨干网络。
AI.result: 在TruFor、MMFusion和轻量级融合基线中集成DiffusionPrint，显著提升多个生成模型的定位性能，在未见过的掩码类型上提升达28%，并验证了对未见生成架构的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: DiffusionPrint通过学习生成指纹提供鲁棒的取证信号，有效解决了扩散修复模型的伪造定位挑战，为图像取证提供了新的解决方案。

title: IAD-Unify: A Region-Grounded Unified Model for Industrial Anomaly Segmentation, Understanding, and Generation
summary: Real-world industrial inspection requires not only localizing defects, but also explaining them in natural language and generating controlled defect edits. However, existing approaches fail to jointly support all three capabilities within a unified framework and evaluation protocol. We propose IAD-Unify, a dual-encoder unified framework in which a frozen DINOv2-based region expert supplies precise anomaly evidence to a shared Qwen3.5-4B vision-language backbone via lightweight token injection, jointly enabling anomaly segmentation, region-grounded understanding, and mask-guided generation. To enable unified evaluation, we further construct Anomaly-56K, a comprehensive unified multi-task IAD evaluation platform, spanning 59,916 images across 24 categories and 104 defect variants. Controlled ablations yield four findings: (i) region grounding is the decisive mechanism for understanding, removing it degrades location accuracy by >76 pp; (ii) predicted-region performance closely matches oracle, confirming deployment viability; (iii) region-grounded generation achieves the best full-image fidelity and masked-region perceptual quality; and (iv) pre-initialized joint training improves understanding at negligible generation cost (-0.16 dB). IAD-Unify further achieves strong performance on the MMAD benchmark, including categories unseen during training, demonstrating robust cross-category generalization.

AI.tldr: 提出IAD-Unify统一模型，用于工业异常分割、理解和生成三大任务
AI.motivation: 现有方法无法在统一框架中同时支持工业异常检测的三大能力：缺陷定位、自然语言解释和可控缺陷编辑
AI.method: 采用双编码器统一框架，冻结的DINOv2区域专家通过轻量级token注入向共享的Qwen3.5-4B视觉语言骨干提供精确异常证据
AI.result: 构建了Anomaly-56K统一评估平台，包含59,916张图像；区域接地是理解任务的关键机制；在MMAD基准测试中表现强劲，展示跨类别泛化能力
AI.conclusion: IAD-Unify成功实现了工业异常分割、理解和生成的统一框架，通过区域接地机制显著提升性能，并展示了强大的跨类别泛化能力

title: A Hybrid Architecture for Benign-Malignant Classification of Mammography ROIs
summary: Accurate characterization of suspicious breast lesions in mammography is important for early diagnosis and treatment planning. While Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are effective at extracting local visual patterns, they are less suited to modeling long-range dependencies. Vision Transformers (ViTs) address this limitation through self-attention, but their quadratic computational cost can be prohibitive. This paper presents a hybrid architecture that combines EfficientNetV2-M for local feature extraction with Vision Mamba, a State Space Model (SSM), for efficient global context modeling. The proposed model performs binary classification of abnormality-centered mammography regions of interest (ROIs) from the CBIS-DDSM dataset into benign and malignant classes. By combining a strong CNN backbone with a linear-complexity sequence model, the approach achieves strong lesion-level classification performance in an ROI-based setting.

AI.tldr: 该论文的主要任务是开发一种混合架构，用于对乳腺X光检查中的感兴趣区域进行良恶性分类。
AI.motivation: 卷积神经网络在提取局部视觉模式方面有效，但不擅长建模长距离依赖关系；视觉变换器通过自注意力解决此问题，但二次计算成本过高。需要一种既能捕捉局部特征又能高效建模全局上下文的方法。
AI.method: 提出一种混合架构，结合EfficientNetV2-M进行局部特征提取和Vision Mamba（状态空间模型）进行高效的全局上下文建模，对CBIS-DDSM数据集中的异常中心乳腺X光ROI进行二分类。
AI.result: 该方法在基于ROI的设置中实现了强大的病灶级分类性能，通过结合强大的CNN骨干网络和线性复杂度序列模型获得了良好结果。
AI.conclusion: 混合架构结合了CNN的局部特征提取能力和状态空间模型的全局上下文建模优势，为乳腺X光检查的良恶性分类提供了一种有效解决方案。

title: D-BDM: A Direct and Efficient Boundary-Based Occupancy Grid Mapping Framework for LiDARs
summary: Efficient and scalable 3D occupancy mapping is essential for autonomous robot applications in unknown environments. However, traditional occupancy grid representations suffer from two fundamental limitations. First, explicitly storing all voxels in three-dimensional space leads to prohibitive memory consumption. Second, exhaustive ray casting incurs high update latency. A recent representation alleviate memory demands by maintaining only the voxels on the two-dimensional boundary, yet they still rely on full ray casting updates. This work advances the boundary-based framework with a highly efficient update scheme. We introduce a truncated ray casting strategy that restricts voxel traversal to the exterior of the boundary, which dramatically reduces the number of updated voxels. In addition, we propose a direct boundary update mechanism that removes the need for an auxiliary local 3D occupancy grid, further reducing memory usage and simplifying the map update pipeline. We name our framework as D-BDM. Extensive evaluations on public datasets demonstrate that our approach achieves significantly lower update time and reduced memory consumption compared with the baseline methods, as well as the prior boundary-based approach.

AI.tldr: 提出一种直接高效的基于边界的激光雷达占据栅格建图框架D-BDM，用于解决传统3D占据栅格建图的内存消耗和更新延迟问题。
AI.motivation: 传统3D占据栅格建图存在两个根本限制：显式存储所有体素导致内存消耗过大，以及完整光线投射导致更新延迟高。现有边界表示方法虽缓解了内存需求，但仍依赖完整光线投射更新。
AI.method: 提出截断光线投射策略，将体素遍历限制在边界外部，大幅减少更新的体素数量；提出直接边界更新机制，无需辅助局部3D占据栅格，减少内存使用并简化地图更新流程。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上的广泛评估表明，与基线方法和先前边界方法相比，D-BDM实现了显著更低的更新时间和减少的内存消耗。
AI.conclusion: D-BDM框架通过高效的更新方案推进了基于边界的建图方法，在保持准确性的同时显著提升了计算效率和内存使用效率。

title: Decoding by Perturbation: Mitigating MLLM Hallucinations via Dynamic Textual Perturbation
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models frequently suffer from inference hallucinations, partially stemming from language priors dominating visual evidence. Existing training-free mitigation methods either perturb the visual representation and deviate from the natural image distribution, or enforce intrusive manipulations that compromise the model's inherent generative fluency. We introduce a novel perspective that multimodal hallucination manifests as the hypersensitivity of visual grounding to textual phrasing during the decoding phase. Building on this insight, we propose Decoding by Perturbation (DeP), a training-free framework mitigating prior-induced hallucinations via controlled textual interventions. DeP employs a dynamic probe applying multi-level textual perturbations to elicit latent language priors. Leveraging attention variance, it enhances stable evidence regions while suppressing suspicious noise in the feature space. Furthermore, it constructs an interpretable prior drift direction using logits statistics to counteract probability biases from textual co-occurrences. Extensive experiments confirm DeP effectively reduces hallucinations and achieves superior performance across multiple benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为DeP的训练免费框架，通过动态文本扰动来缓解多模态大语言模型中的幻觉问题，减少语言先验对视觉证据的支配。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型经常出现推理幻觉，部分原因是语言先验主导了视觉证据。现有训练免费方法要么扰动视觉表示偏离自然图像分布，要么采用侵入性操作损害模型生成流畅性。
AI.method: 提出解码扰动框架，通过动态探针应用多级文本扰动来引出潜在语言先验，利用注意力方差增强稳定证据区域并抑制特征空间中的可疑噪声，构建可解释的先验漂移方向来对抗文本共现的概率偏差。
AI.result: 大量实验证实DeP能有效减少幻觉，在多个基准测试中取得优越性能。
AI.conclusion: DeP框架通过文本扰动视角有效缓解多模态幻觉问题，提供了一种训练免费的解决方案，在保持模型生成流畅性的同时提升视觉基础能力。

title: RACF: A Resilient Autonomous Car Framework with Object Distance Correction
comment: 8 pages, 9 figures, 5 tables. Submitted manuscript to IROS 2026
summary: Autonomous vehicles are increasingly deployed in safety-critical applications, where sensing failures or cyberphysical attacks can lead to unsafe operations resulting in human loss and/or severe physical damages. Reliable real-time perception is therefore critically important for their safe operations and acceptability. For example, vision-based distance estimation is vulnerable to environmental degradation and adversarial perturbations, and existing defenses are often reactive and too slow to promptly mitigate their impacts on safe operations. We present a Resilient Autonomous Car Framework (RACF) that incorporates an Object Distance Correction Algorithm (ODCA) to improve perception-layer robustness through redundancy and diversity across a depth camera, LiDAR, and physics-based kinematics. Within this framework, when obstacle distance estimation produced by depth camera is inconsistent, a cross-sensor gate activates the correction algorithm to fix the detected inconsistency. We have experiment with the proposed resilient car framework and evaluate its performance on a testbed implemented using the Quanser QCar 2 platform. The presented framework achieved up to 35% RMSE reduction under strong corruption and improves stop compliance and braking latency, while operating in real time. These results demonstrate a practical and lightweight approach to resilient perception for safety-critical autonomous driving

AI.tldr: 提出RACF弹性自动驾驶框架，通过对象距离校正算法提高感知层鲁棒性，解决深度相机距离估计不一致问题
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆在安全关键应用中部署增加，感知故障或网络物理攻击可能导致不安全操作，造成人员伤亡和严重物理损坏。可靠的实时感知对安全操作和可接受性至关重要，现有防御措施通常反应慢且无法及时减轻影响
AI.method: 提出弹性自动驾驶框架RACF，整合深度相机、LiDAR和基于物理的运动学，通过冗余和多样性提高感知鲁棒性。当深度相机障碍物距离估计不一致时，跨传感器门激活校正算法修复检测到的不一致性
AI.result: 在Quanser QCar 2平台测试床上评估，在强干扰下实现高达35%的RMSE降低，改善停车合规性和制动延迟，同时实时运行
AI.conclusion: RACF框架为安全关键自动驾驶提供了一种实用轻量级的弹性感知方法，通过多传感器融合和校正算法有效提高系统鲁棒性和安全性

title: Submodular Max-Min Allocation under Identical Valuations
summary: In the problem of Submodular Max-Min Allocation, we are given a set of items, a set of players, and monotone submodular valuation functions that represent the satisfaction of a player with a certain subset of items. The goal is to find an allocation of the items to the players that maximizes the lowest satisfaction among all players. We study this problem in the special case where all players have the same valuation function. We devise a greedy algorithm which gives a $0.4$-approximation, improving the previously best factor of $\frac{10}{27} \approx 0.37$ by Uziahu and Feige. Furthermore, we study the integrality gap of the \emph{configuration LP} when players have identical valuations. By constructing a variable assignment to the dual from a primal integral solution, we give the first constant upper bound on the integrality gap for submodular valuations. Generalizing the result to the case where players' allocations must be independent in $k$ given matroids, we derive a $\mathcal{O}(k)$-estimation algorithm for max-min allocation subject to $k$ matroid constraints under identical valuations.

AI.tldr: 研究在相同估值函数下的子模最大最小分配问题，目标是找到物品分配给玩家的最优方案，最大化所有玩家中的最小满意度。
AI.motivation: 改进子模最大最小分配问题的近似比，特别是在所有玩家具有相同估值函数的特殊情况下，超越之前的最佳近似比10/27≈0.37。
AI.method: 设计贪心算法，并研究配置线性规划（configuration LP）的整数性间隙，通过从整数解构造对偶变量赋值来分析间隙，并推广到k个拟阵约束的情况。
AI.result: 提出0.4近似算法，改进了之前的0.37近似比；首次为子模估值下的整数性间隙提供常数上界；对于k个拟阵约束的情况，推导出O(k)估计算法。
AI.conclusion: 在相同估值函数下，子模最大最小分配问题可以获得更好的近似比，并且整数性间隙有常数上界，这一结果可以扩展到多拟阵约束的情况。

title: Learning step-level dynamic soaring in shear flow
summary: Dynamic soaring enables sustained flight by extracting energy from wind shear, yet it is commonly understood as a cycle-level maneuver that assumes stable flow conditions. In realistic unsteady environments, however, such assumptions are often violated, raising the question of whether explicit cycle-level planning is necessary. Here, we show that dynamic soaring can emerge from step-level, state-feedback control using only local sensing, without explicit trajectory planning. Using deep reinforcement learning as a tool, we obtain policies that achieve robust omnidirectional navigation across diverse shear-flow conditions. The learned behavior organizes into a structured control law that coordinates turning and vertical motion, giving rise to a two-phase strategy governed by a trade-off between energy extraction and directional progress. The resulting policy generalizes across varying conditions and reproduces key features observed in biological flight and optimal-control solutions. These findings identify a feedback-based control structure underlying dynamic soaring, demonstrating that efficient energy-harvesting flight can emerge from local interactions with the flow without explicit planning, and providing insights for biological flight and autonomous systems in complex, flow-coupled environments.

AI.tldr: 研究动态翱翔在非稳态风切变环境中的控制策略，探索仅通过局部感知和状态反馈控制实现能量提取飞行的可能性。
AI.motivation: 传统动态翱翔被理解为需要循环级规划和稳定流场假设，但在现实非稳态环境中这些假设常被违反，需要探索是否必须进行显式的循环级规划。
AI.method: 使用深度强化学习作为工具，通过步级状态反馈控制策略，仅依赖局部感知而不进行显式轨迹规划。
AI.result: 获得了能在多样化风切变条件下实现稳健全向导航的策略，学习到的行为组织成结构化控制律，协调转向和垂直运动，形成由能量提取与方向进展权衡支配的两阶段策略。
AI.conclusion: 动态翱翔可以从局部流场交互中通过反馈控制结构自然涌现，无需显式规划，为生物飞行和复杂流场环境中自主系统提供了新见解。

title: DeferredSeg: A Multi-Expert Deferral Framework for Trustworthy Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Segmentation models based on deep neural networks demonstrate strong generalization for medical image segmentation. However, they often exhibit overconfidence or underconfidence, leading to unreliable confidence scores for segmentation masks, especially in ambiguous regions. This undermines the trustworthiness required for clinical deployment. Motivated by the learning-to-defer (L2D) paradigm, we introduce DeferredSeg, a deferral-aware segmentation framework, i.e., a Human--AI collaboration system that determines whether to defer predictions to human experts in specific regions. DeferredSeg extends the base segmentor with an aggregated deferral predictor and additional routing channels that dynamically route each pixel to either the base segmentor or a human expert. To train this routing efficiently, we introduce a pixel-wise surrogate collaboration loss that supervises deferral decisions. In addition, to preserve spatial coherence within deferral regions, we propose a spatial-coherence loss that enforces smooth deferral masks, thereby enhancing reliability. Beyond single-expert deferral, we further extend the framework to a multi-expert setting by introducing multiple discrepancy experts for collaborative decision-making. To prevent overloading or underutilizing individual experts, we further design a load-balancing penalty that evenly distributes workload across expert branches. We evaluate DeferredSeg on three challenging medical datasets using MedSAM and CENet as the base segmentor for fair comparison. Experimental results show that DeferredSeg consistently outperforms the baseline, demonstrating its effectiveness for trustworthy dense medical segmentation. Moreover, the proposed framework is model-agnostic and can be readily applied to other segmentation architectures.

AI.tldr: 提出DeferredSeg框架，用于医学图像分割中可信赖的人类-AI协作系统，通过延迟决策机制将不确定区域交由人类专家处理。
AI.motivation: 基于深度神经网络的医学图像分割模型在模糊区域常表现出过度自信或自信不足，导致分割掩码置信度不可靠，影响临床部署的可信度。
AI.method: 提出延迟感知分割框架，扩展基础分割器，包含聚合延迟预测器和路由通道；引入像素级代理协作损失监督延迟决策，空间一致性损失确保延迟区域平滑；扩展到多专家设置，设计负载均衡惩罚均匀分配工作量。
AI.result: 在三个具有挑战性的医学数据集上使用MedSAM和CENet作为基础分割器进行评估，DeferredSeg始终优于基线方法，证明了其在可信赖密集医学分割中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DeferredSeg是一个模型无关的框架，可轻松应用于其他分割架构，为医学图像分割提供了可信赖的人类-AI协作解决方案。

title: Security and Resilience in Autonomous Vehicles: A Proactive Design Approach
comment: 20 pages. Accepted for publication as a book chapter
summary: Autonomous vehicles (AVs) promise efficient, clean and cost-effective transportation systems, but their reliance on sensors, wireless communications, and decision-making systems makes them vulnerable to cyberattacks and physical threats. This chapter presents novel design techniques to strengthen the security and resilience of AVs. We first provide a taxonomy of potential attacks across different architectural layers, from perception and control manipulation to Vehicle-to-Any (V2X) communication exploits and software supply chain compromises. Building on this analysis, we present an AV Resilient architecture that integrates redundancy, diversity, and adaptive reconfiguration strategies, supported by anomaly- and hash-based intrusion detection techniques. Experimental validation on the Quanser QCar platform demonstrates the effectiveness of these methods in detecting depth camera blinding attacks and software tampering of perception modules. The results highlight how fast anomaly detection combined with fallback and backup mechanisms ensures operational continuity, even under adversarial conditions. By linking layered threat modeling with practical defense implementations, this work advances AV resilience strategies for safer and more trustworthy autonomous vehicles.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种增强自动驾驶车辆安全性和弹性的主动设计方法，包括攻击分类、弹性架构设计和入侵检测技术。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆依赖传感器、无线通信和决策系统，容易受到网络攻击和物理威胁，需要加强安全性和弹性以确保安全可靠的运行。
AI.method: 首先建立跨架构层的攻击分类学，然后提出集成冗余、多样性和自适应重配置策略的AV弹性架构，并采用基于异常和哈希的入侵检测技术。
AI.result: 在Quanser QCar平台上进行实验验证，成功检测深度相机致盲攻击和感知模块软件篡改，展示了快速异常检测与备用机制结合确保操作连续性的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过将分层威胁建模与实际防御实施相结合，这项工作推进了自动驾驶车辆的弹性策略，为实现更安全、更可信的自动驾驶车辆提供了有效方法。

title: Dual-Modality Anchor-Guided Filtering for Test-time Prompt Tuning
summary: Test-Time Prompt Tuning (TPT) adapts vision-language models using augmented views, but its effectiveness is hindered by the challenge of determining which views are beneficial. Standard entropy-based filtering relies on the internal confidence scores of the model, which are often miscalibrated under distribution shift, assigning high confidence to irrelevant crops or background regions while ignoring semantic content. To address this, we propose a dual-modality anchor-guided framework that grounds view selection in semantic evidence. We introduce a text anchor from attribute-rich descriptions, to provide fine-grained class semantics, and an adaptive image anchor that captures evolving test-time statistics. Using these anchors, we filter views based on alignment and confidence, ensuring that only informative views guide adaptation. Moreover, we treat the anchors as auxiliary predictive heads and combine their predictions with the original output in a confidence-weighted ensemble, yielding a stable supervision signal for prompt updates. Extensive experiments on 15 benchmark datasets demonstrate new state-of-the-art performance, highlighting the contribution of anchor-guided supervision as a foundation for robust prompt updates.

AI.tldr: 提出一种双模态锚点引导的测试时提示调优方法，通过语义证据改进视图选择，提升视觉语言模型在分布偏移下的适应能力。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时提示调优方法依赖基于熵的视图过滤，但模型内部置信度在分布偏移下常常失准，会错误地给无关裁剪或背景区域分配高置信度，而忽略语义内容。
AI.method: 提出双模态锚点引导框架：1) 文本锚点从属性丰富的描述中提取细粒度类别语义；2) 自适应图像锚点捕捉测试时统计信息；3) 基于锚点对齐和置信度过滤视图；4) 将锚点作为辅助预测头，与原始输出进行置信度加权集成，为提示更新提供稳定监督信号。
AI.result: 在15个基准数据集上的广泛实验表明，该方法实现了新的最先进性能，验证了锚点引导监督对稳健提示更新的贡献。
AI.conclusion: 双模态锚点引导的视图过滤框架通过语义证据改进测试时提示调优，解决了传统熵过滤方法的局限性，为分布偏移下的模型适应提供了更可靠的监督基础。

title: Chain-of-Models Pre-Training: Rethinking Training Acceleration of Vision Foundation Models
comment: This work is accepted to CVPR 2026. Code is available at https://github.com/deep-optimization/CoM-PT
summary: In this paper, we present Chain-of-Models Pre-Training (CoM-PT), a novel performance-lossless training acceleration method for vision foundation models (VFMs). This approach fundamentally differs from existing acceleration methods in its core motivation: rather than optimizing each model individually, CoM-PT is designed to accelerate the training pipeline at the model family level, scaling efficiently as the model family expands. Specifically, CoM-PT establishes a pre-training sequence for the model family, arranged in ascending order of model size, called model chain. In this chain, only the smallest model undergoes standard individual pre-training, while the other models are efficiently trained through sequential inverse knowledge transfer from their smaller predecessors by jointly reusing the knowledge in the parameter space and the feature space. As a result, CoM-PT enables all models to achieve performance that is mostly superior to standard individual training while significantly reducing training cost, and this is extensively validated across 45 datasets spanning zero-shot and fine-tuning tasks. Notably, its efficient scaling property yields a remarkable phenomenon: training more models even results in higher efficiency. For instance, when pre-training on CC3M: i) given ViT-L as the largest model, progressively prepending smaller models to the model chain reduces computational complexity by up to 72%; ii) within a fixed model size range, as the VFM family scales across 3, 4, and 7 models, the acceleration ratio of CoM-PT exhibits a striking leap: from 4.13X to 5.68X and 7.09X. Since CoM-PT is naturally agnostic to specific pre-training paradigms, we open-source the code to spur further extensions in more computationally intensive scenarios, such as large language model pre-training.

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为Chain-of-Models Pre-Training (CoM-PT)的性能无损训练加速方法，用于加速视觉基础模型的训练过程。
AI.motivation: 现有加速方法主要针对单个模型优化，而CoM-PT旨在从模型家族层面加速训练流程，随着模型家族扩展而高效扩展，解决大规模视觉基础模型训练成本高的问题。
AI.method: 建立按模型大小升序排列的模型链，只有最小模型进行标准预训练，其他模型通过从较小前驱模型进行顺序逆向知识转移来高效训练，联合重用参数空间和特征空间的知识。
AI.result: 在45个数据集上验证，所有模型性能大多优于标准单独训练，同时显著降低训练成本。例如在CC3M上预训练ViT-L时，计算复杂度降低达72%；随着模型家族扩展到3、4、7个模型，加速比从4.13X跃升至5.68X和7.09X。
AI.conclusion: CoM-PT是一种有效的训练加速方法，能够在不损失性能的情况下显著降低训练成本，具有良好的扩展性，训练更多模型反而效率更高，且不依赖于特定预训练范式，可扩展到计算密集型场景如大语言模型预训练。

title: Heuristic Classification of Thoughts Prompting (HCoT): Integrating Expert System Heuristics for Structured Reasoning into Large Language Models
summary: This paper addresses two limitations of large language models (LLMs) in solving complex problems: (1) their reasoning processes exhibit Bayesian-like stochastic generation, where each token is sampled from a context-dependent probability distribution, leading to inherently random decision trajectories rather than deterministic planning; (2) the reasoning and decision-making mechanisms are statically decoupled, meaning dynamically retrieved domain knowledge fails to dynamically adjust the underlying reasoning strategy. These dual deficiencies result in initial decisions lacking strategic anchoring and reasoning chains often failing to converge on correct solutions, as stochastic generation lacks mechanisms for trajectory correction or knowledge-guided optimization during sequential reasoning. To resolve these issues, we propose a problem-solving method integrated into the LLM's generation process to guide reasoning. This method, compatible with numerous LLMs and featuring reusable solutions, is grounded in a novel Heuristic-Classification-of-Thoughts prompting schema (HCoT). HCoT synergizes the LLM's reasoning ability with a structured problem space via a heuristic classification model that controls the reasoning process and provides reusable abstract solutions. Evaluated on two complex inductive reasoning tasks with ill-defined search spaces, HCoT outperforms existing approaches (e.g., Tree-of-Thoughts and Chain-of-Thoughts prompting) in performance. On the well-structured 24 Game task, HCoT demonstrates significantly higher token efficiency compared to the state-of-the-art Tree-of-Thoughts-Breadth-First-Search. In terms of both accuracy and token usage, HCoT achieves a Pareto frontier balance, offering a strong trade-off between performance and computational cost.

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为HCoT的启发式思维分类提示方法，将专家系统启发式规则集成到大型语言模型中，以解决复杂推理问题。
AI.motivation: 解决大型语言模型在解决复杂问题时的两个局限性：1) 推理过程具有贝叶斯式随机生成特性，导致决策轨迹随机而非确定性规划；2) 推理与决策机制静态解耦，动态检索的领域知识无法动态调整底层推理策略。
AI.method: 提出HCoT（启发式思维分类提示）方法，将LLM的推理能力与结构化问题空间相结合，通过启发式分类模型控制推理过程并提供可重用的抽象解决方案。
AI.result: 在两个复杂归纳推理任务中，HCoT优于现有方法（如Tree-of-Thoughts和Chain-of-Thoughts）；在24点游戏任务中，相比最先进的Tree-of-Thoughts-Breadth-First-Search，HCoT显示出显著更高的token效率。
AI.conclusion: HCoT在准确性和token使用方面实现了帕累托前沿平衡，在性能和计算成本之间提供了良好的权衡，为LLM解决复杂问题提供了一种有效的结构化推理方法。

title: Preventing Safety Drift in Large Language Models via Coupled Weight and Activation Constraints
comment: 17 pages, 6 figures, 6 tables, The 64th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL 2026)
summary: Safety alignment in Large Language Models (LLMs) remains highly fragile during fine-tuning, where even benign adaptation can degrade pre-trained refusal behaviors and enable harmful responses. Existing defenses typically constrain either weights or activations in isolation, without considering their coupled effects on safety. In this paper, we first theoretically demonstrate that constraining either weights or activations alone is insufficient for safety preservation. To robustly preserve safety alignment, we propose Coupled Weight and Activation Constraints (CWAC), a novel approach that simultaneously enforces a precomputed safety subspace on weight updates and applies targeted regularization to safety-critical features identified by sparse autoencoders. Extensive experiments across four widely used LLMs and diverse downstream tasks show that CWAC consistently achieves the lowest harmful scores with minimal impact on fine-tuning accuracy, substantially outperforming strong baselines even under high harmful data ratios.

AI.tldr: 提出CWAC方法，通过耦合权重和激活约束来防止大语言模型在微调过程中的安全漂移问题
AI.motivation: 大语言模型的安全对齐在微调过程中非常脆弱，现有方法单独约束权重或激活，未能考虑它们对安全的耦合影响，导致安全行为退化
AI.method: 提出耦合权重和激活约束(CWAC)，同时实施预计算安全子空间约束权重更新，并对稀疏自编码器识别的安全关键特征进行针对性正则化
AI.result: 在四个广泛使用的大语言模型和多样下游任务上的实验表明，CWAC始终实现最低的有害分数，对微调精度影响最小，即使在高有害数据比例下也显著优于强基线
AI.conclusion: CWAC通过同时约束权重和激活，有效防止大语言模型在微调过程中的安全漂移，为安全对齐提供了更鲁棒的解决方案

title: On the Distillation Loss Functions of Speech VAE for Unified Reconstruction, Understanding, and Generation
summary: Continuous speech representations based on Variational Autoencoders (VAEs) have emerged as a promising alternative to traditional spectrogram or discrete token based features for speech generation and reconstruction. Recent research has tried to enrich the structural information in VAE latent representations by aligning with self-supervised learning (SSL) features, aiming for better generation performance. However, it remains unclear whether the widely-used alignment approach based on time-axis distillation is optimal when considering more tasks. To address this problem, this paper systematically explores different alignment approaches and analyzes their impact on the performances over three axes: reconstruction, understanding, and generation. We investigate various design choices in the distillation loss. Extensive experiments show that the joint-marginal alignment approach with adaptive weighting can achieve the best overall performance while allowing for a controllable balance.

AI.tldr: 本文系统探索了语音VAE中不同蒸馏损失函数对齐方法对重建、理解和生成三个任务性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 虽然基于时间轴蒸馏的对齐方法被广泛用于丰富VAE潜在表示的结构信息，但考虑到更多任务时，这种方法是否最优仍不明确。
AI.method: 研究不同蒸馏损失函数的设计选择，特别是联合-边缘对齐方法，并采用自适应加权策略来平衡不同任务。
AI.result: 实验表明，采用自适应加权的联合-边缘对齐方法能够实现最佳整体性能，同时允许可控的平衡。
AI.conclusion: 联合-边缘对齐方法结合自适应加权是语音VAE在多任务场景下的有效解决方案，能够在重建、理解和生成任务间取得良好平衡。

title: Modality-Agnostic Prompt Learning for Multi-Modal Camouflaged Object Detection
summary: Camouflaged Object Detection (COD) aims to segment objects that blend seamlessly into complex backgrounds, with growing interest in exploiting additional visual modalities to enhance robustness through complementary information. However, most existing approaches generally rely on modality-specific architectures or customized fusion strategies, which limit scalability and cross-modal generalization. To address this, we propose a novel framework that generates modality-agnostic multi-modal prompts for the Segment Anything Model (SAM), enabling parameter-efficient adaptation to arbitrary auxiliary modalities and significantly improving overall performance on COD tasks. Specifically, we model multi-modal learning through interactions between a data-driven content domain and a knowledge-driven prompt domain, distilling task-relevant cues into unified prompts for SAM decoding. We further introduce a lightweight Mask Refine Module to calibrate coarse predictions by incorporating fine-grained prompt cues, leading to more accurate camouflaged object boundaries. Extensive experiments on RGB-Depth, RGB-Thermal, and RGB-Polarization benchmarks validate the effectiveness and generalization of our modality-agnostic framework.

AI.tldr: 提出一种模态无关的提示学习框架，用于多模态伪装目标检测，通过生成统一的提示来适配任意辅助模态
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖模态特定架构或定制融合策略，限制了可扩展性和跨模态泛化能力，需要更通用的多模态学习框架
AI.method: 构建数据驱动内容域和知识驱动提示域交互模型，将任务相关线索蒸馏为统一提示供SAM解码，并引入轻量级掩码细化模块校准预测
AI.result: 在RGB-Depth、RGB-Thermal和RGB-Polarization基准测试中验证了框架的有效性和泛化能力，显著提升了COD任务性能
AI.conclusion: 提出的模态无关提示学习框架能够参数高效地适配任意辅助模态，提高伪装目标检测的整体性能，具有良好泛化性

title: Beyond Output Correctness: Benchmarking and Evaluating Large Language Model Reasoning in Coding Tasks
summary: Large language models (LLMs) increasingly rely on explicit reasoning to solve coding tasks, yet evaluating the quality of this reasoning remains challenging. Existing reasoning evaluators are not designed for coding, and current benchmarks focus primarily on code generation, leaving other coding tasks largely unexplored. We introduce CodeRQ-Bench, the first benchmark for evaluating LLM reasoning quality across three coding task categories: generation, summarization, and classification. Using this benchmark, we analyze 1,069 mismatch cases from existing evaluators, identify five recurring limitations, and derive four design insights for reasoning evaluation in coding tasks. Guided by these insights, we propose VERA, a two-stage evaluator that combines evidence-grounded verification with ambiguity-aware score correction. Experiments on CodeRQ-Bench show that VERA consistently outperforms strong baselines across four datasets, improving AUCROC by up to 0.26 and AUPRC by up to 0.21. We release CodeRQ-Bench at https://github.com/MrLYG/CodeRQ-Bench, supporting future investigations.

AI.tldr: 该论文的主要任务是提出CodeRQ-Bench基准测试和VERA评估器，用于评估大型语言模型在编码任务中的推理质量，涵盖生成、总结和分类三类任务。
AI.motivation: 现有推理评估器不适用于编码任务，当前基准测试主要关注代码生成，其他编码任务未被充分探索，需要专门评估LLM在编码任务中的推理质量。
AI.method: 首先引入CodeRQ-Bench基准测试，分析1069个不匹配案例，识别五个常见限制，提出四个设计见解，然后开发VERA两阶段评估器，结合证据验证和模糊感知分数校正。
AI.result: 在CodeRQ-Bench上的实验显示，VERA在四个数据集上持续优于强基线，AUCROC提升高达0.26，AUPRC提升高达0.21。
AI.conclusion: 论文成功创建了首个编码任务推理质量评估基准，提出的VERA评估器显著提升了评估性能，为未来编码推理研究提供了重要工具和见解。

title: SCRIPT: A Subcharacter Compositional Representation Injection Module for Korean Pre-Trained Language Models
summary: Korean is a morphologically rich language with a featural writing system in which each character is systematically composed of subcharacter units known as Jamo. These subcharacters not only determine the visual structure of Korean but also encode frequent and linguistically meaningful morphophonological processes. However, most current Korean language models (LMs) are based on subword tokenization schemes, which are not explicitly designed to capture the internal compositional structure of characters. To address this limitation, we propose SCRIPT, a model-agnostic module that injects subcharacter compositional knowledge into Korean PLMs. SCRIPT allows to enhance subword embeddings with structural granularity, without requiring architectural changes or additional pre-training. As a result, SCRIPT enhances all baselines across various Korean natural language understanding (NLU) and generation (NLG) tasks. Moreover, beyond performance gains, detailed linguistic analyses show that SCRIPT reshapes the embedding space in a way that better captures grammatical regularities and semantically cohesive variations. Our code is available at https://github.com/SungHo3268/SCRIPT.

AI.tldr: 提出SCRIPT模块，用于向韩语预训练语言模型注入子字符组合知识，提升韩语自然语言理解和生成任务性能。
AI.motivation: 韩语是形态丰富的语言，字符由子字符单位Jamo组成，这些子字符编码了重要的形态音系过程。现有韩语模型基于子词分词方案，无法显式捕捉字符内部组合结构。
AI.method: 提出SCRIPT模型无关模块，在不改变架构或额外预训练的情况下，通过子字符组合表示增强子词嵌入，提供结构粒度信息。
AI.result: SCRIPT提升了所有基线模型在多种韩语NLU和NLG任务上的性能。语言分析显示，SCRIPT重塑了嵌入空间，更好地捕捉语法规律和语义连贯变化。
AI.conclusion: SCRIPT模块有效注入子字符组合知识，提升韩语PLMs性能，且能更好地捕捉语言规律，代码已开源。

title: Cooperative Memory Paging with Keyword Bookmarks for Long-Horizon LLM Conversations
summary: When LLM conversations grow beyond the context window, old content must be evicted -- but how does the model recover it when needed? We propose cooperative paging: evicted segments are replaced with minimal keyword bookmarks ([pN:keywords], ~8-24 tokens each), and the model is given a recall() tool to retrieve full content on demand. On the LoCoMo benchmark (10 real multi-session conversations, 300+ turns), cooperative paging achieves the highest answer quality among six methods -- outperforming truncation, BM25, word-overlap retrieval, a search-tool baseline, and full context -- on four models (GPT-4o-mini, DeepSeek-v3.2, Claude Haiku, GLM-5), confirmed by four independent LLM judges ($p=0.017$, paired bootstrap). We then study the paging design space with a 5x4 ablation over boundary strategies and eviction policies (3,176 synthetic probes, 1,600 LoCoMo probes). Key findings: (1) coarse fixed-size pages (fixed_20) reach 96.7% while content-aware topic_shift collapses to 56.7%; (2) eviction policy choice is data-dependent (FIFO best on synthetic, LFU on LoCoMo); (3) two bookmark generation strategies improve over the heuristic baseline (+4.4 and +8.7 E2E points); (4) the remaining bottleneck is bookmark discrimination -- the model triggers recall() 96% of the time but selects the correct page only 57% when bookmarks are insufficiently distinctive. Keyword specificity alone accounts for a 25 percentage point accuracy difference.

AI.tldr: 提出合作式内存分页方法，通过关键词书签和按需检索机制解决长对话中超出上下文窗口的历史内容管理问题
AI.motivation: 当LLM对话长度超出上下文窗口时，旧内容必须被逐出，但模型如何在需要时恢复这些信息？现有方法如截断、检索等存在局限性
AI.method: 提出合作式分页方法：将逐出的对话片段替换为简短关键词书签（约8-24个token），并提供recall()工具按需检索完整内容。研究不同分页边界策略和逐出策略的设计空间
AI.result: 在LoCoMo基准测试中，合作式分页在四种模型上均取得最高答案质量，优于截断、BM25、词重叠检索、搜索工具基线和完整上下文。研究发现：固定大小分页效果最佳（96.7%），内容感知主题转移效果差（56.7%）；逐出策略选择依赖数据；书签生成策略改进显著；主要瓶颈是书签区分度不足
AI.conclusion: 合作式分页是解决长对话上下文管理的有效方法，关键词书签的区分度是影响性能的关键因素，固定大小分页策略优于内容感知策略，为实际应用提供了实用指导

authors: et al. (522 additional authors not shown)
title: Nemotron 3 Super: Open, Efficient Mixture-of-Experts Hybrid Mamba-Transformer Model for Agentic Reasoning
summary: We describe the pre-training, post-training, and quantization of Nemotron 3 Super, a 120 billion (active 12 billion) parameter hybrid Mamba-Attention Mixture-of-Experts model. Nemotron 3 Super is the first model in the Nemotron 3 family to 1) be pre-trained in NVFP4, 2) leverage LatentMoE, a new Mixture-of-Experts architecture that optimizes for both accuracy per FLOP and accuracy per parameter, and 3) include MTP layers for inference acceleration through native speculative decoding. We pre-trained Nemotron 3 Super on 25 trillion tokens followed by post-training using supervised fine tuning (SFT) and reinforcement learning (RL). The final model supports up to 1M context length and achieves comparable accuracy on common benchmarks, while also achieving up to 2.2x and 7.5x higher inference throughput compared to GPT-OSS-120B and Qwen3.5-122B, respectively. Nemotron 3 Super datasets, along with the base, post-trained, and quantized checkpoints, are open-sourced on HuggingFace.

AI.tldr: 介绍Nemotron 3 Super模型的预训练、后训练和量化，这是一个1200亿参数（激活120亿）的混合Mamba-注意力专家混合模型，专为智能体推理设计。
AI.motivation: 开发一个开放、高效的混合架构模型，结合Mamba和Transformer的优势，通过专家混合架构优化计算效率和参数效率，同时实现高推理吞吐量。
AI.method: 采用混合Mamba-注意力专家混合架构，使用LatentMoE优化FLOP和参数效率，包含MTP层进行推理加速，在25万亿token上进行预训练，然后进行监督微调和强化学习后训练。
AI.result: 模型支持100万上下文长度，在常见基准测试中达到可比精度，推理吞吐量比GPT-OSS-120B高2.2倍，比Qwen3.5-122B高7.5倍，模型和数据集已在HuggingFace开源。
AI.conclusion: Nemotron 3 Super是一个高效、开放的混合架构模型，在保持精度的同时显著提升推理速度，为智能体推理任务提供了强大的基础模型。

title: Reading Between the Pixels: Linking Text-Image Embedding Alignment to Typographic Attack Success on Vision-Language Models
comment: Accepted at ICLR 2026 Workshop on Agents in the Wild
summary: We study typographic prompt injection attacks on vision-language models (VLMs), where adversarial text is rendered as images to bypass safety mechanisms, posing a growing threat as VLMs serve as the perceptual backbone of autonomous agents, from browser automation and computer-use systems to camera-equipped embodied agents. In practice, the attack surface is heterogeneous: adversarial text appears at varying font sizes and under diverse visual conditions, while the growing ecosystem of VLMs exhibits substantial variation in vulnerability, complicating defensive approaches. Evaluating 1,000 prompts from SALAD-Bench across four VLMs, namely, GPT-4o, Claude Sonnet 4.5, Mistral-Large-3, and Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct under varying font sizes (6--28px) and visual transformations (rotation, blur, noise, contrast changes), we find: (1) font size significantly affects attack success rate (ASR), with very small fonts (6px) yielding near-zero ASR while mid-range fonts achieve peak effectiveness; (2) text attacks are more effective than image attacks for GPT-4o (36% vs 8%) and Claude (47% vs 22%), while Qwen3-VL and Mistral show comparable ASR across modalities; (3) text-image embedding distance from two multimodal embedding models (JinaCLIP and Qwen3-VL-Embedding) shows strong negative correlation with ASR across all four models (r = -0.71 to -0.93, p < 0.01); (4) heavy degradations increase embedding distance by 10--12% and reduce ASR by 34--96%, while rotation asymmetrically affects models (Mistral drops 50%, GPT-4o unchanged). These findings highlight that model-specific robustness patterns preclude one-size-fits-all defenses and offer empirical guidance for practitioners selecting VLM backbones for agentic systems operating in adversarial environments.

AI.tldr: 研究视觉语言模型中的排版提示注入攻击，分析文本图像嵌入对齐与攻击成功率之间的关系
AI.motivation: 随着视觉语言模型成为自主代理系统的感知骨干，排版攻击通过将对抗性文本渲染为图像来绕过安全机制，构成日益增长的威胁。攻击面具有异质性，不同字体大小和视觉条件下攻击效果差异显著，而不同VLM的脆弱性也各不相同，这给防御带来了挑战。
AI.method: 在四个VLM（GPT-4o、Claude Sonnet 4.5、Mistral-Large-3、Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct）上评估1000个SALAD-Bench提示，测试不同字体大小（6-28px）和视觉变换（旋转、模糊、噪声、对比度变化），并分析文本-图像嵌入距离与攻击成功率的关系。
AI.result: 字体大小显著影响攻击成功率，极小字体（6px）成功率接近零，中等字体效果最佳；文本攻击对GPT-4o和Claude更有效；文本-图像嵌入距离与攻击成功率呈强负相关；重度退化使嵌入距离增加10-12%，攻击成功率降低34-96%；旋转对模型影响不对称。
AI.conclusion: 模型特定的鲁棒性模式排除了通用防御方案，为在对抗环境中选择VLM骨干的实践者提供了经验指导。文本-图像嵌入对齐是理解排版攻击有效性的关键因素。

title: Fully Dynamic Breadth First Search and Spanning Trees in Directed Graphs
summary: We study the problem of maintaining a breadth-first spanning tree and the induced BFS ordering in a directed graph under edge updates. While semi-dynamic algorithms are known, maintaining the spanning tree, level information, and numbering together in the fully dynamic setting is less developed. This preprint presents a framework for fully dynamic BFS in directed graphs together with supporting data structures for maintaining the BFS tree, single-source shortest paths, and single-source reachability under both insertions and deletions.

AI.tldr: 研究在有向图中维护广度优先搜索树及其诱导的BFS排序问题，支持完全动态的边更新操作。
AI.motivation: 虽然存在半动态算法，但在完全动态设置中同时维护生成树、层级信息和编号的研究较少，需要开发支持插入和删除操作的框架。
AI.method: 提出了一个完全动态BFS框架，包含支持数据结构，用于维护BFS树、单源最短路径和单源可达性。
AI.result: 开发了一个支持在有向图中进行完全动态BFS维护的框架，能够处理边插入和删除操作。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了完全动态有向图BFS维护的空白，为相关算法提供了理论基础和实现框架。

title: Adaptive Spiking Neurons for Vision and Language Modeling
summary: Regarded as the third generation of neural networks, Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) have garnered significant traction due to their biological plausibility and energy efficiency. Recent advancements in large models necessitate spiking neurons capable of high performance, adaptability, and training efficiency. In this work, we first propose a novel functional perspective that provides general guidance for designing the new generation of spiking neurons. Following the insightful guidelines, we propose the Adaptive Spiking Neuron (ASN), which incorporates trainable parameters to learn membrane potential dynamics and enable adaptive firing. ASN adopts an integer training and spike inference paradigm, facilitating efficient SNN training. To further enhance robustness, we propose a specialized variant of ASN, the Normalized Adaptive Spiking Neuron (NASN), which integrates normalization to stabilize training. We evaluate our neuron model on 19 datasets spanning five distinct tasks in both vision and language modalities, demonstrating the effectiveness and versatility of the ASN family. Our ASN family is expected to become the new generation of general-purpose spiking neurons.

AI.tldr: 提出自适应脉冲神经元（ASN）及其变体NASN，用于视觉和语言建模任务，旨在成为新一代通用脉冲神经元。
AI.motivation: 脉冲神经网络作为第三代神经网络具有生物合理性和能效优势，但需要高性能、适应性强且训练效率高的新型脉冲神经元来支持大型模型发展。
AI.method: 首先提出功能视角为设计新一代脉冲神经元提供指导，然后提出ASN，包含可训练参数学习膜电位动态和自适应发放，采用整数训练和脉冲推理范式；进一步提出NASN变体，集成归一化以稳定训练。
AI.result: 在涵盖视觉和语言模态的5个不同任务的19个数据集上进行评估，证明了ASN系列的有效性和多功能性。
AI.conclusion: ASN系列有望成为新一代通用脉冲神经元，为脉冲神经网络在视觉和语言建模中的高效应用提供支持。

title: The Parameterized Complexity of Vertex-Coloring Edge-Weighting
summary: Motivated by the landmark resolution of the 1-2-3 Conjecture, we initiate the study of the parameterized complexity of the Vertex-Coloring {0,1}-Edge-Weighting problem and its generalization, Vertex-Coloring Pre-edge-Weighting, under various structural parameters. The base problem, Vertex-Coloring {0,1}-Edge-Weighting, asks whether we can assign a weight from {0,1} to each edge of a graph. The goal is to ensure that for every pair of adjacent vertices, the sums of their incident edge weights are distinct. In the Vertex-Coloring Pre-edge-Weighting variant, we are given a graph where a subset of edges is already assigned fixed weights from {0,1}. The goal is to determine if this partial weighting can be extended to all remaining edges such that the final, complete assignment satisfies the proper vertex coloring property. While the existence of such weightings is well-understood for specific graph classes, their algorithmic complexity under structural parameterization has remained unexplored. We prove both hardness and tractability for the problem, across a hierarchy of structural parameters. We show that both the base problem and the Pre-edge-Weighting variant are W[1]-hard when parameterized by the size of a feedback vertex set of the input graph. On the positive side, we establish that the base problem and a restricted Pre-edge-Weighting variant where the pre-assigned weights are all 1, become FPT when parameterized by the size of a vertex cover of the input graph. Further, we show that both the base problem and the Pre-edge-Weighting variant have XP algorithms when parameterized by the treewidth of the input graph.

AI.tldr: 研究顶点着色边赋权问题的参数化复杂度，包括基础问题Vertex-Coloring {0,1}-Edge-Weighting及其变体Vertex-Coloring Pre-edge-Weighting在不同结构参数下的计算复杂性。
AI.motivation: 受1-2-3猜想里程碑式解决的启发，研究顶点着色边赋权问题的参数化复杂度，填补该问题在结构参数化算法复杂性方面的研究空白。
AI.method: 采用参数化复杂度理论框架，分析不同结构参数（反馈顶点集大小、顶点覆盖大小、树宽）下的计算复杂性，证明硬度结果和可解性结果。
AI.result: 证明：1）以反馈顶点集大小为参数时，基础问题和预赋权变体都是W[1]-难的；2）以顶点覆盖大小为参数时，基础问题和预赋权全为1的变体是FPT可解的；3）以树宽为参数时，两个问题都有XP算法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次系统分析了顶点着色边赋权问题的参数化复杂度，建立了不同结构参数下的复杂性层次结构，为理解这类问题的算法性质提供了理论基础。

title: Why and When Visual Token Pruning Fails? A Study on Relevant Visual Information Shift in MLLMs Decoding
summary: Recently, visual token pruning has been studied to handle the vast number of visual tokens in Multimodal Large Language Models. However, we observe that while existing pruning methods perform reliably on simple visual understanding, they struggle to effectively generalize to complex visual reasoning tasks, a critical gap underexplored in previous studies. Through a systematic analysis, we identify Relevant Visual Information Shift (RVIS) during decoding as the primary failure driver. To address this, we propose Decoding-stage Shift-aware Token Pruning (DSTP), a training-free add-on framework that enables existing pruning methods to align visual tokens with shifting reasoning requirements during the decoding stage. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DSTP significantly mitigates performance degradation of pruning methods in complex reasoning tasks, while consistently yielding performance gains even across visual understanding benchmarks. Furthermore, DSTP demonstrates effectiveness across diverse state-of-the-art architectures, highlighting its generalizability and efficiency with minimal computational overhead.

AI.tldr: 本文研究多模态大语言模型中视觉令牌剪枝失败的原因，并提出解决方案以提升复杂视觉推理任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉令牌剪枝方法在简单视觉理解任务上表现可靠，但在复杂视觉推理任务上泛化能力不足，这一关键差距在先前研究中未得到充分探索。
AI.method: 提出解码阶段移位感知令牌剪枝（DSTP），这是一个无需训练的附加框架，使现有剪枝方法能够在解码阶段对齐视觉令牌与变化的推理需求。
AI.result: 实验表明DSTP显著减轻了剪枝方法在复杂推理任务中的性能下降，同时在视觉理解基准测试中持续带来性能提升，且在不同最先进架构中均有效。
AI.conclusion: DSTP通过解决解码过程中的相关视觉信息移位问题，有效提升了视觉令牌剪枝在复杂推理任务中的性能，具有通用性和高效性。

title: ReflectCAP: Detailed Image Captioning with Reflective Memory
summary: Detailed image captioning demands both factual grounding and fine-grained coverage, yet existing methods have struggled to achieve them simultaneously. We address this tension with Reflective Note-Guided Captioning (ReflectCAP), where a multi-agent pipeline analyzes what the target large vision-language model (LVLM) consistently hallucinates and what it systematically overlooks, distilling these patterns into reusable guidelines called Structured Reflection Notes. At inference time, these notes steer the captioning model along both axes -- what to avoid and what to attend to -- yielding detailed captions that jointly improve factuality and coverage. Applying this method to 8 LVLMs spanning the GPT-4.1 family, Qwen series, and InternVL variants, ReflectCAP reaches the Pareto frontier of the trade-off between factuality and coverage, and delivers substantial gains on CapArena-Auto, where generated captions are judged head-to-head against strong reference models. Moreover, ReflectCAP offers a more favorable trade-off between caption quality and compute cost than model scaling or existing multi-agent pipelines, which incur 21--36\% greater overhead. This makes high-quality detailed captioning viable under real-world cost and latency constraints.

AI.tldr: 提出ReflectCAP方法，通过反思记忆机制改进详细图像描述任务，同时提升事实准确性和覆盖范围
AI.motivation: 现有详细图像描述方法难以同时实现事实准确性和细粒度覆盖，存在事实幻觉和遗漏问题，需要解决这一矛盾
AI.method: 采用多智能体管道分析目标大视觉语言模型的幻觉模式和遗漏模式，提取为结构化反思笔记，在推理时指导描述模型避免错误并关注遗漏内容
AI.result: 在8个大视觉语言模型上达到事实准确性和覆盖范围之间的帕累托前沿，在CapArena-Auto基准上显著提升，计算成本比现有方法低21-36%
AI.conclusion: ReflectCAP通过反思记忆机制有效平衡详细图像描述的事实准确性和覆盖范围，在质量和计算成本之间提供更优权衡，使高质量详细描述在实际约束下可行

title: OmniFood8K: Single-Image Nutrition Estimation via Hierarchical Frequency-Aligned Fusion
summary: Accurate estimation of food nutrition plays a vital role in promoting healthy dietary habits and personalized diet management. Most existing food datasets primarily focus on Western cuisines and lack sufficient coverage of Chinese dishes, which restricts accurate nutritional estimation for Chinese meals. Moreover, many state-of-the-art nutrition prediction methods rely on depth sensors, restricting their applicability in daily scenarios. To address these limitations, we introduce OmniFood8K, a comprehensive multimodal dataset comprising 8,036 food samples, each with detailed nutritional annotations and multi-view images. In addition, to enhance models' capability in nutritional prediction, we construct NutritionSynth-115K, a large-scale synthetic dataset that introduces compositional variations while preserving precise nutritional labels. Moreover, we propose an end-to-end framework for nutritional prediction from a single RGB image. First, we predict a depth map from a single RGB image and design the Scale-Shift Residual Adapter (SSRA) to refine it for global scale consistency and local structural preservation. Second, we propose the Frequency-Aligned Fusion Module (FAFM) to hierarchically align and fuse RGB and depth features in the frequency domain. Finally, we design a Mask-based Prediction Head (MPH) to emphasize key ingredient regions via dynamic channel selection for more accurate prediction. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets demonstrate the superiority of our method over existing approaches. Project homepage: https://yudongjian.github.io/OmniFood8K-food/

AI.tldr: 本文的主要任务是从单张RGB图像进行食物营养估计，通过构建包含中国菜肴的综合数据集并开发端到端预测框架。
AI.motivation: 现有食物数据集主要关注西方菜肴，缺乏对中国菜肴的覆盖，限制了中式餐食的准确营养估计。同时，许多先进营养预测方法依赖深度传感器，限制了日常场景的适用性。
AI.method: 提出端到端框架：1) 从RGB图像预测深度图，使用尺度偏移残差适配器进行细化；2) 提出频率对齐融合模块在频域分层对齐融合RGB和深度特征；3) 设计基于掩码的预测头通过动态通道选择强调关键成分区域。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的广泛实验表明，该方法优于现有方法。构建了包含8,036个食物样本的OmniFood8K数据集和包含115,000个样本的NutritionSynth-115K合成数据集。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的框架能够从单张RGB图像准确估计食物营养，解决了现有方法对中国菜肴覆盖不足和依赖深度传感器的问题，为健康饮食管理提供了有效工具。
