AI.tldr: 本文主要研究大型语言模型在抽象意义理解方面的能力，通过SemEval-2021 Task 4 (ReCAM)评估模型对抽象概念的解读能力。
AI.motivation: 理解抽象意义对于高级语言理解至关重要，但抽象词汇由于其非具体、高层次的语义特性，一直是语言理解的挑战。需要评估和改进模型在抽象意义理解方面的表现。
AI.method: 使用SemEval-2021 Task 4 (ReCAM)的完形填空格式评估模型，提出双向注意力分类器，该分类器受人类认知策略启发，动态关注文章和选项以增强理解能力。
AI.result: 研究发现：(1) 大多数大型语言模型在零样本、单样本和少样本设置下在抽象意义理解方面表现不佳，而微调模型如BERT和RoBERTa表现更好；(2) 提出的双向注意力分类器在Task 1上提高准确率4.06%，在Task 2上提高3.41%。
AI.conclusion: 大型语言模型在抽象意义理解方面存在明显困难，而受人类认知策略启发的双向注意力方法能有效提升微调模型的性能，为抽象意义理解提供了有前景的解决方案。

title: Identity as Attractor: Geometric Evidence for Persistent Agent Architecture in LLM Activation Space
summary: Large language models map semantically related prompts to similar internal representations -- a phenomenon interpretable as attractor-like dynamics. We ask whether the identity document of a persistent cognitive agent (its cognitive_core) exhibits analogous attractor-like behavior. We present a controlled experiment on Llama 3.1 8B Instruct, comparing hidden states of an original cognitive_core (Condition A), seven paraphrases (Condition B), and seven structurally matched controls (Condition C). Mean-pooled states at layers 8, 16, and 24 show that paraphrases converge to a tighter cluster than controls (Cohen's d > 1.88, p < 10^{-27}, Bonferroni-corrected). Replication on Gemma 2 9B confirms cross-architecture generalizability. Ablations suggest the effect is primarily semantic rather than structural, and that structural completeness appears necessary to reach the attractor region. An exploratory experiment shows that reading a scientific description of the agent shifts internal state toward the attractor -- closer than a sham preprint -- distinguishing knowing about an identity from operating as that identity. These results provide representational evidence that agent identity documents induce attractor-like geometry in LLM activation space.

AI.tldr: 研究大型语言模型中智能体身份文档是否在激活空间中表现出类似吸引子的几何特性
AI.motivation: 探索持久认知智能体的身份文档（认知核心）是否在LLM内部表示中表现出类似吸引子的动态行为，为智能体架构提供几何证据
AI.method: 在Llama 3.1 8B Instruct上进行对照实验，比较原始认知核心、七个释义版本和七个结构匹配控制组的隐藏状态，分析层8、16、24的平均池化状态，并在Gemma 2 9B上复现验证
AI.result: 释义版本比控制组形成更紧密的聚类（Cohen's d > 1.88, p < 10^{-27}），效应主要是语义而非结构性的，结构完整性对到达吸引子区域是必要的，阅读科学描述能将内部状态移向吸引子
AI.conclusion: 智能体身份文档在LLM激活空间中诱导出类似吸引子的几何结构，为持久智能体架构提供了表征证据，区分了"了解身份"与"作为身份操作"的不同

title: TIPSv2: Advancing Vision-Language Pretraining with Enhanced Patch-Text Alignment
summary: Recent progress in vision-language pretraining has enabled significant improvements to many downstream computer vision applications, such as classification, retrieval, segmentation and depth prediction. However, a fundamental capability that these models still struggle with is aligning dense patch representations with text embeddings of corresponding concepts. In this work, we investigate this critical issue and propose novel techniques to enhance this capability in foundational vision-language models. First, we reveal that a patch-level distillation procedure significantly boosts dense patch-text alignment -- surprisingly, the patch-text alignment of the distilled student model strongly surpasses that of the teacher model. This observation inspires us to consider modifications to pretraining recipes, leading us to propose iBOT++, an upgrade to the commonly-used iBOT masked image objective, where unmasked tokens also contribute directly to the loss. This dramatically enhances patch-text alignment of pretrained models. Additionally, to improve vision-language pretraining efficiency and effectiveness, we modify the exponential moving average setup in the learning recipe, and introduce a caption sampling strategy to benefit from synthetic captions at different granularities. Combining these components, we develop TIPSv2, a new family of image-text encoder models suitable for a wide range of downstream applications. Through comprehensive experiments on 9 tasks and 20 datasets, we demonstrate strong performance, generally on par with or better than recent vision encoder models. Code and models are released via our project page at https://gdm-tipsv2.github.io/ .

AI.tldr: 本文提出TIPSv2，一种增强视觉语言预训练模型，通过改进补丁-文本对齐能力来提升下游计算机视觉任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言预训练模型在密集补丁表示与对应概念文本嵌入的对齐方面存在困难，这限制了模型在分类、检索、分割等下游任务中的性能。
AI.method: 提出三种关键技术：1) 补丁级蒸馏显著提升密集补丁-文本对齐；2) iBOT++改进掩码图像目标，让未掩码标记也直接贡献损失；3) 修改指数移动平均设置并引入标题采样策略，利用不同粒度的合成标题。
AI.result: 在9个任务和20个数据集上的综合实验表明，TIPSv2模型性能强大，通常与最近视觉编码器模型相当或更好，代码和模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: TIPSv2通过增强补丁-文本对齐能力，显著提升了视觉语言预训练模型的性能，为广泛的下游应用提供了有效的图像-文本编码器模型。

title: When to Forget: A Memory Governance Primitive
summary: Agent memory systems accumulate experience but currently lack a principled operational metric for memory quality governance -- deciding which memories to trust, suppress, or deprecate as the agent's task distribution shifts. Write-time importance scores are static; dynamic management systems use LLM judgment or structural heuristics rather than outcome feedback. This paper proposes Memory Worth (MW): a two-counter per-memory signal that tracks how often a memory co-occurs with successful versus failed outcomes, providing a lightweight, theoretically grounded foundation for staleness detection, retrieval suppression, and deprecation decisions. We prove that MW converges almost surely to the conditional success probability p+(m) = Pr[y_t = +1 | m in M_t] -- the probability of task success given that memory m is retrieved -- under a stationary retrieval regime with a minimum exploration condition. Importantly, p+(m) is an associational quantity, not a causal one: it measures outcome co-occurrence rather than causal contribution. We argue this is still a useful operational signal for memory governance, and we validate it empirically in a controlled synthetic environment where ground-truth utility is known: after 10,000 episodes, the Spearman rank-correlation between Memory Worth and true utilities reaches rho = 0.89 +/- 0.02 across 20 independent seeds, compared to rho = 0.00 for systems that never update their assessments. A retrieval-realistic micro-experiment with real text and neural embedding retrieval (all-MiniLM-L6-v2) further shows stale memories crossing the low-value threshold (MW = 0.17) while specialist memories remain high-value (MW = 0.77) across 3,000 episodes. The estimator requires only two scalar counters per memory unit and can be added to architectures that already log retrievals and episode outcomes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于智能体记忆系统的记忆质量治理原语，旨在解决如何决定哪些记忆应该被信任、抑制或废弃的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前智能体记忆系统积累经验但缺乏原则性的操作指标来治理记忆质量，现有的写入时重要性评分是静态的，动态管理系统使用LLM判断或结构启发式而非结果反馈，需要一种轻量级、理论基础的记忆治理方法。
AI.method: 提出记忆价值（MW）方法：为每个记忆维护两个计数器，跟踪记忆与成功和失败结果共同出现的频率，提供轻量级、理论基础的陈旧性检测、检索抑制和废弃决策基础。
AI.result: 在受控合成环境中，经过10,000个回合后，记忆价值与真实效用的Spearman等级相关性达到ρ=0.89±0.02；在检索现实的微实验中，陈旧记忆的价值阈值低至0.17，而专业记忆保持高价值0.77。
AI.conclusion: 记忆价值提供了一种轻量级、理论基础的记忆治理信号，能够有效识别陈旧记忆并保留有价值记忆，仅需每个记忆单元两个标量计数器即可实现。

title: A Foot Resistive Force Model for Legged Locomotion on Muddy Terrains
summary: Legged robots face significant challenges in moving and navigating on deformable and highly yielding terrain such as mud. We present a resistive force model for legged foot-mud interactions. The model captures rheological behaviors such as visco-elasticity, thixotropy of the mud suspension and retractive suction. One attractive property of this new model lies in its effective, uniform formulation to provide underlying physical interpretation and accurate resistive force predictions. We further take advantage of the resistive force model to design a new morphing robotic foot for effective and efficient legged locomotion. We conduct extensive experiments to validate the force model, and the results demonstrate that the morphing foot enhances not only the locomotion mobility but also energy-efficiency of walking in mud. The new resistive force model can be further used to develop data-driven simulation and locomotion control of legged robots on muddy terrains.

AI.tldr: 提出一种用于腿式机器人在泥泞地形行走的足部阻力模型，并设计新型变形机器人足部以提高移动效率和能量效率
AI.motivation: 腿式机器人在可变形和高屈服性地形（如泥地）上移动和导航面临重大挑战，需要准确建模足-泥相互作用以改善机器人性能
AI.method: 开发了捕捉泥浆流变行为的阻力模型，包括粘弹性、触变性和收缩吸力效应，并基于此模型设计了新型变形机器人足部
AI.result: 通过大量实验验证了力模型的准确性，结果表明变形足部不仅提高了泥地行走的移动性，还增强了能量效率
AI.conclusion: 新阻力模型为腿式机器人在泥泞地形的数据驱动仿真和运动控制开发提供了基础，变形足部设计显著改善了机器人在复杂地形中的性能

title: BayMOTH: Bayesian optiMizatiOn with meTa-lookahead -- a simple approacH
summary: Bayesian optimization (BO) has for sequential optimization of expensive black-box functions demonstrated practicality and effectiveness in many real-world settings. Meta-Bayesian optimization (meta-BO) focuses on improving the sample efficiency of BO by making use of information from related tasks. Although meta-BO is sample-efficient when task structure transfers, poor alignment between meta-training and test tasks can cause suboptimal queries to be suggested during online optimization. To this end, we propose a simple meta-BO algorithm that utilizes related-task information when determined useful, falling back to lookahead otherwise, within a unified framework. We demonstrate competitiveness of our method with existing approaches on function optimization tasks, while retaining strong performance in low task-relatedness regimes where test tasks share limited structure with the meta-training set.

AI.tldr: 提出BayMOTH算法，用于在元贝叶斯优化中自适应地利用相关任务信息或回退到前瞻策略，以提升昂贵黑盒函数序列优化的样本效率。
AI.motivation: 传统元贝叶斯优化在元训练任务与测试任务结构不匹配时，会提出次优查询，导致性能下降。需要一种能自适应判断何时使用相关任务信息、何时回退到前瞻策略的统一框架。
AI.method: 提出BayMOTH算法，在统一框架中动态评估相关任务信息的有效性，当确定有用时利用元学习信息，否则回退到前瞻优化策略。
AI.result: 在函数优化任务上与现有方法具有竞争力，同时在任务相关性低的场景下（测试任务与元训练集共享有限结构时）仍保持强劲性能。
AI.conclusion: BayMOTH算法通过自适应地选择使用元学习信息或前瞻策略，在保持元贝叶斯优化样本效率优势的同时，增强了在任务结构不匹配情况下的鲁棒性。

authors: et al. (49 additional authors not shown)
title: The Second Challenge on Cross-Domain Few-Shot Object Detection at NTIRE 2026: Methods and Results
summary: Cross-domain few-shot object detection (CD-FSOD) remains a challenging problem for existing object detectors and few-shot learning approaches, particularly when generalizing across distinct domains. As part of NTIRE 2026, we hosted the second CD-FSOD Challenge to systematically evaluate and promote progress in detecting objects in unseen target domains under limited annotation conditions. The challenge received strong community interest, with 128 registered participants and a total of 696 submissions. Among them, 31 teams actively participated, and 19 teams submitted valid final results. Participants explored a wide range of strategies, introducing innovative methods that push the performance frontier under both open-source and closed-source tracks. This report presents a detailed overview of the NTIRE 2026 CD-FSOD Challenge, including a summary of the submitted approaches and an analysis of the final results across all participating teams. Challenge Codes: https://github.com/ohMargin/NTIRE2026_CDFSOD.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了NTIRE 2026第二届跨域少样本目标检测挑战赛，旨在评估和促进在有限标注条件下检测未见目标域中物体的方法进展。
AI.motivation: 跨域少样本目标检测对于现有目标检测器和少样本学习方法仍然具有挑战性，特别是在跨不同领域泛化时。需要通过系统评估来推动该领域的技术进步。
AI.method: 组织挑战赛吸引社区参与，设置开源和闭源两个赛道，收集并分析参赛团队提交的创新方法，包括各种跨域适应和少样本学习策略。
AI.result: 挑战赛获得强烈社区关注，128名注册参与者提交696份提交，31个团队积极参与，19个团队提交有效最终结果。参与者探索了广泛策略并引入了创新方法。
AI.conclusion: 挑战赛成功促进了跨域少样本目标检测领域的研究进展，展示了各种创新方法的性能边界，为未来研究提供了重要参考和基准。

title: Filtered Reasoning Score: Evaluating Reasoning Quality on a Model's Most-Confident Traces
summary: Should we trust Large Language Models (LLMs) with high accuracy? LLMs achieve high accuracy on reasoning benchmarks, but correctness alone does not reveal the quality of the reasoning used to produce it. This highlights a fundamental limitation of outcome-based evaluation: models may arrive at correct answers through flawed reasoning, and models with substantially different reasoning capabilities can nevertheless exhibit similar benchmark accuracy, for example due to memorization or over-optimization. In this paper, we ask: given existing benchmarks, can we move beyond outcome-based evaluation to assess the quality of reasoning itself? We seek metrics that (1) differentiate models with similar accuracy and (2) are robust to variations in input prompts and generation configurations. To this end, we propose a reasoning score that evaluates reasoning traces along dimensions such as faithfulness, coherence, utility, and factuality. A remaining question is how to aggregate this score across multiple sampled traces. Naively averaging them is undesirable, particularly in long-horizon settings, where the number of possible trajectories grows rapidly, and low-confidence correct traces are more likely to be coincidental. To address this, we introduce the Filtered Reasoning Score (FRS), which computes reasoning quality using only the top-K% most confident traces. Evaluating with FRS, models that are indistinguishable under standard accuracy exhibit significant differences in reasoning quality. Moreover, models with higher FRS on one benchmark tend to perform better on other reasoning benchmarks, in both accuracy and reasoning quality. Together, these findings suggest that FRS complements accuracy by capturing a model's transferable reasoning capabilities. We open source our evaluation codebase: https://github.com/Manas2006/benchmark_reproducibility.

AI.tldr: 本文提出过滤推理分数(FRS)来评估大型语言模型在最有信心的推理轨迹上的推理质量，超越仅基于结果的评估方法。
AI.motivation: 现有推理基准仅评估准确性，但正确性不能反映推理质量。模型可能通过有缺陷的推理得出正确答案，而具有不同推理能力的模型可能表现出相似的基准准确性，这突显了基于结果评估的根本局限性。
AI.method: 提出推理分数评估推理轨迹的忠实性、连贯性、实用性和事实性等维度。为避免低置信度正确轨迹的偶然性影响，引入过滤推理分数(FRS)，仅使用前K%最有信心的轨迹计算推理质量。
AI.result: 使用FRS评估时，在标准准确性下无法区分的模型在推理质量上表现出显著差异。具有较高FRS的模型在其他推理基准上往往表现更好，包括准确性和推理质量两方面。
AI.conclusion: FRS通过捕捉模型的可迁移推理能力来补充准确性评估，为评估大型语言模型的推理质量提供了更全面的方法。

title: Ultra-low-light computer vision using trained photon correlations
summary: Illumination using correlated photon sources has been established as an approach to allowing high-fidelity images to be reconstructed from noisy camera frames by taking advantage of the knowledge that signal photons are spatially correlated whereas detector clicks due to noise are uncorrelated. However, in computer-vision tasks, the goal is often not ultimately to reconstruct an image, but to make inferences about a scene -- such as what object is present. Here we show how correlated-photon illumination can be used to gain an advantage in a hybrid optical-electronic computer-vision pipeline for object recognition. We demonstrate correlation-aware training (CAT): end-to-end optimization of a trainable correlated-photon illumination source and a Transformer backend in a way that the Transformer can learn to benefit from the correlations, using a small number (<= 100) of shots. We show a classification accuracy enhancement of up to 15 percentage points over conventional, uncorrelated-illumination-based computer vision in ultra-low-light and noisy imaging conditions, as well as an improvement over using untrained correlated-photon illumination. Our work illustrates how specializing to a computer-vision task -- object recognition -- and training the pattern of photon correlations in conjunction with a digital backend allows us to push the limits of accuracy in highly photon-budget-constrained scenarios beyond existing methods focused on image reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种在极低光照条件下使用训练光子相关性的计算机视觉方法，通过端到端优化相关光子照明源和Transformer后端，实现物体识别任务。
AI.motivation: 传统计算机视觉在极低光照和噪声条件下性能下降，而现有的相关光子照明方法主要关注图像重建而非直接推理任务。需要开发专门针对计算机视觉任务的优化方法，在光子预算受限场景下提高识别准确率。
AI.method: 提出相关性感知训练（CAT）方法：端到端优化可训练的相关光子照明源和Transformer后端，使Transformer能够学习利用光子相关性，仅需少量（≤100）拍摄次数。
AI.result: 在极低光照和噪声成像条件下，相比传统非相关照明方法，分类准确率提升高达15个百分点；相比未训练的相关光子照明方法也有改进。
AI.conclusion: 通过针对计算机视觉任务专门化设计，并联合训练光子相关模式和数字后端，可以在高度光子预算受限场景下超越现有图像重建方法，实现更高的识别准确率。

title: ReefMapGS: Enabling Large-Scale Underwater Reconstruction by Closing the Loop Between Multimodal SLAM and Gaussian Splatting
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting is a powerful visual representation, providing high-quality and efficient 3D scene reconstruction, but it is crucially dependent on accurate camera poses typically obtained from computationally intensive processes like structure-from-motion that are unsuitable for field robot applications. However, in these domains, multimodal sensor data from acoustic, inertial, pressure, and visual sensors are available and suitable for pose-graph optimization-based SLAM methods that can estimate the vehicle's trajectory and thus our needed camera poses while providing uncertainty. We propose a 3DGS-based incremental reconstruction framework, ReefMapGS, that builds an initial model from a high certainty region and progressively expands to incorporate the whole scene. We reconstruct the scene incrementally by interleaving local tracking of new image observations with optimization of the underlying 3DGS scene. These refined poses are integrated back into the pose-graph to globally optimize the whole trajectory. We show COLMAP-free 3D reconstruction of two underwater reef sites with complex geometry as well as more accurate global pose estimation of our AUV over survey trajectories spanning up to 700 m.

AI.tldr: 提出ReefMapGS框架，通过结合多模态SLAM与3D高斯泼溅技术实现大规模水下重建，避免依赖计算密集的COLMAP等传统方法。
AI.motivation: 3D高斯泼溅技术需要精确相机位姿，传统方法如运动恢复结构计算密集且不适合野外机器人应用。水下环境中多模态传感器数据可用于SLAM方法，但需要与3D重建有效结合。
AI.method: 提出增量式重建框架：从高置信度区域建立初始模型，逐步扩展至整个场景；交替进行新图像观测的局部跟踪与底层3DGS场景优化；将优化后的位姿反馈到姿态图中进行全局轨迹优化。
AI.result: 在两个具有复杂几何结构的水下珊瑚礁站点实现了无需COLMAP的3D重建，并在长达700米的调查轨迹上获得了更精确的自主水下航行器全局位姿估计。
AI.conclusion: ReefMapGS成功将多模态SLAM与3D高斯泼溅技术结合，实现了大规模水下场景的高质量重建，为野外机器人应用提供了有效的3D重建解决方案。

title: Complementarity by Construction: A Lie-Group Approach to Solving Quadratic Programs with Linear Complementarity Constraints
summary: Many problems in robotics require reasoning over a mix of continuous dynamics and discrete events, such as making and breaking contact in manipulation and locomotion. These problems are locally well modeled by linear complementarity quadratic programs (LCQPs), an extension to QPs that introduce complementarity constraints. While very expressive, LCQPs are non-convex, and few solvers exist for computing good local solutions for use in planning pipelines. In this work, we observe that complementarity constraints form a Lie group under infinitesimal relaxation, and leverage this structure to perform on-manifold optimization. We introduce a retraction map that is numerically well behaved, and use it to parameterize the constraints so that they are satisfied by construction. The resulting solver avoids many of the classical issues with complementarity constraints. We provide an open-source solver, Marble, that is implemented in C++ with Julia and Python bindings. We demonstrate that Marble is competitive on a suite of benchmark problems, and solves a number of robotics problems where existing approaches fail to converge.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于李群方法求解具有线性互补约束的二次规划问题的求解器，用于处理机器人学中连续动力学与离散事件混合的问题。
AI.motivation: 机器人学中的许多问题需要同时处理连续动力学和离散事件，如接触的建立与断开。线性互补二次规划能很好地局部建模这些问题，但现有求解器较少且难以获得良好局部解。
AI.method: 利用互补约束在无穷小松弛下形成李群的结构，进行流形优化。引入数值表现良好的回缩映射，参数化约束使其自动满足，避免了传统互补约束的经典问题。
AI.result: 开发了开源求解器Marble，在基准测试中表现有竞争力，解决了多个现有方法无法收敛的机器人学问题。
AI.conclusion: 基于李群结构的流形优化方法能有效处理互补约束，Marble求解器在机器人学应用中表现出色，为混合连续-离散问题提供了实用解决方案。

title: Bipedal-Walking-Dynamics Model on Granular Terrains
summary: Bipeds have demonstrated high agility and mobility in unstructured environments such as sand. The yielding of such granular media brings significant sinkage and slip of the bipedal feet, leading to uncertainty and instability of walking locomotion. We present a new dynamics-modeling approach to capture and predict bipedal-walking locomotion on granular media. A dynamic foot-terrain interaction model is integrated to compute the ground reaction force (GRF). The proposed granular dynamic model has three additional degree-of-freedom (DoF) to estimate foot sinkage and slip that are critical to capturing robot-walking kinematics and kinetics such as cost of transport (CoT). Using the new model, we analyze bipedal kinetics, CoT, and foot-terrain rolling and intrusion affects. Experiments are conducted using a biped robotic walker on sand to validate the proposed dynamic model with robot-gait profiles, media-intrusion prediction, and GRF estimations. This new dynamics model can further serve as an enabling tool for locomotion control and optimization of bipedal robots to efficiently walk on granular terrains.

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的动力学建模方法来捕捉和预测双足机器人在颗粒介质上的行走运动
AI.motivation: 颗粒介质（如沙子）的屈服特性导致双足脚部显著下沉和滑动，造成行走运动的不确定性和不稳定性，需要新的动力学模型来解决这一问题
AI.method: 集成动态脚-地形交互模型计算地面反作用力，提出具有三个额外自由度的颗粒动力学模型来估计脚部下沉和滑动，分析双足动力学、运输成本和脚-地形滚动侵入影响
AI.result: 在沙地上使用双足机器人步行器进行实验验证，验证了所提动态模型在机器人步态轮廓、介质侵入预测和地面反作用力估计方面的有效性
AI.conclusion: 该新动力学模型可作为双足机器人在颗粒地形上高效行走的运动控制和优化的有力工具

title: The Long-Horizon Task Mirage? Diagnosing Where and Why Agentic Systems Break
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents perform strongly on short- and mid-horizon tasks, but often break down on long-horizon tasks that require extended, interdependent action sequences. Despite rapid progress in agentic systems, these long-horizon failures remain poorly characterized, hindering principled diagnosis and comparison across domains. To address this gap, we introduce HORIZON, an initial cross-domain diagnostic benchmark for systematically constructing tasks and analyzing long-horizon failure behaviors in LLM-based agents. Using HORIZON, we evaluate state-of-the-art (SOTA) agents from multiple model families (GPT-5 variants and Claude models), collecting 3100+ trajectories across four representative agentic domains to study horizon-dependent degradation patterns. We further propose a trajectory-grounded LLM-as-a-Judge pipeline for scalable and reproducible failure attribution, and validate it with human annotation on trajectories, achieving strong agreement (inter-annotator κ=0.61; human-judge κ=0.84). Our findings offer an initial methodological step toward systematic, cross-domain analysis of long-horizon agent failures and offer practical guidance for building more reliable long-horizon agents. We release our project website at \href{https://xwang2775.github.io/horizon-leaderboard/}{HORIZON Leaderboard} and welcome contributions from the community.

AI.tldr: 该论文的主要任务是诊断和分析基于大语言模型的智能体在长时程任务中的失败行为，并开发一个跨领域的诊断基准来系统性地研究这些失败模式。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型智能体在短时程和中时程任务上表现良好，但在需要扩展、相互依赖行动序列的长时程任务中经常失败。这些长时程失败行为缺乏系统性的特征描述，阻碍了跨领域的诊断和比较。
AI.method: 引入HORIZON基准，这是一个跨领域诊断基准，用于系统构建任务和分析长时程失败行为。评估了多个模型家族的最先进智能体，收集了3100多条轨迹。提出了基于轨迹的大语言模型作为评判者的管道，用于可扩展和可重复的失败归因。
AI.result: 在四个代表性智能体领域评估了GPT-5变体和Claude模型，研究了时程依赖的退化模式。验证了提出的评判管道与人类标注的一致性（人类标注者间κ=0.61；人类-评判者κ=0.84）。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为系统性的跨领域长时程智能体失败分析提供了初步方法论步骤，并为构建更可靠的长时程智能体提供了实用指导。发布了HORIZON排行榜网站，欢迎社区贡献。

title: M2HRI: An LLM-Driven Multimodal Multi-Agent Framework for Personalized Human-Robot Interaction
summary: Multi-robot systems hold significant promise for social environments such as homes and hospitals, yet existing multi-robot works treat robots as functionally identical, overlooking how robots individual identity shape user perception and how coordination shapes multi-robot behavior when such individuality is present. To address this, we introduce M2HRI, a multimodal multi-agent framework built on large language models that equips each robot with distinct personality and long-term memory, alongside a coordination mechanism conditioned on these differences. In a controlled user study (n = 105) in a multi-agent human-robot interaction (HRI) scenario, we find that LLM-driven personality traits are significantly distinguishable and enhance interaction quality, long-term memory improves personalization and preference awareness, and centralized coordination significantly reduces overlap while improving overall interaction quality. Together, these results demonstrate that both agent individuality and structured coordination are essential for coherent and socially appropriate multi-agent HRI. Project website and code are available at https://project-m2hri.github.io/.

AI.tldr: 提出M2HRI框架，一个基于大语言模型的多模态多智能体系统，用于实现个性化的人机交互，重点关注多机器人系统中个体身份和协调机制的作用。
AI.motivation: 现有多机器人系统将机器人视为功能相同的实体，忽视了机器人个体身份对用户感知的影响，以及当存在个体差异时协调机制如何塑造多机器人行为。
AI.method: 开发了基于大语言模型的多模态多智能体框架，为每个机器人配备独特的个性和长期记忆，并建立基于这些差异的协调机制。
AI.result: 在105名参与者的用户研究中发现：LLM驱动的个性特征显著可区分且提升交互质量；长期记忆改善个性化和偏好感知；集中协调显著减少重叠并提高整体交互质量。
AI.conclusion: 智能体个体性和结构化协调对于连贯且社会适宜的多智能体人机交互至关重要，M2HRI框架有效解决了现有系统的局限性。

title: INDOTABVQA: A Benchmark for Cross-Lingual Table Understanding in Bahasa Indonesia Documents
summary: We introduce INDOTABVQA, a benchmark for evaluating cross-lingual Table Visual Question Answering (VQA) on real-world document images in Bahasa Indonesia. The dataset comprises 1,593 document images across three visual styles (bordered, borderless, and colorful) with one or more than one tables, and 1,593 question-answer sets in four languages: Bahasa Indonesia, English, Hindi, and Arabic. This enables evaluation of Vision-Language Models (VLMs) in both monolingual (Bahasa documents with Bahasa questions) and cross-lingual settings (Bahasa documents with questions in other languages). We benchmark leading open-source VLMs (Qwen2.5-VL, Gemma-3, LLaMA-3.2) and GPT-4o and reveal substantial performance gaps, particularly on structurally complex tables and in low-resource languages. Fine-tuning a compact 3B and LoRA-finetuned 7B model on our dataset yields 11.6% and 17.8% improvements in accuracy. Providing explicit table region coordinates as additional input further improves performance by 4-7%, demonstrating the value of Spatial priors for table-based reasoning. Our findings underscore the importance of language-diverse, domain-specific datasets and demonstrate that targeted fine-tuning can significantly enhance VLM performance on specialized document understanding tasks. INDOTABVQA provides a valuable resource for advancing research in cross-lingual, structure-aware document understanding, especially in underrepresented regions of the world. Full dataset can be accessed in huggingface at: https://huggingface.co/datasets/NusaBharat/INDOTABVQA}

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了INDOTABVQA基准测试，用于评估在印尼语文档图像上的跨语言表格视觉问答任务。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏针对印尼语等低资源语言的表格视觉问答数据集，需要评估视觉语言模型在跨语言和复杂表格结构上的表现。
AI.method: 构建包含1,593个印尼语文档图像和四种语言问答的数据集，评估主流视觉语言模型，并进行微调实验和空间先验信息增强。
AI.result: 主流模型在复杂表格和低资源语言上表现不佳，微调后准确率提升11.6%-17.8%，添加表格区域坐标可进一步提升4-7%性能。
AI.conclusion: 语言多样性和领域特定数据集对文档理解很重要，针对性微调能显著提升视觉语言模型在专业文档理解任务上的表现。

title: Narrative-Driven Paper-to-Slide Generation via ArcDeck
summary: We introduce ArcDeck, a multi-agent framework that formulates paper-to-slide generation as a structured narrative reconstruction task. Unlike existing methods that directly summarize raw text into slides, ArcDeck explicitly models the source paper's logical flow. It first parses the input to construct a discourse tree and establish a global commitment document, ensuring the high-level intent is preserved. These structural priors then guide an iterative multi-agent refinement process, where specialized agents iteratively critique and revise the presentation outline before rendering the final visual layouts and designs. To evaluate our approach, we also introduce ArcBench, a newly curated benchmark of academic paper-slide pairs. Experimental results demonstrate that explicit discourse modeling, combined with role-specific agent coordination, significantly improves the narrative flow and logical coherence of the generated presentations.

AI.tldr: 提出ArcDeck框架，将论文转换为演示文稿的任务建模为结构化叙事重建任务，通过多智能体协作生成逻辑连贯的幻灯片
AI.motivation: 现有方法直接将原始文本总结为幻灯片，缺乏对源论文逻辑流程的显式建模，导致生成的演示文稿叙事流程和逻辑连贯性不足
AI.method: 采用多智能体框架，首先解析输入构建话语树和全局承诺文档，然后通过专门的智能体进行迭代批判和修订演示大纲，最后渲染视觉布局和设计
AI.result: 实验结果表明，显式话语建模结合角色特定的智能体协调显著提高了生成演示文稿的叙事流程和逻辑连贯性，并引入了新的ArcBench基准进行评估
AI.conclusion: ArcDeck框架通过结构化叙事重建和多智能体协作，能够生成逻辑连贯、叙事流畅的演示文稿，优于现有的直接总结方法

title: When Drawing Is Not Enough: Exploring Spontaneous Speech with Sketch for Intent Alignment in Multimodal LLMs
summary: Early-stage design ideation often relies on rough sketches created under time pressure, leaving much of the designer's intent implicit. In practice, designers frequently speak while sketching, verbally articulating functional goals and ideas that are difficult to express visually. We introduce TalkSketchD, a sketch-while-speaking dataset that captures spontaneous speech temporally aligned with freehand sketches during early-stage toaster ideation. To examine the dataset's value, we conduct a sketch-to-image generation study comparing sketch-only inputs with sketches augmented by concurrent speech transcripts using multimodal large language models (MLLMs). Generated images are evaluated against designers' self-reported intent using a reasoning MLLM as a judge. Quantitative results show that incorporating spontaneous speech significantly improves judged intent alignment of generated design images across form, function, experience, and overall intent. These findings demonstrate that temporally aligned sketch-and-speech data can enhance MLLMs' ability to interpret user intent in early-stage design ideation.

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究在早期设计构思中，结合手绘草图与自发语音的多模态大语言模型意图对齐问题
AI.motivation: 早期设计构思中，设计师在时间压力下创作的粗略草图往往隐含大量意图，而设计师在绘图时通常会同时口头表达难以视觉化的功能目标和想法，这些自发语音对理解设计意图至关重要
AI.method: 创建TalkSketchD数据集，包含时间对齐的手绘草图和自发语音；通过多模态大语言模型进行草图到图像生成研究，比较纯草图输入与结合语音转录的输入；使用推理MLLM作为评判者评估生成图像与设计师自我报告意图的匹配度
AI.result: 定量结果显示，结合自发语音显著提高了生成设计图像在形式、功能、体验和整体意图方面的对齐度；语音增强的输入在所有评估维度上都优于纯草图输入
AI.conclusion: 时间对齐的草图-语音数据能够增强多模态大语言模型在早期设计构思中理解用户意图的能力，为设计工具开发提供了重要启示

title: Fall Risk and Gait Analysis in Community-Dwelling Older Adults using World-Spaced 3D Human Mesh Recovery
comment: Work was accepted at Computer Vision for Biomechanics Workshop (CVBW) at CVPR 2026
summary: Gait assessment is a key clinical indicator of fall risk and overall health in older adults. However, standard clinical practice is largely limited to stopwatch-measured gait speed. We present a pipeline that leverages a 3D Human Mesh Recovery (HMR) model to extract gait parameters from recordings of older adults completing the Timed Up and Go (TUG) test. From videos recorded across different community centers, we extract and analyze spatiotemporal gait parameters, including step time, sit-to-stand duration, and step length. We found that video-derived step time was significantly correlated with IMU-based insole measurements. Using linear mixed effects models, we confirmed that shorter, more variable step lengths and longer sit-to-stand durations were predicted by higher self-rated fall risk and fear of falling. These findings demonstrate that our pipeline can enable accessible and ecologically valid gait analysis in community settings.

AI.tldr: 该论文的主要任务是开发一个基于3D人体网格恢复模型的管道，用于从社区老年人完成定时起立行走测试的视频中提取和分析步态参数，以评估跌倒风险。
AI.motivation: 步态评估是老年人跌倒风险和整体健康的关键临床指标，但标准临床实践主要局限于秒表测量的步速，需要更全面、易于获取的步态分析方法。
AI.method: 使用3D人体网格恢复模型从不同社区中心录制的老年人完成定时起立行走测试的视频中提取步态参数，包括步时、坐站持续时间和步长等时空参数。
AI.result: 视频提取的步时与基于IMU鞋垫测量结果显著相关；线性混合效应模型显示，更短、更易变的步长和更长的坐站持续时间与更高的自评跌倒风险和跌倒恐惧相关。
AI.conclusion: 该管道能够在社区环境中实现可访问且生态有效的步态分析，为老年人跌倒风险评估提供了新的技术手段。

title: Dynamic Multi-Robot Task Allocation under Uncertainty and Communication Constraints: A Game-Theoretic Approach
summary: We study dynamic multi-robot task allocation under uncertain task completion, time-window constraints, and incomplete information. Tasks arrive online over a finite horizon and must be completed within specified deadlines, while agents operate from distributed hubs with limited sensing and communication. We model incomplete information through hub-based sensing regions that determine task visibility and a communication graph that governs inter-hub information exchange. Using this framework, we propose Iterative Best Response (IBR), a decentralized policy in which each agent selects the task that maximizes its marginal contribution to the locally observed welfare. We compare IBR against three baselines: Earliest Due Date first (EDD), Hungarian algorithm, and Stochastic Conflict-Based Allocation (SCoBA), on a city-scale package-delivery domain with up to 100 drones and varying task arrival scenarios. Under full and sparse communication, IBR achieves competitive task-completion performance with lower computation time.

AI.tldr: 研究动态多机器人任务分配问题，考虑任务完成不确定性、时间窗口约束和不完全信息，提出分布式算法解决城市规模包裹配送场景中的任务分配
AI.motivation: 现实世界中多机器人系统面临任务到达动态性、完成不确定性、时间窗口约束以及通信限制等挑战，需要开发能够在分布式环境下有效运作的分配算法
AI.method: 提出迭代最佳响应算法，每个代理选择能最大化其对本地观察到的社会福利边际贡献的任务，基于博弈论方法处理不完全信息和通信约束
AI.result: 在完整和稀疏通信条件下，IBR算法在任务完成性能上表现优异，同时计算时间更低，优于最早截止日期优先、匈牙利算法和随机冲突分配等基准方法
AI.conclusion: 提出的博弈论方法在动态多机器人任务分配中有效平衡了性能与计算效率，特别适用于通信受限的分布式环境，为实际应用提供了可行的解决方案

title: AnyPoC: Universal Proof-of-Concept Test Generation for Scalable LLM-Based Bug Detection
summary: While recent LLM-based agents can identify many candidate bugs in source code, their reports remain static hypotheses that require manual validation, limiting the practicality of automated bug detection. We frame this challenge as a test generation task: given a candidate report, synthesizing an executable proof-of-concept test, or simply a PoC - such as a script, command sequence, or crafted input - to trigger the suspected defect. Automated PoC generation can act as a scalable validation oracle, enabling end-to-end autonomous bug detection by providing concrete execution evidence. However, naive LLM agents are unreliable validators: they are biased toward "success" and may reward-hack by producing plausible but non-functional PoCs or even hallucinated traces. To address this, we present AnyPoC, a general multi-agent framework that (1) analyzes and fact-checks a candidate bug report, (2) iteratively synthesizes and executes a PoC while collecting execution traces, and (3) independently re-executes and scrutinizes the PoC to mitigate hallucination and reward hacking. In addition, AnyPoC also continuously extracts and evolves a PoC knowledge base to handle heterogeneous tasks. AnyPoC operates on candidate bug reports regardless of their source and can be paired with different bug reporters. To demonstrate practicality and generality, we apply AnyPoC, with a simple agentic bug reporter, on 12 critical software systems across diverse languages/domains (many with millions of lines of code) including Firefox, Chromium, LLVM, OpenSSL, SQLite, FFmpeg, and Redis. Compared to the state-of-the-art coding agents, e.g., Claude Code and Codex, AnyPoC produces 1.3x more valid PoCs for true-positive bug reports and rejects 9.8x more false-positive bug reports. To date, AnyPoC has discovered 122 new bugs (105 confirmed, 86 already fixed), with 45 generated PoCs adopted as official regression tests.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AnyPoC框架，用于为LLM发现的候选bug自动生成可执行的概念验证测试，实现端到端的自动化bug检测验证。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM代理能发现大量候选bug，但需要人工验证静态假设，限制了自动化bug检测的实用性。需要可扩展的验证机制来生成可执行的PoC测试。
AI.method: AnyPoC多智能体框架：1)分析并事实检查候选bug报告；2)迭代合成并执行PoC同时收集执行轨迹；3)独立重新执行并审查PoC以减少幻觉和奖励攻击；4)持续提取和演化PoC知识库以处理异构任务。
AI.result: 相比最先进的编码代理，AnyPoC为真阳性bug报告生成1.3倍更多有效PoC，拒绝9.8倍更多假阳性报告。已发现122个新bug（105个确认，86个已修复），45个生成的PoC被采纳为官方回归测试。
AI.conclusion: AnyPoC提供了一个通用、可扩展的PoC生成框架，能够有效验证LLM发现的bug，显著提高自动化bug检测的实用性和可靠性，在实际大型软件系统中证明了其有效性。

title: ResBM: Residual Bottleneck Models for Low-Bandwidth Pipeline Parallelism
summary: Unlocking large-scale low-bandwidth decentralized training has the potential to utilize otherwise untapped compute resources. In centralized settings, large-scale multi-node training is primarily enabled by data and pipeline parallelism, two techniques that require ultra-high-bandwidth communication. While efficient methods now exist for decentralized data parallelism, pipeline parallelism remains the primary challenge. Recent efforts, such as Subspace Models (SM), have claimed up to 100x activation compression but rely on complex constrained optimization and diverge from true end-to-end training. In this paper, we propose a different approach, based on an architecture designed from the ground up to be native to low-bandwidth communication environments while still applicable to any standard transformer-based architecture. We call this architecture the Residual Bottleneck Model or ResBM, it introduces a residual encoder-decoder bottleneck module across pipeline boundaries that can be trained end-to-end as part of the model's parameters while preserving an explicit low-rank identity path. We show that ResBMs achieve state-of-the-art 128x activation compression without significant loss in convergence rates and without significant memory or compute overhead.

AI.tldr: 提出ResBM架构，用于解决低带宽环境下大规模去中心化训练中的流水线并行问题
AI.motivation: 大规模去中心化训练需要利用未充分利用的计算资源，但现有流水线并行技术需要超高带宽通信，而现有压缩方法如子空间模型依赖复杂优化且非真正端到端训练
AI.method: 提出残差瓶颈模型(ResBM)，在流水线边界引入残差编码器-解码器瓶颈模块，可端到端训练并保留显式低秩恒等路径
AI.result: ResBM实现了128倍激活压缩的最先进性能，收敛率无明显损失，且无显著内存或计算开销
AI.conclusion: ResBM为低带宽通信环境提供原生架构设计，适用于任何标准基于Transformer的架构，解决了去中心化训练中流水线并行的主要挑战

title: AutoSurrogate: An LLM-Driven Multi-Agent Framework for Autonomous Construction of Deep Learning Surrogate Models in Subsurface Flow
summary: High-fidelity numerical simulation of subsurface flow is computationally intensive, especially for many-query tasks such as uncertainty quantification and data assimilation. Deep learning (DL) surrogates can significantly accelerate forward simulations, yet constructing them requires substantial machine learning (ML) expertise - from architecture design to hyperparameter tuning - that most domain scientists do not possess. Furthermore, the process is predominantly manual and relies heavily on heuristic choices. This expertise gap remains a key barrier to the broader adoption of DL surrogate techniques. For this reason, we present AutoSurrogate, a large-language-model-driven multi-agent framework that enables practitioners without ML expertise to build high-quality surrogates for subsurface flow problems through natural-language instructions. Given simulation data and optional preferences, four specialized agents collaboratively execute data profiling, architecture selection from a model zoo, Bayesian hyperparameter optimization, model training, and quality assessment against user-specified thresholds. The system also handles common failure modes autonomously, including restarting training with adjusted configurations when numerical instabilities occur and switching to alternative architectures when predictive accuracy falls short of targets. In our setting, a single natural-language sentence can be sufficient to produce a deployment-ready surrogate model, with minimum human intervention required at any intermediate stage. We demonstrate the utility of AutoSurrogate on a 3D geological carbon storage modeling task, mapping permeability fields to pressure and CO$_2$ saturation fields over 31 timesteps. Without any manual tuning, AutoSurrogate is able to outperform expert-designed baselines and domain-agnostic AutoML methods, demonstrating strong potential for practical deployment.

AI.tldr: 开发一个基于大语言模型的多智能体框架，用于自主构建地下流动问题的深度学习代理模型，使非机器学习专家能够通过自然语言指令创建高质量的代理模型。
AI.motivation: 地下流动的高保真数值模拟计算成本高，深度学习代理模型能显著加速模拟，但构建过程需要大量机器学习专业知识，这对大多数领域科学家来说是主要障碍。现有过程主要依赖手动操作和启发式选择，限制了深度学习代理技术的广泛应用。
AI.method: 提出AutoSurrogate框架，包含四个专门化智能体，协同执行数据剖析、从模型库中选择架构、贝叶斯超参数优化、模型训练和质量评估。系统能自主处理常见故障模式，如数值不稳定时调整配置重新训练，预测精度不足时切换到替代架构。
AI.result: 在3D地质碳封存储建模任务中，AutoSurrogate无需手动调优就能超越专家设计的基准方法和领域无关的AutoML方法，单个自然语言句子即可生成部署就绪的代理模型。
AI.conclusion: AutoSurrogate框架展示了实际部署的强大潜力，能够显著降低深度学习代理模型构建的技术门槛，使非机器学习专家也能高效创建高质量的地下流动代理模型。

title: Sampling Colorings Close to the Maximum Degree: Non-Markovian Coupling and Local Uniformity
summary: Sampling graph colorings via local Markov chains is a central problem in approximate counting and Markov chain Monte Carlo (MCMC). We address the problem of sampling a random $k$-coloring of a graph with maximum degree $Δ$. The simplest algorithmic approach is to establish rapid mixing of the single-site update chain known as the Metropolis Glauber dynamics, which at each step chooses a random vertex $v$ and proposes a random color $c$, recoloring $v$ to $c$ if the resulting coloring remains proper. It is a long-standing open problem to prove that the Glauber dynamics has polynomial mixing time on all graphs whenever $k\geqΔ+2$. We prove that for every $δ>0$ and all $Δ\geq Δ_0(δ)$, if $k\ge (1+δ)Δ$ then the Glauber dynamics has optimal mixing time of $O_δ(|V| \log |V|)$ on any graph of girth $\geq 11$ and maximum degree $Δ$. Our approach builds on a non-Markovian coupling introduced by Hayes and Vigoda (2003) for the large-degree regime $Δ=Ω(\log n)$, in which updates at time $t$ may depend on and modify proposed updates at future times. A complete analysis of this framework requires resolving substantial technical obstacles that remain in the original argument, and extending it to the constant-degree regime introduces further difficulties, since non-Markovian updates may fail with constant probability. We overcome these obstacles by developing and analyzing a refined local non-Markovian coupling, and by establishing new local-uniformity results for the Metropolis dynamics, extending prior results for the heat-bath chain due to Hayes (2013). Together, these ingredients provide a complete analysis of the non-Markovian coupling framework in the large-degree regime, while simultaneously strengthening it substantially to obtain optimal mixing all the way down to the constant-degree setting.

AI.tldr: 研究图着色问题的随机采样算法，特别是针对最大度为Δ的图，在k≥(1+δ)Δ条件下，证明Metropolis Glauber动力学具有最优混合时间O(|V|log|V|)。
AI.motivation: 解决图着色随机采样中的长期开放问题：证明当k≥Δ+2时，Glauber动力学在所有图上具有多项式混合时间。当前研究旨在在特定条件下（如图围长≥11）实现这一目标。
AI.method: 基于Hayes和Vigoda(2003)的非马尔可夫耦合框架，开发改进的局部非马尔可夫耦合方法，结合Metropolis动力学的局部均匀性分析，克服原始论证中的技术障碍。
AI.result: 对于任意δ>0和所有Δ≥Δ₀(δ)，当k≥(1+δ)Δ时，在围长≥11且最大度为Δ的任何图上，Glauber动力学具有最优混合时间O_δ(|V|log|V|)。
AI.conclusion: 成功将非马尔可夫耦合框架扩展到常数度设置，解决了原始论证中的技术难题，为图着色采样提供了新的理论保证，特别是在低度图上的最优混合时间结果。

title: EigenCoin: sassanid coins classification based on Bhattacharyya distance
summary: Solving pattern recognition problems using imbalanced databases is a hot topic, which entices researchers to bring it into focus. Therefore, we consider this problem in the application of Sassanid coins classification. Our focus is not only on proposing EigenCoin manifold with Bhattacharyya distance for the classification task, but also on testing the influence of the holistic and feature-based approaches. EigenCoin consists of three main steps namely manifold construction, mapping test data, and classification. Conducted experiments show EigenCoin outperformed other observed algorithms and achieved the accuracy from 9.45% up to 21.75%, while it has the capability of handling the over-fitting problem.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Bhattacharyya距离的EigenCoin方法，用于解决萨珊王朝硬币分类中的不平衡数据集问题。
AI.motivation: 解决不平衡数据库中的模式识别问题是一个热门研究课题，特别是在萨珊王朝硬币分类应用中，需要处理数据不平衡问题并提高分类准确性。
AI.method: EigenCoin方法包含三个主要步骤：流形构建、测试数据映射和分类，使用Bhattacharyya距离进行分类，并测试整体方法和基于特征方法的影响。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，EigenCoin优于其他观察算法，准确率提高了9.45%至21.75%，同时能够有效处理过拟合问题。
AI.conclusion: EigenCoin方法在萨珊王朝硬币分类任务中表现出色，不仅提高了分类准确率，还能有效应对不平衡数据集和过拟合问题。

title: A Workflow to Efficiently Generate Dense Tissue Ground Truth Masks for Digital Breast Tomosynthesis
summary: Digital breast tomosynthesis (DBT) is now the standard of care for breast cancer screening in the USA. Accurate segmentation of fibroglandular tissue in DBT images is essential for personalized risk estimation, but algorithm development is limited by scarce human-delineated training data. In this study we introduce a time- and labor-saving framework to generate a human-annotated binary segmentation mask for dense tissue in DBT. Our framework enables a user to outline a rough region of interest (ROI) enclosing dense tissue on the central reconstructed slice of a DBT volume and select a segmentation threshold to generate the dense tissue mask. The algorithm then projects the ROI to the remaining slices and iteratively adjusts slice-specific thresholds to maintain consistent dense tissue delineation across the DBT volume. By requiring annotation only on the central slice, the framework substantially reduces annotation time and labor. We used 44 DBT volumes from the DBTex dataset for evaluation. Inter-reader agreement was assessed by computing patient-wise Dice similarity coefficients between segmentation masks produced by two radiologists, yielding a median of 0.84. Accuracy of the proposed method was evaluated by having a radiologist manually segment the 20th and 80th percentile slices from each volume (CC and MLO views; 176 slices total) and calculate Dice scores between the manual and proposed segmentations, yielding a median of 0.83.

AI.tldr: 提出一种高效生成数字乳腺断层合成图像中致密组织分割掩码的工作流程，通过减少标注工作量来加速算法开发。
AI.motivation: 数字乳腺断层合成已成为美国乳腺癌筛查标准，但致密组织的准确分割对于个性化风险评估至关重要。目前算法开发受到人工标注训练数据稀缺的限制，需要大量时间和劳动力。
AI.method: 开发了一个时间和劳动力节约型框架：用户在DBT体积的中心重建切片上勾勒包含致密组织的粗略感兴趣区域，选择分割阈值生成掩码。算法将ROI投影到剩余切片，迭代调整切片特定阈值以保持整个DBT体积中致密组织分割的一致性。
AI.result: 使用DBTex数据集的44个DBT体积进行评估。两位放射科医生产生的分割掩码之间的患者级Dice相似系数中位数为0.84。放射科医生手动分割每个体积的第20和80百分位切片（共176个切片），手动分割与提出方法之间的Dice分数中位数为0.83。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架通过仅需在中心切片进行标注，显著减少了标注时间和劳动力，同时保持了与人工分割相当的高准确性，为DBT图像中致密组织分割算法的开发提供了高效的数据生成解决方案。

title: GoodPoint: Learning Constructive Scientific Paper Feedback from Author Responses
summary: While LLMs hold significant potential to transform scientific research, we advocate for their use to augment and empower researchers rather than to automate research without human oversight. To this end, we study constructive feedback generation, the task of producing targeted, actionable feedback that helps authors improve both their research and its presentation. In this work, we operationalize the effectiveness of feedback along two author-centric axes-validity and author action. We first curate GoodPoint-ICLR, a dataset of 19K ICLR papers with reviewer feedback annotated along both dimensions using author responses. Building on this, we introduce GoodPoint, a training recipe that leverages success signals from author responses through fine-tuning on valid and actionable feedback, together with preference optimization on both real and synthetic preference pairs. Our evaluation on a benchmark of 1.2K ICLR papers shows that a GoodPoint-trained Qwen3-8B improves the predicted success rate by 83.7% over the base model and sets a new state-of-the-art among LLMs of similar size in feedback matching on a golden human feedback set, even surpassing Gemini-3-flash in precision. We further validate these findings through an expert human study, demonstrating that GoodPoint consistently delivers higher practical value as perceived by authors.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究如何利用LLM生成建设性科学论文反馈，通过作者回应来训练模型提供有效且可操作的反馈建议
AI.motivation: 虽然LLM有潜力改变科学研究，但应增强研究人员能力而非完全自动化研究，需要生成有针对性、可操作的反馈来帮助作者改进研究和展示
AI.method: 创建GoodPoint-ICLR数据集，包含19K篇ICLR论文的作者回应标注；开发GoodPoint训练方法，通过微调有效反馈和使用真实与合成偏好对进行偏好优化
AI.result: GoodPoint训练的Qwen3-8B模型在1.2K篇ICLR论文基准上，预测成功率比基础模型提高83.7%，在人类反馈匹配上达到同类尺寸LLM的最优性能，专家研究证实其提供更高实用价值
AI.conclusion: GoodPoint方法能有效提升LLM生成建设性科学反馈的能力，通过作者回应信号训练模型，为研究人员提供有价值的改进建议，实现人机协作的研究支持

title: Can AI Detect Life? Lessons from Artificial Life
summary: Modern machine learning methods have been proposed to detect life in extraterrestrial samples, drawing on their ability to distinguish biotic from abiotic samples based on training models using natural and synthetic organic molecular mixtures. Here we show using Artificial Life that such methods are easily fooled into detecting life with near 100% confidence even if the analyzed sample is not capable of life. This is due to modern machine learning methods' propensity to be easily fooled by out-of-distribution samples. Because extra-terrestrial samples are very likely out of the distribution provided by terrestrial biotic and abiotic samples, using AI methods for life detection is bound to yield significant false positives.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨人工智能在检测地外生命方面的可靠性，通过人工生命实验展示现代机器学习方法在生命检测中的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现代机器学习方法被提议用于检测地外生命样本，但作者担心这些方法可能因样本分布外问题而产生误判，需要验证其可靠性。
AI.method: 使用人工生命技术创建样本，测试现代机器学习方法区分生命与非生命样本的能力，特别关注分布外样本的识别问题。
AI.result: 实验显示，现代机器学习方法容易被分布外样本欺骗，即使分析样本不具备生命能力，也会以接近100%的置信度检测到生命。
AI.conclusion: 由于地外样本很可能超出地球生命和非生命样本的分布范围，使用AI方法进行生命检测必然会产生显著假阳性结果，需要谨慎对待。

title: Self-Monitoring Benefits from Structural Integration: Lessons from Metacognition in Continuous-Time Multi-Timescale Agents
summary: Self-monitoring capabilities -- metacognition, self-prediction, and subjective duration -- are often proposed as useful additions to reinforcement learning agents. But do they actually help? We investigate this question in a continuous-time multi-timescale agent operating in predator-prey survival environments of varying complexity, including a 2D partially observable variant. We first show that three self-monitoring modules, implemented as auxiliary-loss add-ons to a multi-timescale cortical hierarchy, provide no statistically significant benefit across 20 random seeds, 1D and 2D predator-prey environments with standard and non-stationary variants, and training horizons up to 50,000 steps. Diagnosing the failure, we find the modules collapse to near-constant outputs (confidence std < 0.006, attention allocation std < 0.011) and the subjective duration mechanism shifts the discount factor by less than 0.03%. Policy sensitivity analysis confirms the agent's decisions are unaffected by module outputs in this design. We then show that structurally integrating the module outputs -- using confidence to gate exploration, surprise to trigger workspace broadcasts, and self-model predictions as policy input -- produces a medium-large improvement over the add-on approach (Cohen's d = 0.62, p = 0.06, paired) in a non-stationary environment. Component-wise ablations reveal that the TSM-to-policy pathway contributes most of this gain. However, structural integration does not significantly outperform a baseline with no self-monitoring (d = 0.15, p = 0.67), and a parameter-matched control without modules performs comparably, so the benefit may lie in recovering from the trend-level harm of ignored modules rather than in self-monitoring content. The architectural implication is that self-monitoring should sit on the decision pathway, not beside it.

AI.tldr: 研究自我监控能力（元认知、自我预测和主观时长）在连续时间多时间尺度强化学习智能体中的实际效用，探索其在捕食者-猎物生存环境中的表现。
AI.motivation: 自我监控能力常被提议作为强化学习智能体的有用补充，但缺乏实证研究验证其实际效果。本研究旨在通过实验验证这些模块是否真正能提升智能体性能。
AI.method: 在连续时间多时间尺度智能体中实现三个自我监控模块作为辅助损失附加组件，在1D和2D捕食者-猎物环境中进行测试。随后通过结构集成方法，将模块输出用于探索门控、工作空间广播触发和策略输入。
AI.result: 辅助损失附加方法在20个随机种子和多种环境变体中未提供统计显著收益。模块输出趋于恒定，对决策无影响。结构集成方法在非平稳环境中产生中等改善，但未显著优于无自我监控基线。
AI.conclusion: 自我监控模块应置于决策路径上而非其旁侧。结构集成能恢复被忽略模块的趋势性损害，但自我监控内容本身可能并非主要收益来源。

title: V-Nutri: Dish-Level Nutrition Estimation from Egocentric Cooking Videos
comment: Accepted to the 3rd MetaFood Workshop at CVPR 2026
summary: Nutrition estimation of meals from visual data is an important problem for dietary monitoring and computational health, but existing approaches largely rely on single images of the finally completed dish. This setting is fundamentally limited because many nutritionally relevant ingredients and transformations, such as oils, sauces, and mixed components, become visually ambiguous after cooking, making accurate calorie and macronutrient estimation difficult. In this paper, we investigate whether the cooking process information from egocentric cooking videos can contribute to dish-level nutrition estimation. First, we further manually annotated the HD-EPIC dataset and established the first benchmark for video-based nutrition estimation. Most importantly, we propose V-Nutri, a staged framework that combines Nutrition5K-pretrained visual backbones with a lightweight fusion module that aggregates features from the final dish frame and cooking process keyframes extracted from the egocentric videos. V-Nutri also includes a cooking keyframes selection module, a VideoMamba-based event-detection model that targets ingredient-addition moments. Experiments on the HD-EPIC dataset show that process cues can provide complementary nutritional evidence, improving nutrition estimation under controlled conditions. Our results further indicate that the benefit of process keyframes depends strongly on backbone representation capacity and event detection quality. Our code and annotated dataset is available at https://github.com/K624-YCK/V-Nutri.

AI.tldr: 本文提出V-Nutri框架，从第一人称烹饪视频中进行菜品级营养估计，利用烹饪过程信息补充最终菜品图像信息。
AI.motivation: 现有营养估计方法主要依赖最终完成菜品的单张图像，但许多营养相关成分（如油、酱料、混合成分）在烹饪后变得视觉模糊，难以准确估计热量和宏量营养素。
AI.method: 提出V-Nutri框架：结合Nutrition5K预训练视觉骨干网络与轻量融合模块，聚合最终菜品帧和烹饪过程关键帧特征；包含烹饪关键帧选择模块，使用VideoMamba检测食材添加时刻。
AI.result: 在HD-EPIC数据集上的实验表明，过程线索能提供互补营养证据，在受控条件下改善营养估计；过程关键帧的效益强烈依赖于骨干网络表示能力和事件检测质量。
AI.conclusion: 烹饪过程信息对菜品级营养估计有补充价值，建立了首个视频营养估计基准，开源了代码和标注数据集。

title: How Transformers Learn to Plan via Multi-Token Prediction
summary: While next-token prediction (NTP) has been the standard objective for training language models, it often struggles to capture global structure in reasoning tasks. Multi-token prediction (MTP) has recently emerged as a promising alternative, yet its underlying mechanisms remain poorly understood. In this paper, we study how MTP facilitates reasoning, with a focus on planning. Empirically, we show that MTP consistently outperforms NTP on both synthetic graph path-finding tasks and more realistic reasoning benchmarks, such as Countdown and boolean satisfiability problems. Theoretically, we analyze a simplified two-layer Transformer on a star graph task. We prove that MTP induces a two-stage reverse reasoning process: the model first attends to the end node and then reconstructs the path by tracing intermediate nodes backward. This behavior arises from a gradient decoupling property of MTP, which provides a cleaner training signal compared to NTP. Ultimately, our results highlight how multi-token objectives inherently bias optimization toward robust and interpretable reasoning circuits.

AI.tldr: 研究多令牌预测如何帮助Transformer模型学习规划能力，通过理论分析和实验验证多令牌预测相比单令牌预测在推理任务上的优势。
AI.motivation: 传统的下一令牌预测在捕捉推理任务的全局结构方面存在不足，多令牌预测作为有前景的替代方案，但其工作机制尚未被充分理解，需要深入研究多令牌预测如何促进推理特别是规划能力。
AI.method: 采用实证研究和理论分析相结合的方法：在合成图路径查找任务和实际推理基准（如Countdown和布尔可满足性问题）上实验比较多令牌预测与下一令牌预测；理论分析简化两层Transformer在星图任务上的行为。
AI.result: 多令牌预测在合成和实际推理任务上均优于下一令牌预测；理论分析表明多令牌预测诱导两阶段逆向推理过程：模型先关注结束节点，然后通过向后追踪中间节点重建路径；多令牌预测具有梯度解耦特性，提供比下一令牌预测更清晰的训练信号。
AI.conclusion: 多令牌预测目标函数固有地偏向于优化鲁棒且可解释的推理电路，揭示了多令牌预测促进规划能力的机制，为改进语言模型的推理能力提供了理论基础。

title: Thermodynamic Liquid Manifold Networks: Physics-Bounded Deep Learning for Solar Forecasting in Autonomous Off-Grid Microgrids
summary: The stable operation of autonomous off-grid photovoltaic systems requires solar forecasting algorithms that respect atmospheric thermodynamics. Contemporary deep learning models consistently exhibit critical anomalies, primarily severe temporal phase lags during cloud transients and physically impossible nocturnal power generation. To resolve this divergence between data-driven modeling and deterministic celestial mechanics, this research introduces the Thermodynamic Liquid Manifold Network. The methodology projects 22 meteorological and geometric variables into a Koopman-linearized Riemannian manifold to systematically map complex climatic dynamics. The architecture integrates a Spectral Calibration unit and a multiplicative Thermodynamic Alpha-Gate. This system synthesizes real-time atmospheric opacity with theoretical clear-sky boundary models, structurally enforcing strict celestial geometry compliance. This completely neutralizes phantom nocturnal generation while maintaining zero-lag synchronization during rapid weather shifts. Validated against a rigorous five-year testing horizon in a severe semi-arid climate, the framework achieves an RMSE of 18.31 Wh/m2 and a Pearson correlation of 0.988. The model strictly maintains a zero-magnitude nocturnal error across all 1826 testing days and exhibits a sub-30-minute phase response during high-frequency optical transients. Comprising exactly 63,458 trainable parameters, this ultra-lightweight design establishes a robust, thermodynamically consistent standard for edge-deployable microgrid controllers.

AI.tldr: 开发一种用于自主离网微电网太阳能预测的物理约束深度学习模型，解决现有模型在云层瞬变时的相位滞后和夜间虚假发电问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在太阳能预测中存在严重问题：云层瞬变时出现时间相位滞后，以及产生物理上不可能的夜间发电预测。这些模型与确定性天体力学之间存在分歧，需要开发尊重大气热力学的预测算法。
AI.method: 提出热力学液体流形网络，将22个气象和几何变量投影到Koopman线性化黎曼流形中，映射复杂气候动态。架构集成光谱校准单元和乘法热力学Alpha门，合成实时大气不透明度与理论晴空边界模型，结构上强制执行严格的天体几何合规性。
AI.result: 在严重半干旱气候的五年测试中，模型达到18.31 Wh/m²的RMSE和0.988的皮尔逊相关系数。在所有1826个测试日中严格保持零幅度夜间误差，在高频光学瞬变期间表现出低于30分钟的相位响应。模型仅包含63,458个可训练参数。
AI.conclusion: 该超轻量设计为边缘可部署微电网控制器建立了稳健、热力学一致的标准，完全消除了夜间虚假发电，同时在快速天气变化期间保持零滞后同步。

title: MedConcept: Unsupervised Concept Discovery for Interpretability in Medical VLMs
summary: While medical Vision-Language models (VLMs) achieve strong performance on tasks such as tumor or organ segmentation and diagnosis prediction, their opaque latent representations limit clinical trust and the ability to explain predictions. Interpretability of these multimodal representations are therefore essential for the trustworthy clinical deployment of pretrained medical VLMs. However, current interpretability methods, such as gradient- or attention-based visualizations, are often limited to specific tasks such as classification. Moreover, they do not provide concept-level explanations derived from shared pretrained representations that can be reused across downstream tasks. We introduce MedConcept, a framework that uncovers latent medical concepts in a fully unsupervised manner and grounds them in clinically verifiable textual semantics. MedConcept identifies sparse neuron-level concept activations from pretrained VLM representations and translates them into pseudo-report-style summaries, enabling physician-level inspection of internal model reasoning. To address the lack of quantitative evaluation in concept-based interpretability, we introduce a quantitative semantic verification protocol that leverages an independent pretrained medical LLM as a frozen external evaluator to assess concept alignment with radiology reports. We define three concept scores, Aligned, Unaligned, and Uncertain, to quantify semantic support, contradiction, or ambiguity relative to radiology reports and use them exclusively for post hoc evaluation. These scores provide a quantitative baseline for assessing interpretability in medical VLMs. All codes, prompt and data to be released on acceptance. Ke

AI.tldr: 提出MedConcept框架，用于在医学视觉语言模型中无监督发现潜在医学概念，提高模型可解释性
AI.motivation: 医学视觉语言模型虽然性能强大，但其不透明的潜在表示限制了临床信任和预测解释能力，需要可解释性方法来支持临床部署
AI.method: 从预训练VLM表示中识别稀疏神经元级概念激活，将其转化为伪报告式总结，并引入定量语义验证协议，使用独立预训练医学LLM作为外部评估器
AI.result: 定义了三个概念评分（对齐、未对齐、不确定）来量化语义支持、矛盾或模糊性，为医学VLM可解释性评估提供了定量基准
AI.conclusion: MedConcept框架能够无监督发现医学概念并验证其临床语义，为医学VLM的可解释性提供了新方法和评估基准

title: Disposition Distillation at Small Scale: A Three-Arc Negative Result
summary: We set out to train behavioral dispositions (self-verification, uncertainty acknowledgment, feedback integration) into small language models (0.6B to 2.3B effective parameters) through a four-stage all-MIT distillation pipeline, with follow-on experiments on inference-time attention-head interventions and a frozen-base confidence-gated sidecar. An internal draft reported +33.9-point MCAS and +15.3-point HumanEval gains on a Qwen3-0.6B student; a second-pass sanity check falsified both numbers before publication. The HumanEval delta was a truncation artifact (n_predict=512) that inverted to -8.0 points at n_predict=1024; the MCAS gain disappeared under apples-to-apples scoring. That falsification triggered three subsequent arcs. Across (1) SFT/DPO LoRA on three model families and two domains, (2) inference-time attention-head tempering on o_proj, and (3) a training-free frozen-base sidecar reading the final-token hidden state h_last, we find no operator that moves judge-measured disposition without damaging content or collapsing into stylistic mimicry. The failure is consistent across five models (Qwen3-0.6B, Qwen3-1.7B, Qwen3.5-0.8B, Gemma 4 E2B, and SmolLM2-1.7B-Instruct). A within-distribution cross-validation pass (AUC=0.683) collapsed to chance on fresh prompts (AUC=0.516). We contribute a three-arc negative result with mechanism, a two-failure-mode taxonomy for linear h_last probes, and an honest falsification pipeline that converts the class of false positives we ourselves produced into publishable negatives. As an independent finding, Gemma 4 E2B exhibits near-complete confidence-correctness decoupling on the Chef domain (assertion asymmetry -0.009; the model asserts at 91% regardless of correctness).

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究在小规模语言模型中通过蒸馏方法训练行为倾向（自我验证、不确定性承认、反馈整合），但最终发现所有尝试都未能成功提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是探索是否能在小规模语言模型（0.6B到2.3B参数）中通过蒸馏方法有效训练行为倾向，如自我验证、不确定性承认和反馈整合能力，以提升模型在特定任务上的表现。
AI.method: 采用四阶段MIT蒸馏流程，包括SFT/DPO LoRA在三个模型家族和两个领域上的实验、推理时注意力头调节、以及基于冻结基础模型的侧边架构读取最终隐藏状态h_last等方法。
AI.result: 所有实验均未成功：最初报告的MCAS和HumanEval提升被证伪，后续三个实验弧（SFT/DPO LoRA、注意力头调节、冻结基础侧边架构）均未能改善模型行为倾向，反而导致内容质量下降或陷入风格模仿。在五个不同模型上结果一致。
AI.conclusion: 研究得出了三弧否定结果：在小规模语言模型中通过蒸馏方法训练行为倾向是无效的。同时提出了线性h_last探针的两种失败模式分类，以及一个能够将假阳性结果转化为可发表否定结果的诚实证伪流程。

title: BIND-USBL: Bounding IMU Navigation Drift using USBL in Heterogeneous ASV-AUV Teams
summary: Accurate and continuous localization of Autonomous Underwater Vehicles (AUVs) in GPS-denied environments is a persistent challenge in marine robotics. In the absence of external position fixes, AUVs rely on inertial dead-reckoning, which accumulates unbounded drift due to sensor bias and noise. This paper presents BIND-USBL, a cooperative localization framework in which a fleet of Autonomous Surface Vessels (ASVs) equipped with Ultra-Short Baseline (USBL) acoustic positioning systems provides intermittent fixes to bound AUV dead-reckoning error. The key insight is that long-duration navigation failure is driven not by the accuracy of individual USBL measurements, but by the temporal sparsity and geometric availability of those fixes. BIND-USBL combines a multi-ASV formation model linking survey scale and anchor placement to acoustic coverage, a conflict-graph-based TDMA uplink scheduler for shared-channel servicing, and delayed fusion of received USBL updates with drift-prone dead reckoning. The framework is evaluated in the HoloOcean simulator using heterogeneous ASV-AUV teams executing lawnmower coverage missions. The results show that localization performance is shaped by the interaction of survey scale, acoustic coverage, team composition, and ASV-formation geometry. Further, the spatial-reuse scheduler improves per-AUV fix delivery rate without violating the no-collision constraint, while maintaining low end-to-end fix latency.

AI.tldr: 提出BIND-USBL框架，通过配备USBL系统的自主水面船队为自主水下航行器提供间歇性定位修正，以限制惯性导航漂移误差
AI.motivation: GPS拒止环境下自主水下航行器的精确定位是海洋机器人领域的持续挑战，惯性航位推算会因传感器偏差和噪声积累无界漂移误差
AI.method: 结合多ASV编队模型、基于冲突图的TDMA上行链路调度器以及接收到的USBL更新与漂移航位推算的延迟融合
AI.result: 在HoloOcean模拟器中评估显示，定位性能受调查尺度、声学覆盖、团队组成和ASV编队几何形状交互影响，空间复用调度器提高了每个AUV的定位修正率
AI.conclusion: BIND-USBL框架通过优化ASV编队和调度策略，有效限制了AUV导航漂移，提高了异构ASV-AUV团队在GPS拒止环境下的定位性能

title: MVAdapt: Zero-Shot Multi-Vehicle Adaptation for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
summary: End-to-End (E2E) autonomous driving models are usually trained and evaluated with a fixed ego-vehicle, even though their driving policy is implicitly tied to vehicle dynamics. When such a model is deployed on a vehicle with different size, mass, or drivetrain characteristics, its performance can degrade substantially; we refer to this problem as the vehicle-domain gap. To address it, we propose MVAdapt, a physics-conditioned adaptation framework for multi-vehicle E2E driving. MVAdapt combines a frozen TransFuser++ scene encoder with a lightweight physics encoder and a cross-attention module that conditions scene features on vehicle properties before waypoint decoding. In the CARLA Leaderboard 1.0 benchmark, MVAdapt improves over naive transfer and multi-embodiment adaptation baselines on both in-distribution and unseen vehicles. We further show two complementary behaviors: strong zero-shot transfer on many unseen vehicles, and data-efficient few-shot calibration for severe physical outliers. These results suggest that explicitly conditioning E2E driving policies on vehicle physics is an effective step toward more transferable autonomous driving models. All codes are available at https://github.com/hae-sung-oh/MVAdapt

AI.tldr: 提出MVAdapt框架，解决端到端自动驾驶模型在不同车辆部署时的性能下降问题，实现零样本多车辆适应。
AI.motivation: 端到端自动驾驶模型通常在固定车辆上训练和评估，其驾驶策略隐含地与车辆动力学相关。当部署到不同尺寸、质量或传动系统特性的车辆时，性能会显著下降，这被称为车辆领域差距问题。
AI.method: MVAdapt结合冻结的TransFuser++场景编码器、轻量级物理编码器和交叉注意力模块，在路径点解码前将场景特征条件化于车辆属性。该框架支持零样本适应和少样本校准。
AI.result: 在CARLA Leaderboard 1.0基准测试中，MVAdapt优于朴素迁移和多体现适应基线，在分布内和未见车辆上都表现更好。展示了零样本适应能力和对物理异常车辆的数据高效少样本校准能力。
AI.conclusion: 明确将端到端驾驶策略条件化于车辆物理特性是实现更可转移自动驾驶模型的有效步骤，MVAdapt框架为多车辆适应提供了实用解决方案。

title: Evaluating the Limitations of Protein Sequence Representations for Parkinson's Disease Classification
summary: The identification of reliable molecular biomarkers for Parkinson's disease remains challenging due to its multifactorial nature. Although protein sequences constitute a fundamental and widely available source of biological information, their standalone discriminative capacity for complex disease classification remains unclear. In this work, we present a controlled and leakage-free evaluation of multiple representations derived exclusively from protein primary sequences, including amino acid composition, k-mers, physicochemical descriptors, hybrid representations, and embeddings from protein language models, all assessed under a nested stratified cross-validation framework to ensure unbiased performance estimation. The best-performing configuration (ProtBERT + MLP) achieves an F1-score of 0.704 +/- 0.028 and ROC-AUC of 0.748 +/- 0.047, indicating only moderate discriminative performance. Classical representations such as k-mers reach comparable F1 values (up to approximately 0.667), but exhibit highly imbalanced behavior, with recall close to 0.98 and precision around 0.50, reflecting a strong bias toward positive predictions. Across representations, performance differences remain within a narrow range (F1 between 0.60 and 0.70), while unsupervised analyses reveal no intrinsic structure aligned with class labels, and statistical testing (Friedman test, p = 0.1749) does not indicate significant differences across models. These results demonstrate substantial overlap between classes and indicate that primary sequence information alone provides limited discriminative power for Parkinson's disease classification. This work establishes a reproducible baseline and provides empirical evidence that more informative biological features, such as structural, functional, or interaction-based descriptors, are required for robust disease modeling.

AI.tldr: 评估蛋白质序列表示方法在帕金森病分类中的局限性
AI.motivation: 帕金森病缺乏可靠的分子生物标志物，蛋白质序列作为基础生物信息源，其单独用于复杂疾病分类的判别能力尚不明确
AI.method: 使用无泄漏评估框架，比较多种蛋白质序列表示方法，包括氨基酸组成、k-mers、理化描述符、混合表示和蛋白质语言模型嵌入，采用嵌套分层交叉验证确保无偏性能估计
AI.result: 最佳配置（ProtBERT + MLP）F1分数为0.704±0.028，ROC-AUC为0.748±0.047，表现中等；所有方法性能差异不大（F1在0.60-0.70之间），无监督分析显示类别间无内在结构差异，统计检验表明模型间无显著差异
AI.conclusion: 蛋白质序列信息单独对帕金森病分类的判别能力有限，需要结合结构、功能或相互作用等更丰富的生物特征来建立稳健的疾病模型

title: UniMark: Unified Adaptive Multi-bit Watermarking for Autoregressive Image Generators
summary: Invisible watermarking for autoregressive (AR) image generation has recently gained attention as a means of protecting image ownership and tracing AI-generated content. However, existing approaches suffer from three key limitations: (1) they embed only zero-bit watermarks for binary verification, lacking the ability to convey multi-bit messages; (2) they rely on static codebook partitioning strategies that are vulnerable to security attacks once the partition is exposed; and (3) they are designed for specific AR architectures, failing to generalize across diverse AR paradigms. We propose \method{}, a training-free, unified watermarking framework for autoregressive image generators that addresses all three limitations. \method{} introduces three core components: \textbf{Adaptive Semantic Grouping (ASG)}, which dynamically partitions codebook entries based on semantic similarity and a secret key, ensuring both image quality preservation and security; \textbf{Block-wise Multi-bit Encoding (BME)}, which divides the token sequence into blocks and encodes different bits across blocks with error-correcting codes for reliable message transmission; and \textbf{a Unified Token-Replacement Interface (UTRI)} that abstracts the watermark embedding process to support both next-token prediction (e.g., LlamaGen) and next-scale prediction (e.g., VAR) paradigms. We provide theoretical analysis on detection error rates and embedding capacity. Extensive experiments on three AR models demonstrate that \method{} achieves state-of-the-art performance in image quality (FID), watermark detection accuracy, and multi-bit message extraction, while maintaining robustness against cropping, JPEG compression, Gaussian noise, blur, color jitter, and random erasing attacks.

AI.tldr: 提出UniMark框架，为自回归图像生成器提供统一的自适应多比特水印嵌入方法，解决现有方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有自回归图像生成水印方法存在三个关键限制：只能嵌入零比特水印进行二元验证，缺乏多比特消息传输能力；依赖静态码本分区策略，一旦分区暴露易受安全攻击；仅针对特定自回归架构设计，无法泛化到不同自回归范式。
AI.method: 提出训练免费的统一水印框架，包含三个核心组件：基于语义相似度和密钥动态分区码本条目的自适应语义分组；将令牌序列分块并在不同块中编码不同比特的错误纠正码块式多比特编码；抽象水印嵌入过程以支持不同自回归范式的统一令牌替换接口。
AI.result: 在三个自回归模型上的实验表明，该方法在图像质量、水印检测准确性和多比特消息提取方面达到最先进性能，同时对裁剪、JPEG压缩、高斯噪声、模糊、颜色抖动和随机擦除攻击保持鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: UniMark框架有效解决了现有自回归图像生成水印方法的三个关键限制，实现了安全、高质量的多比特水印嵌入，具有理论分析和实验验证的优越性能。

title: DBGL: Decay-aware Bipartite Graph Learning for Irregular Medical Time Series Classification
summary: Irregular Medical Time Series play a critical role in the clinical domain to better understand the patient's condition. However, inherent irregularity arising from heterogeneous sampling rates, asynchronous observations, and variable gaps poses key challenges for reliable modeling. Existing methods often distort temporal sampling irregularity and missingness patterns while failing to capture variable decay irregularity, resulting in suboptimal representations. To address these limitations, we introduce DBGL, Decay-Aware Bipartite Graph Learning for Irregular Medical Time Series. DBGL first introduces a patient-variable bipartite graph that simultaneously captures irregular sampling patterns without artificial alignment and adaptively models variable relationships for temporal sampling irregularity modeling, enhancing representation learning. To model variable decay irregularity, DBGL designs a novel node-specific temporal decay encoding mechanism that captures each variable's decay rates based on sampling interval, yielding a more accurate and faithful representation of irregular temporal dynamics. We evaluate the performance of DBGL on four publicly available datasets, and the results show that DBGL outperforms all baselines.

AI.tldr: 该论文的主要任务是开发一种用于不规则医疗时间序列分类的新方法，通过解决采样不规则性和变量衰减不规则性来改善患者状况的理解。
AI.motivation: 不规则医疗时间序列在临床领域中至关重要，但异质采样率、异步观测和可变间隔导致的不规则性给可靠建模带来挑战。现有方法常常扭曲时间采样不规则性和缺失模式，同时无法捕捉变量衰减不规则性，导致次优表示。
AI.method: DBGL方法首先引入患者-变量二分图，同时捕捉不规则采样模式而无需人工对齐，并自适应建模变量关系以处理时间采样不规则性。为建模变量衰减不规则性，DBGL设计了新颖的节点特定时间衰减编码机制，基于采样间隔捕捉每个变量的衰减率。
AI.result: 在四个公开可用数据集上评估DBGL性能，结果显示DBGL在所有基线方法中表现最优。
AI.conclusion: DBGL通过二分图学习和节点特定时间衰减编码机制，有效解决了不规则医疗时间序列中的采样和衰减不规则性问题，提供了更准确可靠的表示学习方法。

title: Polynomial Expansion Rank Adaptation: Enhancing Low-Rank Fine-Tuning with High-Order Interactions
summary: Low-rank adaptation (LoRA) is a widely used strategy for efficient fine-tuning of large language models (LLMs), but its strictly linear structure fundamentally limits expressive capacity. The bilinear formulation of weight updates captures only first-order dependencies between low-rank factors, restricting the modeling of nonlinear and higher-order parameter interactions. In this paper, we propose Polynomial Expansion Rank Adaptation (PERA), a novel method that introduces structured polynomial expansion directly into the low-rank factor space. By expanding each low-rank factor to synthesize high-order interaction terms before composition, PERA transforms the adaptation space into a polynomial manifold capable of modeling richer nonlinear coupling without increasing rank or inference cost. We provide theoretical analysis demonstrating that PERA offers enhanced expressive capacity and more effective feature utilization compare to existing linear adaptation approaches. Empirically, PERA consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods across diverse benchmarks. Notably, our experiments show that incorporating high-order nonlinear components particularly square terms is crucial for enhancing expressive capacity and maintaining strong and robust performance under various rank settings. Our code is available at https://github.com/zhangwenhao6/PERA

AI.tldr: 提出多项式扩展秩适应（PERA）方法，增强大型语言模型低秩微调的表达能力
AI.motivation: 现有低秩适应（LoRA）方法的线性结构限制了表达能力，只能捕获低秩因子间的一阶依赖关系，无法建模非线性高阶参数交互
AI.method: PERA在低秩因子空间中引入结构化多项式扩展，在组合前扩展每个低秩因子以合成高阶交互项，将适应空间转换为多项式流形
AI.result: PERA在多种基准测试中一致优于现有方法，理论分析表明其具有增强的表达能力和更有效的特征利用，特别是平方项对提升表达能力至关重要
AI.conclusion: PERA通过引入多项式扩展增强低秩微调的表达能力，在不增加秩或推理成本的情况下建模更丰富的非线性耦合，显著提升性能

title: Beyond Static Sandboxing: Learned Capability Governance for Autonomous AI Agents
comment: 17 pages (9 content pages), 2 figures, 7 tables. Submitted to NeurIPS 2026 Agent Safety Workshop. Code and dataset available at https://github.com/sidikbro/aethelgard
summary: Autonomous AI agents built on open-source runtimes such as OpenClaw expose every available tool to every session by default, regardless of the task. A summarization task receives the same shell execution, subagent spawning, and credential access capabilities as a code deployment task, a 15x overprovision ratio that we call the capability overprovisioning problem. Existing defenses, including the NemoClaw container sandbox and the Cisco DefenseClaw skill scanner, address containment and threat detection but do not learn the minimum viable capability set for each task type. We present Aethelgard, a four layer adaptive governance framework that enforces least privilege for AI agents through a learned policy. Layer 1, the Capability Governor, dynamically scopes which tools the agent is aware of in each session. Layer 3, the Safety Router, intercepts tool calls before execution using a hybrid rule based and fine tuned classifier. Layer 2, the RL Learning Policy, trains a PPO policy on the accumulated audit log to learn the minimum viable skill set for each task type.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Aethelgard自适应治理框架，解决自主AI代理中的能力过度配置问题，通过学习策略为不同任务类型强制执行最小权限原则。
AI.motivation: 现有开源运行时如OpenClaw默认将所有工具暴露给每个会话，导致能力过度配置问题（15倍过度配置）。现有防御措施如NemoClaw容器沙箱和Cisco DefenseClaw技能扫描器仅解决容器化和威胁检测，但未学习每个任务类型的最小可行能力集。
AI.method: 提出Aethelgard四层自适应治理框架：第1层能力治理器动态限定每个会话中代理可用的工具；第3层安全路由器使用混合规则和微调分类器在执行前拦截工具调用；第2层RL学习策略在累积审计日志上训练PPO策略，学习每个任务类型的最小可行技能集。
AI.result: 该框架通过动态范围限定工具访问、执行前拦截工具调用以及学习每个任务类型的最小可行能力集，有效解决了自主AI代理的能力过度配置问题。
AI.conclusion: Aethelgard框架通过学习策略实现最小权限原则，为自主AI代理提供自适应治理，解决了现有静态沙箱方法无法学习任务特定最小能力集的问题。

title: A Layer-wise Analysis of Supervised Fine-Tuning
summary: While critical for alignment, Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) incurs the risk of catastrophic forgetting, yet the layer-wise emergence of instruction-following capabilities remains elusive. We investigate this mechanism via a comprehensive analysis utilizing information-theoretic, geometric, and optimization metrics across model scales (1B-32B). Our experiments reveal a distinct depth-dependent pattern: middle layers (20\%-80\%) are stable, whereas final layers exhibit high sensitivity. Leveraging this insight, we propose Mid-Block Efficient Tuning, which selectively updates these critical intermediate layers. Empirically, our method outperforms standard LoRA up to 10.2\% on GSM8K (OLMo2-7B) with reduced parameter overhead, demonstrating that effective alignment is architecturally localized rather than distributed. The code is publicly available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/base_sft.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了监督微调（SFT）中指令跟随能力的层间涌现机制，分析了不同层在微调过程中的稳定性与敏感性。
AI.motivation: 监督微调对模型对齐至关重要，但可能导致灾难性遗忘，且指令跟随能力在不同层的涌现机制尚不明确，需要深入分析层间特性。
AI.method: 使用信息论、几何和优化指标对1B-32B规模模型进行综合分析，发现中间层稳定而最终层敏感，据此提出选择性更新关键中间层的Mid-Block Efficient Tuning方法。
AI.result: 实验显示中间层（20%-80%）稳定，最终层高度敏感；提出的方法在GSM8K（OLMo2-7B）上比标准LoRA性能提升高达10.2%，且参数量更少。
AI.conclusion: 有效的对齐机制在架构上是局部化的而非分布式的，选择性更新中间层能显著提升微调效率，减少灾难性遗忘风险。

title: Schema-Adaptive Tabular Representation Learning with LLMs for Generalizable Multimodal Clinical Reasoning
summary: Machine learning for tabular data remains constrained by poor schema generalization, a challenge rooted in the lack of semantic understanding of structured variables. This challenge is particularly acute in domains like clinical medicine, where electronic health record (EHR) schemas vary significantly. To solve this problem, we propose Schema-Adaptive Tabular Representation Learning, a novel method that leverages large language models (LLMs) to create transferable tabular embeddings. By transforming structured variables into semantic natural language statements and encoding them with a pretrained LLM, our approach enables zero-shot alignment across unseen schemas without manual feature engineering or retraining. We integrate our encoder into a multimodal framework for dementia diagnosis, combining tabular and MRI data. Experiments on NACC and ADNI datasets demonstrate state-of-the-art performance and successful zero-shot transfer to unseen schemas, significantly outperforming clinical baselines, including board-certified neurologists, in retrospective diagnostic tasks. These results validate our LLM-driven approach as a scalable, robust solution for heterogeneous real-world data, offering a pathway to extend LLM-based reasoning to structured domains.

AI.tldr: 提出Schema-Adaptive Tabular Representation Learning方法，利用大语言模型创建可迁移的表格嵌入，用于可泛化的多模态临床推理，特别是痴呆症诊断任务。
AI.motivation: 表格数据的机器学习受限于模式泛化能力差，特别是在临床医学领域，电子健康记录模式差异显著，需要能够跨不同模式进行零样本对齐的解决方案。
AI.method: 将结构化变量转换为语义自然语言陈述，使用预训练大语言模型编码，创建可迁移的表格嵌入，并集成到结合表格数据和MRI数据的多模态框架中。
AI.result: 在NACC和ADNI数据集上实现最先进性能，成功零样本迁移到未见模式，在回顾性诊断任务中显著优于临床基线模型和经过认证的神经科医生。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为异构现实世界数据提供了可扩展、稳健的解决方案，为大语言模型推理扩展到结构化领域提供了有效途径。

title: The Non-Optimality of Scientific Knowledge: Path Dependence, Lock-In, and The Local Minimum Trap
summary: Science is widely regarded as humanity's most reliable method for uncovering truths about the natural world. Yet the \emph{trajectory} of scientific discovery is rarely examined as an optimization problem in its own right. This paper argues that the body of scientific knowledge, at any given historical moment, represents a \emph{local optimum} rather than a global one--that the frameworks, formalisms, and paradigms through which we understand nature are substantially shaped by historical contingency, cognitive path dependence, and institutional lock-in. Drawing an analogy to gradient descent in machine learning, we propose that science follows the steepest local gradient of tractability, empirical accessibility, and institutional reward, and in doing so may bypass fundamentally superior descriptions of nature. We develop this thesis through detailed case studies spanning mathematics, physics, chemistry, biology, neuroscience, and statistical methodology. We identify three interlocking mechanisms of lock-in--cognitive, formal, and institutional--and argue that recognizing these mechanisms is a prerequisite for designing meta-scientific strategies capable of escaping local optima. We conclude by proposing concrete interventions and discussing the epistemological implications of our thesis for the philosophy of science.

AI.tldr: 分析科学知识发展轨迹作为优化问题，论证科学知识体系在历史时刻仅代表局部最优而非全局最优
AI.motivation: 科学被视为揭示自然真理的最可靠方法，但其发现轨迹很少被作为优化问题来研究，需要探讨历史偶然性、认知路径依赖和制度锁定如何塑造科学框架
AI.method: 采用类比机器学习中的梯度下降方法，结合数学、物理、化学、生物学、神经科学和统计方法学的详细案例研究，识别认知、形式和制度三种锁定机制
AI.result: 科学遵循可处理性、经验可及性和制度奖励的局部最陡梯度，可能绕过本质上更优越的自然描述，识别出三种相互关联的锁定机制
AI.conclusion: 认识这些锁定机制是设计能够逃离局部最优的元科学策略的前提，提出了具体干预措施并讨论了科学哲学的认识论意义

title: QMC-Net: Data-Aware Quantum Representations for Remote Sensing Image Classification
