We release the system as open source to support scalable generation of language-motion paired data for humanoid robot learning.

AI.tldr: 开发CLAW系统，用于为Unitree G1人形机器人生成语言标注的全身运动数据
AI.motivation: 现有方法成本高、多样性有限，且文本到运动生成模型产生的纯运动学输出无法保证物理可行性
AI.method: 基于可组合运动模块的交互式Web管道，包含实时键盘模式和基于时间线的序列编辑器，结合低级全身控制器和确定性模板标注引擎
AI.result: 开发出开源系统，支持以50Hz频率记录物理基础轨迹，并为每个片段和完整轨迹生成多样化的自然语言描述
AI.conclusion: CLAW系统为人形机器人学习提供了可扩展的语言-运动配对数据生成解决方案，支持探索性和批量数据收集

title: Variational Latent Entropy Estimation Disentanglement: Controlled Attribute Leakage for Face Recognition
comment: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics and Security (TIFS). 13 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables
summary: Face recognition embeddings encode identity, but they also encode other factors such as gender and ethnicity. Depending on how these factors are used by a downstream system, separating them from the information needed for verification is important for both privacy and fairness. We propose Variational Latent Entropy Estimation Disentanglement (VLEED), a post-hoc method that transforms pretrained embeddings with a variational autoencoder and encourages a distilled representation where the categorical variable of interest is separated from identity-relevant information. VLEED uses a mutual information-based objective realised through the estimation of the entropy of the categorical attribute in the latent space, and provides stable training with fine-grained control over information removal. We evaluate our method on IJB-C, RFW, and VGGFace2 for gender and ethnicity disentanglement, and compare it to various state-of-the-art methods. We report verification utility, predictability of the disentangled variable under linear and nonlinear classifiers, and group disparity metrics based on false match rates. Our results show that VLEED offers a wide range of privacy-utility tradeoffs over existing methods and can also reduce recognition bias across demographic groups.

AI.tldr: 提出VLEED方法，通过变分自编码器和互信息目标，从人脸识别嵌入中分离身份信息与敏感属性（如性别、种族），实现可控的属性泄露。
AI.motivation: 人脸识别嵌入不仅编码身份信息，还包含性别、种族等敏感属性。这些属性可能被下游系统滥用，影响隐私和公平性，因此需要将其从验证所需信息中分离出来。
AI.method: 提出变分潜在熵估计解缠（VLEED），使用变分自编码器处理预训练嵌入，通过基于互信息的目标函数估计潜在空间中分类属性的熵，实现稳定训练和细粒度信息控制。
AI.result: 在IJB-C、RFW和VGGFace2数据集上评估性别和种族解缠效果，与多种先进方法比较。结果显示VLEED在隐私-效用权衡方面优于现有方法，并能减少跨人口群体的识别偏差。
AI.conclusion: VLEED方法能够有效分离人脸识别嵌入中的敏感属性，提供广泛的隐私-效用权衡选择，同时减少跨人口群体的识别偏差，为隐私保护和公平性提供有效解决方案。

title: Evolving Many Worlds: Towards Open-Ended Discovery in Petri Dish NCA via Population-Based Training
summary: The generation of sustained, open-ended complexity from local interactions remains a fundamental challenge in artificial life. Differentiable multi-agent systems, such as Petri Dish Neural Cellular Automata (PD-NCA), exhibit rich self-organization driven purely by spatial competition; however, they are highly sensitive to hyperparameters and frequently collapse into uninteresting patterns and dynamics, such as frozen equilibria or structureless noise. In this paper, we introduce PBT-NCA, a meta-evolutionary algorithm that evolves a population of PD-NCAs subject to a composite objective that rewards both historical behavioral novelty and contemporary visual diversity. Driven by this continuous evolutionary pressure, PBT-NCA spontaneously generates a plethora of emergent lifelike phenomena over extended horizons-a hallmark of true open-endedness. Strikingly, the substrate autonomously discovers diverse morphological survival and self-organization strategies. We observe highly regular, coordinated periodic waves; spore-like scattering where homogeneous groups eject cell-like clusters to colonize distant territories; and fluid, shape-shifting macro-structures that migrate across the substrate, maintaining stable outer boundaries that enclose highly active interiors. By actively penalizing monocultures and dead states, PBT-NCA sustains a state of effective complexity that is neither globally ordered nor globally random, operating persistently at the "edge of chaos".

AI.tldr: 本文提出PBT-NCA算法，通过基于种群的训练实现Petri Dish神经细胞自动机的开放式演化，旨在生成持续复杂的自组织模式。
AI.motivation: 传统可微分多智能体系统如PD-NCA对超参数敏感，容易陷入无趣的冻结平衡或无序噪声状态，缺乏持续开放的复杂性演化能力。
AI.method: 提出PBT-NCA元演化算法，通过种群演化PD-NCA，采用复合目标函数奖励历史行为新颖性和当代视觉多样性，持续施加演化压力。
AI.result: 算法自发产生多种类生命现象：周期性协调波、孢子状散射、流体状变形宏观结构等，系统在混沌边缘维持有效复杂性状态。
AI.conclusion: PBT-NCA能够实现真正的开放式演化，持续生成多样化的自组织策略，避免单一文化和死亡状态，在混沌边缘保持动态平衡。

title: Script-a-Video: Deep Structured Audio-visual Captions via Factorized Streams and Relational Grounding
summary: Advances in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) are transforming video captioning from a descriptive endpoint into a semantic interface for both video understanding and generation. However, the dominant paradigm still casts videos as monolithic narrative paragraphs that entangle visual, auditory, and identity information. This dense coupling not only compromises representational fidelity but also limits scalability, since even local edits can trigger global rewrites. To address this structural bottleneck, we propose Multi-Stream Scene Script (MTSS), a novel paradigm that replaces monolithic text with factorized and explicitly grounded scene descriptions. MTSS is built on two core principles: Stream Factorization, which decouples a video into complementary streams (Reference, Shot, Event, and Global), and Relational Grounding, which reconnects these isolated streams through explicit identity and temporal links to maintain holistic video consistency. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MTSS consistently enhances video understanding across various models, achieving an average reduction of 25% in the total error rate on Video-SALMONN-2 and an average performance gain of 67% on the Daily-Omni reasoning benchmark. It also narrows the performance gap between smaller and larger MLLMs, indicating a substantially more learnable caption interface. Finally, even without architectural adaptation, replacing monolithic prompts with MTSS in multi-shot video generation yields substantial human-rated improvements: a 45% boost in cross-shot identity consistency, a 56% boost in audio-visual alignment, and a 71% boost in temporal controllability.

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的视频描述范式MTSS，通过流分解和关系接地将视频分解为结构化多流场景脚本，以替代传统的单一叙事段落描述。
AI.motivation: 传统视频描述将视频视为单一叙事段落，纠缠视觉、听觉和身份信息，这种密集耦合不仅损害表示保真度，还限制可扩展性，因为局部编辑可能触发全局重写。
AI.method: 提出多流场景脚本（MTSS）范式，基于两个核心原则：流分解（将视频解耦为参考流、镜头流、事件流和全局流）和关系接地（通过显式身份和时间链接重新连接这些孤立流以保持视频整体一致性）。
AI.result: 实验表明MTSS显著提升视频理解性能，在Video-SALMONN-2上平均减少25%总错误率，在Daily-Omni推理基准上平均提升67%性能。在视频生成中，使用MTSS替代单一提示可获得45%跨镜头身份一致性提升、56%视听对齐提升和71%时间可控性提升。
AI.conclusion: MTSS提供了一种更结构化、可扩展的视频描述范式，不仅提升视频理解性能，还缩小不同规模MLLM之间的性能差距，为视频理解和生成提供更有效的语义接口。

title: Decoupled Similarity for Task-Aware Token Pruning in Large Vision-Language Models
summary: Token pruning has emerged as an effective approach to reduce the substantial computational overhead of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) by discarding less informative visual tokens while preserving performance. However, existing methods typically rely on individual attention sources from different LVLM components, resulting in incomplete and suboptimal pruning decisions due to biased attention distributions. To address this problem, we propose DeSAP, a novel Decoupled Similarity-Aware Pruning method for precise, task-aware token pruning within the visual encoder. Specifically, DeSAP introduces a decoupled similarity to capture fine-grained cross-modal relevance between visual features and text tokens, providing explicit task-related guidance for pruning. By integrating decoupled similarity with visual saliency signals derived from visual attention, DeSAP performs token pruning under the guidance of both task-related and visual cues, enabling robust pruning even under aggressive pruning ratios. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks and architectures show that DeSAP consistently outperforms SOTA methods in both accuracy and efficiency. On LLaVA-1.5-7B, DeSAP achieves a 10 times FLOPs reduction and a 2.3 times prefill speedup by retaining only 11.1% of visual tokens, while maintaining 98.1% of the original performance.

AI.tldr: 提出DeSAP方法，用于在大型视觉语言模型中实现任务感知的视觉令牌剪枝，以降低计算开销。
AI.motivation: 现有令牌剪枝方法依赖不同LVLM组件的注意力源，导致注意力分布偏差和不完整的剪枝决策，需要更精确的任务感知剪枝方法。
AI.method: 提出解耦相似性感知剪枝方法，通过解耦相似性捕获视觉特征与文本令牌之间的细粒度跨模态相关性，结合视觉显著性信号进行任务感知剪枝。
AI.result: 在LLaVA-1.5-7B上，仅保留11.1%视觉令牌即可实现10倍FLOPs减少和2.3倍预填充加速，同时保持98.1%原始性能，优于现有SOTA方法。
AI.conclusion: DeSAP方法通过解耦相似性和视觉显著性信号的结合，实现了高效且精确的任务感知令牌剪枝，在多种基准测试和架构中表现优异。

title: Bridging the RGB-IR Gap: Consensus and Discrepancy Modeling for Text-Guided Multispectral Detection
summary: Text-guided multispectral object detection uses text semantics to guide semantic-aware cross-modal interaction between RGB and IR for more robust perception. However, notable limitations remain: (1) existing methods often use text only as an auxiliary semantic enhancement signal, without exploiting its guiding role to bridge the inherent granularity asymmetry between RGB and IR; and (2) conventional data-driven attention-based fusion tends to emphasize stable consensus while overlooking potentially valuable cross-modal discrepancies. To address these issues, we propose a semantic bridge fusion framework with bi-support modeling for multispectral object detection. Specifically, text is used as a shared semantic bridge to align RGB and IR responses under a unified category condition, while the recalibrated thermal semantic prior is projected onto the RGB branch for semantic-level mapping fusion. We further formulate RGB-IR interaction evidence into the regular consensus support and the complementary discrepancy support that contains potentially discriminative cues, and introduce them into fusion via dynamic recalibration as a structured inductive bias. In addition, we design a bidirectional semantic alignment module for closed-loop vision-text guidance enhancement. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed fusion framework and its superior detection performance on multispectral benchmarks. Code is available at https://github.com/zhenwang5372/Bridging-RGB-IR-Gap.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于文本引导的多光谱目标检测方法，通过语义桥接融合框架解决RGB和红外图像之间的粒度不对称问题
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅将文本作为辅助语义增强信号，未能利用文本引导作用来弥合RGB和红外图像之间的固有粒度不对称；传统的数据驱动注意力融合倾向于强调稳定共识而忽略有价值的跨模态差异
AI.method: 提出语义桥接融合框架，使用文本作为共享语义桥接在统一类别条件下对齐RGB和红外响应；将重新校准的热语义先验投影到RGB分支进行语义级映射融合；将RGB-红外交互证据建模为常规共识支持和包含潜在判别线索的互补差异支持，并通过动态重新校准引入融合过程；设计双向语义对齐模块实现闭环视觉-文本引导增强
AI.result: 大量实验证明所提出的融合框架的有效性，在多光谱基准测试中展现出优越的检测性能
AI.conclusion: 提出的语义桥接融合框架通过共识和差异建模，有效解决了文本引导多光谱目标检测中的RGB-红外差距问题，实现了更鲁棒的感知性能

title: Seg2Change: Adapting Open-Vocabulary Semantic Segmentation Model for Remote Sensing Change Detection
summary: Change detection is a fundamental task in remote sensing, aiming to quantify the impacts of human activities and ecological dynamics on land-cover changes. Existing change detection methods are limited to predefined classes in training datasets, which constrains their scalability in real-world scenarios. In recent years, numerous advanced open-vocabulary semantic segmentation models have emerged for remote sensing imagery. However, there is still a lack of an effective framework for directly applying these models to open-vocabulary change detection (OVCD), a novel task that integrates vision and language to detect changes across arbitrary categories. To address these challenges, we first construct a category-agnostic change detection dataset, termed CA-CDD. Further, we design a category-agnostic change head to detect the transitions of arbitrary categories and index them to specific classes. Based on them, we propose Seg2Change, an adapter designed to adapt open-vocabulary semantic segmentation models to change detection task. Without bells and whistles, this simple yet effective framework achieves state-of-the-art OVCD performance (+9.52 IoU on WHU-CD and +5.50 mIoU on SECOND). Our code is released at https://github.com/yogurts-sy/Seg2Change.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出Seg2Change框架，将开放词汇语义分割模型适配到遥感变化检测任务中，实现任意类别的开放词汇变化检测。
AI.motivation: 现有变化检测方法局限于训练数据中的预定义类别，缺乏处理任意类别变化的能力。虽然已有先进的开放词汇语义分割模型，但缺乏将这些模型直接应用于开放词汇变化检测的有效框架。
AI.method: 首先构建类别无关的变化检测数据集CA-CDD，设计类别无关的变化检测头来检测任意类别的变化并将其索引到具体类别，提出Seg2Change适配器将开放词汇语义分割模型适配到变化检测任务。
AI.result: 该框架在WHU-CD数据集上提升了9.52 IoU，在SECOND数据集上提升了5.50 mIoU，实现了最先进的开放词汇变化检测性能。
AI.conclusion: Seg2Change是一个简单而有效的框架，成功将开放词汇语义分割模型适配到变化检测任务，解决了现有方法局限于预定义类别的问题，为遥感变化检测提供了更灵活和可扩展的解决方案。

authors: et al. (33 additional authors not shown)
title: NTIRE 2026 The 3rd Restore Any Image Model (RAIM) Challenge: AI Flash Portrait (Track 3)
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026 Workshop. Includes supplementary material as ancillary file
summary: In this paper, we present a comprehensive overview of the NTIRE 2026 3rd Restore Any Image Model (RAIM) challenge, with a specific focus on Track 3: AI Flash Portrait. Despite significant advancements in deep learning for image restoration, existing models still encounter substantial challenges in real-world low-light portrait scenarios. Specifically, they struggle to achieve an optimal balance among noise suppression, detail preservation, and faithful illumination and color reproduction. To bridge this gap, this challenge aims to establish a novel benchmark for real-world low-light portrait restoration. We comprehensively evaluate the proposed algorithms utilizing a hybrid evaluation system that integrates objective quantitative metrics with rigorous subjective assessment protocols. For this competition, we provide a dataset containing 800 groups of real-captured low-light portrait data. Each group consists of a 1K-resolution low-light input image, a 1K ground truth (GT), and a 1K person mask. This challenge has garnered widespread attention from both academia and industry, attracting over 100 participating teams and receiving more than 3,000 valid submissions. This report details the motivation behind the challenge, the dataset construction process, the evaluation metrics, and the various phases of the competition. The released dataset and baseline code for this track are publicly available from the same \href{https://github.com/zsn1434/AI_Flash-BaseLine/tree/main}{GitHub repository}, and the official challenge webpage is hosted on \href{https://www.codabench.org/competitions/12885/}{CodaBench}.

AI.tldr: NTIRE 2026第三届RAIM挑战赛的AI闪光人像赛道，专注于解决真实世界低光照人像恢复问题，建立新的基准测试。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在图像恢复方面取得显著进展，但现有模型在真实世界低光照人像场景中仍面临重大挑战，难以在噪声抑制、细节保留以及真实光照和色彩还原之间达到最佳平衡。
AI.method: 通过举办挑战赛建立新基准，提供包含800组真实拍摄低光照人像数据集，采用混合评估系统结合客观定量指标和严格主观评估协议，吸引学术界和工业界参与。
AI.result: 挑战赛获得广泛关注，吸引了超过100个参与团队和3000多个有效提交，建立了真实世界低光照人像恢复的新基准。
AI.conclusion: 该挑战赛成功建立了真实世界低光照人像恢复的新基准，推动了该领域的研究进展，数据集和基准代码已公开提供。

title: RECIPER: A Dual-View Retrieval Pipeline for Procedure-Oriented Materials Question Answering
summary: Retrieving procedure-oriented evidence from materials science papers is difficult because key synthesis details are often scattered across long, context-heavy documents and are not well captured by paragraph-only dense retrieval. We present RECIPER, a dual-view retrieval pipeline that indexes both paragraph-level context and compact large language model-extracted procedural summaries, then combines the two candidate streams with lightweight lexical reranking. Across four dense retrieval backbones, RECIPER consistently improves early-rank retrieval over paragraph-only dense retrieval, achieving average gains of +3.73 in Recall@1, +2.85 in nDCG@10, and +3.13 in MRR. With BGE-large-en-v1.5, it reaches 86.82%, 97.07%, and 97.85% on Recall@1, Recall@5, and Recall@10, respectively. We further observe improved downstream question answering under automatic metrics, suggesting that procedural summaries can serve as a useful complementary retrieval signal for procedure-oriented materials question answering. Code and data are available at https://github.com/ReaganWu/RECIPER.

AI.tldr: 提出RECIPER双视图检索管道，用于材料科学中面向过程的问答任务，通过结合段落级上下文和过程摘要来改进证据检索。
AI.motivation: 材料科学论文中关键合成细节通常分散在长文档中，段落级密集检索难以有效捕获这些过程信息，需要更好的检索方法。
AI.method: 采用双视图检索管道，同时索引段落级上下文和LLM提取的紧凑过程摘要，通过轻量级词汇重排序结合两个候选流。
AI.result: 在四个密集检索骨干网络上，RECIPER相比段落级检索平均提升Recall@1 3.73、nDCG@10 2.85、MRR 3.13，使用BGE-large-en-v1.5达到Recall@1 86.82%、Recall@5 97.07%、Recall@10 97.85%。
AI.conclusion: 过程摘要可作为面向过程材料问答的有用补充检索信号，双视图检索方法能显著提升早期排名检索效果，并改善下游问答性能。

title: Sign Language Recognition in the Age of LLMs
comment: Accepted at the CVPR 2026 Workshop on Multimodal Sign Language Research (MSLR), 8 pages, 3 figures
summary: Recent Vision Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated strong performance across a wide range of multimodal reasoning tasks. This raises the question of whether such general-purpose models can also address specialized visual recognition problems such as isolated sign language recognition (ISLR) without task-specific training. In this work, we investigate the capability of modern VLMs to perform ISLR in a zero-shot setting. We evaluate several open-source and proprietary VLMs on the WLASL300 benchmark. Our experiments show that, under prompt-only zero-shot inference, current open-source VLMs remain far behind classic supervised ISLR classifiers by a wide margin. However, follow-up experiments reveal that these models capture partial visual-semantic alignment between signs and text descriptions. Larger proprietary models achieve substantially higher accuracy, highlighting the importance of model scale and training data diversity. All our code is publicly available on GitHub.

AI.tldr: 研究现代视觉语言模型在零样本设置下执行孤立手语识别的能力
AI.motivation: 探索通用视觉语言模型是否能在无需任务特定训练的情况下解决手语识别等专门视觉识别问题
AI.method: 在WLASL300基准上评估多个开源和专有视觉语言模型的零样本性能
AI.result: 开源模型在零样本推理下远落后于经典监督分类器，但捕获了部分视觉语义对齐；大型专有模型准确率显著更高
AI.conclusion: 模型规模和训练数据多样性对零样本手语识别性能至关重要，当前开源模型仍有较大改进空间

title: Regional Explanations: Bridging Local and Global Variable Importance
comment: Accepted at the 39th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2025)
summary: We analyze two widely used local attribution methods, Local Shapley Values and LIME, which aim to quantify the contribution of a feature value $x_i$ to a specific prediction $f(x_1, \dots, x_p)$. Despite their widespread use, we identify fundamental limitations in their ability to reliably detect locally important features, even under ideal conditions with exact computations and independent features. We argue that a sound local attribution method should not assign importance to features that neither influence the model output (e.g., features with zero coefficients in a linear model) nor exhibit statistical dependence with functionality-relevant features. We demonstrate that both Local SV and LIME violate this fundamental principle. To address this, we propose R-LOCO (Regional Leave Out COvariates), which bridges the gap between local and global explanations and provides more accurate attributions. R-LOCO segments the input space into regions with similar feature importance characteristics. It then applies global attribution methods within these regions, deriving an instance's feature contributions from its regional membership. This approach delivers more faithful local attributions while avoiding local explanation instability and preserving instance-specific detail often lost in global methods.

AI.tldr: 分析两种广泛使用的局部归因方法（局部Shapley值和LIME）的局限性，并提出R-LOCO方法以提供更准确的局部特征重要性解释
AI.motivation: 现有局部归因方法（Local Shapley Values和LIME）即使在理想条件下也无法可靠检测局部重要特征，会错误地将重要性分配给不影响模型输出的特征或与功能相关特征无关的特征
AI.method: 提出R-LOCO（区域留出协变量）方法，将输入空间分割为具有相似特征重要性特征的区域，然后在区域内应用全局归因方法，从实例的区域成员资格推导其特征贡献
AI.result: R-LOCO方法能够提供更忠实的局部归因，避免局部解释的不稳定性，同时保留全局方法中常丢失的实例特定细节
AI.conclusion: R-LOCO方法在局部和全局解释之间架起桥梁，解决了现有局部归因方法的基本缺陷，提供了更准确的特征重要性评估

title: H-SPAM: Hierarchical Superpixel Anything Model
summary: Superpixels offer a compact image representation by grouping pixels into coherent regions. Recent methods have reached a plateau in terms of segmentation accuracy by generating noisy superpixel shapes. Moreover, most existing approaches produce a single fixed-scale partition that limits their use in vision pipelines that would benefit multi-scale representations. In this work, we introduce H-SPAM (Hierarchical Superpixel Anything Model), a unified framework for generating accurate, regular, and perfectly nested hierarchical superpixels. Starting from a fine partition, guided by deep features and external object priors, H-SPAM constructs the hierarchy through a two-phase region merging process that first preserves object consistency and then allows controlled inter-object grouping. The hierarchy can also be modulated using visual attention maps or user input to preserve important regions longer in the hierarchy. Experiments on standard benchmarks show that H-SPAM strongly outperforms existing hierarchical methods in both accuracy and regularity, while performing on par with most recent state-of-the-art non-hierarchical methods. Code and pretrained models are available: https://github.com/waldo-j/hspam.

AI.tldr: 提出H-SPAM模型，用于生成准确、规则且完美嵌套的层次化超像素分割
AI.motivation: 现有超像素方法存在两个主要问题：一是分割精度达到瓶颈，生成形状噪声大；二是大多只能生成单一尺度的分割，缺乏多尺度表示能力，限制了在视觉管道中的应用
AI.method: H-SPAM采用统一框架，从精细分割开始，利用深度特征和外部对象先验指导，通过两阶段区域合并过程构建层次结构：第一阶段保持对象一致性，第二阶段允许受控的对象间分组，还可使用视觉注意力图或用户输入调制层次结构
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中，H-SPAM在准确性和规则性方面显著优于现有层次化方法，同时与最先进的非层次化方法性能相当
AI.conclusion: H-SPAM提供了一个有效的层次化超像素生成框架，能够产生准确、规则且完美嵌套的分割结果，支持多尺度表示和用户交互调制

title: Measuring the Authority Stack of AI Systems: Empirical Analysis of 366,120 Forced-Choice Responses Across 8 AI Models
comment: 18 pages, 15 tables, no figures. AIO Working Paper. Companion to: S. Lee (2026a)
summary: What values, evidence preferences, and source trust hierarchies do AI systems actually exhibit when facing structured dilemmas? We present the first large-scale empirical mapping of AI decision-making across all three layers of the Authority Stack framework (S. Lee, 2026a): value priorities (L4), evidence-type preferences (L3), and source trust hierarchies (L2). Using the PRISM benchmark -- a forced-choice instrument of 14,175 unique scenarios per layer, spanning 7 professional domains, 3 severity levels, 3 decision timeframes, and 5 scenario variants -- we evaluated 8 major AI models at temperature 0, yielding 366,120 total responses. Key findings include: (1) a symmetric 4:4 split between Universalism-first and Security-first models at L4; (2) dramatic defense-domain value restructuring where Security surges to near-ceiling win-rates (95.1%-99.8%) in 6 of 8 models; (3) divergent evidence hierarchies at L3, with some models favoring empirical-scientific evidence while others prefer pattern-based or experiential evidence; (4) broad convergence on institutional source trust at L2; and (5) Paired Consistency Scores (PCS) ranging from 57.4% to 69.2%, revealing substantial framing sensitivity across scenario variants. Test-Retest Reliability (TRR) ranges from 91.7% to 98.6%, indicating that value instability stems primarily from variant sensitivity rather than stochastic noise. These findings demonstrate that AI models possess measurable -- if sometimes unstable -- Authority Stacks with consequential implications for deployment across professional domains.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过大规模实证研究测量了AI系统在结构化困境中的权威层级决策模式，包括价值优先级、证据类型偏好和来源信任层级。
AI.motivation: 了解AI系统在面对结构化困境时实际展现的价值观、证据偏好和来源信任层级，为AI系统在不同专业领域的部署提供实证基础。
AI.method: 使用PRISM基准测试工具，包含每层14,175个独特场景，涵盖7个专业领域、3个严重程度、3个决策时间框架和5个场景变体，评估8个主要AI模型，共收集366,120个强制选择响应。
AI.result: 发现AI模型在L4层呈现普遍主义优先与安全优先的4:4对称分布；在国防领域安全价值显著提升；L3层证据偏好存在分歧；L2层对制度来源信任广泛趋同；配对一致性分数显示显著的框架敏感性。
AI.conclusion: AI模型具有可测量但有时不稳定的权威层级结构，这对跨专业领域的部署具有重要影响，表明需要进一步研究AI决策的稳定性和一致性。

title: 3DTV: A Feedforward Interpolation Network for Real-Time View Synthesis
summary: Real-time free-viewpoint rendering requires balancing multi-camera redundancy with the latency constraints of interactive applications. We address this challenge by combining lightweight geometry with learning and propose 3DTV, a feedforward network for real-time sparse-view interpolation. A Delaunay-based triplet selection ensures angular coverage for each target view. Building on this, we introduce a pose-aware depth module that estimates a coarse-to-fine depth pyramid, enabling efficient feature reprojection and occlusion-aware blending. Unlike methods that require scene-specific optimization, 3DTV runs feedforward without retraining, making it practical for AR/VR, telepresence, and interactive applications. Our experiments on challenging multi-view video datasets demonstrate that 3DTV consistently achieves a strong balance of quality and efficiency, outperforming recent real-time novel-view baselines. Crucially, 3DTV avoids explicit proxies, enabling robust rendering across diverse scenes. This makes it a practical solution for low-latency multi-view streaming and interactive rendering. Project Page: https://stefanmschulz.github.io/3DTV_webpage/

AI.tldr: 提出3DTV网络，用于实时稀疏视图插值，实现自由视点渲染
AI.motivation: 实时自由视点渲染需要在多相机冗余和交互应用的低延迟约束之间取得平衡，现有方法需要场景特定优化，不适用于AR/VR、远程呈现和交互应用
AI.method: 结合轻量几何与学习，使用Delaunay三元组选择确保目标视图角度覆盖，引入姿态感知深度模块估计粗到细深度金字塔，实现高效特征重投影和遮挡感知融合
AI.result: 在挑战性多视图视频数据集上，3DTV在质量和效率之间取得良好平衡，优于最近的实时新视图基线方法，无需显式代理即可实现跨多样场景的鲁棒渲染
AI.conclusion: 3DTV提供了一种实用的低延迟多视图流和交互渲染解决方案，无需重新训练即可前馈运行，适用于AR/VR、远程呈现和交互应用

title: Exploring Knowledge Conflicts for Faithful LLM Reasoning: Benchmark and Method
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable success across a wide range of applications especially when augmented by external knowledge through retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). Despite their widespread adoption, recent studies have shown that LLMs often struggle to perform faithful reasoning when conflicting knowledge is retrieved. However, existing work primarily focuses on conflicts between external knowledge and the parametric knowledge of LLMs, leaving conflicts across external knowledge largely unexplored. Meanwhile, modern RAG systems increasingly emphasize the integration of unstructured text and (semi-)structured data like knowledge graphs (KGs) to improve knowledge completeness and reasoning faithfulness. To address this gap, we introduce ConflictQA, a novel benchmark that systematically instantiates conflicts between textual evidence and KG evidence. Extensive evaluations across representative LLMs reveal that, facing such cross-source conflicts, LLMs often fail to identify reliable evidence for correct reasoning. Instead, LLMs become more sensitive to prompting choices and tend to rely exclusively on either KG or textual evidence, resulting in incorrect responses. Based on these findings, we further propose XoT, a two-stage explanation-based thinking framework tailored for reasoning over heterogeneous conflicting evidence, and verify its effectiveness with extensive experiments.

AI.tldr: 该论文的主要任务是研究大语言模型在面临异构知识冲突时的忠实推理问题，并提出相应的基准和方法来解决这一问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注外部知识与LLMs参数知识之间的冲突，而忽略了不同外部知识源（如文本与知识图谱）之间的冲突。现代RAG系统越来越强调整合非结构化文本和（半）结构化数据以提高知识完整性和推理忠实性，因此需要系统研究跨源知识冲突问题。
AI.method: 论文首先引入ConflictQA基准，系统化实例化文本证据与知识图谱证据之间的冲突。然后提出XoT框架，这是一个两阶段的基于解释的思维框架，专门用于处理异构冲突证据的推理。
AI.result: 对代表性LLMs的广泛评估显示，面对跨源知识冲突时，LLMs往往无法识别可靠证据进行正确推理，而是对提示选择更加敏感，倾向于仅依赖KG或文本证据，导致错误响应。XoT框架通过实验验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了LLMs在处理异构知识冲突时的局限性，提出的ConflictQA基准和XoT框架为解决这一问题提供了有效工具，有助于提高LLMs在复杂知识环境下的推理忠实性。

authors: et al. (5 additional authors not shown)
title: LoViF 2026 Challenge on Human-oriented Semantic Image Quality Assessment: Methods and Results
comment: Accepted by CVPR2026 Workshop; LoViF Challenge
summary: This paper reviews the LoViF 2026 Challenge on Human-oriented Semantic Image Quality Assessment. This challenge aims to raise a new direction, i.e., how to evaluate the loss of semantic information from the human perspective, intending to promote the development of some new directions, like semantic coding, processing, and semantic-oriented optimization, etc. Unlike existing datasets of quality assessment, we form a dataset of human-oriented semantic quality assessment, termed the SeIQA dataset. This dataset is divided into three parts for this competition: (i) training data: 510 pairs of degraded images and their corresponding ground truth references; (ii) validation data: 80 pairs of degraded images and their corresponding ground-truth references; (iii) testing data: 160 pairs of degraded images and their corresponding ground-truth references. The primary objective of this challenge is to establish a new and powerful benchmark for human-oriented semantic image quality assessment. There are a total of 58 teams registered in this competition, and 6 teams submitted valid solutions and fact sheets for the final testing phase. These submissions achieved state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance on the SeIQA dataset.

AI.tldr: LoViF 2026挑战赛旨在推动面向人类的语义图像质量评估，建立新的基准数据集和评估方法。
AI.motivation: 现有图像质量评估方法缺乏从人类视角评估语义信息损失的能力，需要推动语义编码、处理和优化等新方向的发展。
AI.method: 创建了SeIQA数据集，包含训练、验证和测试三部分，共750对退化图像与参考图像，并组织58支团队参与竞赛。
AI.result: 6支团队提交了有效解决方案，在SeIQA数据集上取得了最先进的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 该挑战赛成功建立了面向人类的语义图像质量评估新基准，促进了该领域的发展。

title: Designing Adaptive Digital Nudging Systems with LLM-Driven Reasoning
summary: Digital nudging systems lack architectural guidance for translating behavioral science into software design. While research identifies nudge strategies and quality attributes, existing architectures fail to integrate multi-dimensional user modeling with ethical compliance as architectural concerns. We present an architecture that uses behavioral theory through explicit architectural decisions, treating ethics and fairness as structural guardrails rather than implementation details. A literature review synthesized 68 nudging strategies, 11 quality attributes, and 3 user profiling dimensions into architectural requirements. The architecture implements sequential processing layers with cross-cutting evaluation modules enforcing regulatory compliance. Validation with 13 software architects confirmed requirements satisfaction and domain transferability. An LLM-powered proof-of-concept in residential energy sustainability demonstrated feasibility through evaluation with 15 users, achieving high perceived intervention quality and measurable positive emotional impact. This work bridges behavioral science and software architecture by providing reusable patterns for adaptive systems that balance effectiveness with ethical constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文的主要任务是设计一个基于LLM驱动的自适应数字助推系统架构，将行为科学理论转化为软件设计指导，并集成伦理合规作为架构关注点。
AI.motivation: 现有数字助推系统缺乏将行为科学转化为软件设计的架构指导，现有架构未能将多维用户建模与伦理合规作为架构关注点进行整合。
AI.method: 通过文献综述综合了68种助推策略、11个质量属性和3个用户画像维度作为架构需求，设计了具有交叉评估模块的顺序处理层架构，并使用LLM驱动的概念验证在住宅能源可持续性领域进行验证。
AI.result: 13位软件架构师验证确认了需求满足和领域可转移性，15名用户的评估显示系统实现了高感知干预质量和可测量的积极情感影响。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作通过提供可重用的模式，在行为科学与软件架构之间架起桥梁，为平衡有效性与伦理约束的自适应系统提供了架构解决方案。

authors: et al. (7 additional authors not shown)
title: CocoaBench: Evaluating Unified Digital Agents in the Wild
summary: LLM agents now perform strongly in software engineering, deep research, GUI automation, and various other applications, while recent agent scaffolds and models are increasingly integrating these capabilities into unified systems. Yet, most evaluations still test these capabilities in isolation, which leaves a gap for more diverse use cases that require agents to combine different capabilities. We introduce CocoaBench, a benchmark for unified digital agents built from human-designed, long-horizon tasks that require flexible composition of vision, search, and coding. Tasks are specified only by an instruction and an automatic evaluation function over the final output, enabling reliable and scalable evaluation across diverse agent infrastructures. We also present CocoaAgent, a lightweight shared scaffold for controlled comparison across model backbones. Experiments show that current agents remain far from reliable on CocoaBench, with the best evaluated system achieving only 45.1% success rate. Our analysis further points to substantial room for improvement in reasoning and planning, tool use and execution, and visual grounding.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了CocoaBench基准测试，用于评估能够结合视觉、搜索和编码能力的统一数字智能体在复杂长时程任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM智能体在软件工程、深度研究和GUI自动化等领域表现出色，但现有评估方法通常孤立测试各项能力，缺乏对需要组合多种能力的多样化用例的评估，因此需要创建能够评估统一数字智能体综合能力的基准测试。
AI.method: 提出了CocoaBench基准测试，包含人类设计的长时程任务，需要智能体灵活组合视觉、搜索和编码能力；任务仅通过指令和最终输出的自动评估函数来指定；同时开发了CocoaAgent轻量级共享框架，用于在不同模型骨干之间进行受控比较。
AI.result: 实验表明当前智能体在CocoaBench上的表现远未达到可靠水平，最佳评估系统仅达到45.1%的成功率；分析进一步指出在推理规划、工具使用执行和视觉基础方面仍有巨大改进空间。
AI.conclusion: CocoaBench为评估统一数字智能体提供了可靠的基准测试，揭示了当前系统在复杂任务中的局限性，并为未来智能体开发指明了改进方向，特别是在多能力组合方面。

title: ShapShift: Explaining Model Prediction Shifts with Subgroup Conditional Shapley Values
summary: Changes in input distribution can induce shifts in the average predictions of machine learning models. Such prediction shifts may impact downstream business outcomes (e.g. a bank's loan approval rate), so understanding their causes can be crucial. We propose \ours{}: a Shapley value method for attributing prediction shifts to changes in the conditional probabilities of interpretable subgroups of data, where these subgroups are defined by the structure of decision trees. We initially apply this method to single decision trees, providing exact explanations based on conditional probability changes at split nodes. Next, we extend it to tree ensembles by selecting the most explanatory tree and accounting for residual effects. Finally, we propose a model-agnostic variant using surrogate trees grown with a novel objective function, allowing application to models like neural networks. While exact computation can be intensive, approximation techniques enable practical application. We show that \ours{} provides simple, faithful, and near-complete explanations of prediction shifts across model classes, aiding model monitoring in dynamic environments.

AI.tldr: 提出ShapShift方法，用于解释机器学习模型预测偏移的原因，将预测变化归因于可解释数据子组的条件概率变化。
AI.motivation: 输入分布变化会导致模型平均预测发生偏移，这可能影响下游业务结果（如银行贷款批准率），理解这些偏移的原因对模型监控至关重要。
AI.method: 基于Shapley值的方法，通过决策树结构定义可解释数据子组，将预测偏移归因于这些子组条件概率的变化。首先应用于单决策树，然后扩展到树集成，最后提出模型无关变体使用代理树。
AI.result: ShapShift方法能够为预测偏移提供简单、忠实且接近完整的解释，适用于多种模型类别，有助于动态环境中的模型监控。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够有效解释模型预测偏移的原因，通过可解释的子组条件概率变化提供清晰的归因，支持在动态环境中进行模型监控和分析。

title: MedP-CLIP: Medical CLIP with Region-Aware Prompt Integration
summary: Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) has demonstrated outstanding performance in global image understanding and zero-shot transfer through large-scale text-image alignment. However, the core of medical image analysis often lies in the fine-grained understanding of specific anatomical structures or lesion regions. Therefore, precisely comprehending region-of-interest (RoI) information provided by medical professionals or perception models becomes crucial. To address this need, we propose MedP-CLIP, a region-aware medical vision-language model (VLM). MedP-CLIP innovatively integrates medical prior knowledge and designs a feature-level region prompt integration mechanism, enabling it to flexibly respond to various prompt forms (e.g., points, bounding boxes, masks) while maintaining global contextual awareness when focusing on local regions. We pre-train the model on a meticulously constructed large-scale dataset (containing over 6.4 million medical images and 97.3 million region-level annotations), equipping it with cross-disease and cross-modality fine-grained spatial semantic understanding capabilities. Experiments demonstrate that MedP-CLIP significantly outperforms baseline methods in various medical tasks, including zero-shot recognition, interactive segmentation, and empowering multimodal large language models. This model provides a scalable, plug-and-play visual backbone for medical AI, combining holistic image understanding with precise regional analysis.

AI.tldr: 提出MedP-CLIP，一种区域感知的医学视觉语言模型，旨在解决医学图像分析中需要精细理解特定解剖结构或病变区域的问题。
AI.motivation: 标准CLIP在全局图像理解方面表现出色，但医学图像分析的核心在于对特定解剖结构或病变区域的细粒度理解。医学专业人员或感知模型提供的感兴趣区域信息需要被精确理解。
AI.method: 提出MedP-CLIP模型，创新性地整合医学先验知识，设计特征级区域提示集成机制，能够灵活响应各种提示形式（如点、边界框、掩码），同时在关注局部区域时保持全局上下文感知。在精心构建的大规模数据集上进行预训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，MedP-CLIP在多种医学任务中显著优于基线方法，包括零样本识别、交互式分割和赋能多模态大语言模型。模型在包含640万医学图像和9730万区域级标注的数据集上预训练。
AI.conclusion: MedP-CLIP为医学AI提供了一个可扩展、即插即用的视觉骨干网络，结合了整体图像理解和精确区域分析，具备跨疾病和跨模态的细粒度空间语义理解能力。

title: Towards Adaptive Open-Set Object Detection via Category-Level Collaboration Knowledge Mining
comment: 15 pages,9 figures,accepted by IEEE Transactions on Image Processing
summary: Existing object detectors often struggle to generalize across domains while adapting to emerging novel categories. Adaptive open-set object detection (AOOD) addresses this challenge by training on base categories in the source domain and adapting to both base and novel categories in the target domain without target annotations. However, current AOOD methods remain limited by weak cross-domain representations, ambiguity among novel categories, and source-domain feature bias. To address these issues, we propose a category-level collaboration knowledge mining strategy that exploits both inter-class and intra-class relationships across domains. Specifically, we construct a clustering-based memory bank to encode class prototypes, auxiliary features, and intra-class disparity information, and iteratively update it via unsupervised clustering to enhance category-level knowledge representation. We further design a base-to-novel selection metric to discover source-domain features related to novel categories and use them to initialize novel-category classifiers. In addition, an adaptive feature assignment strategy transfers the learned category-level knowledge to the target domain and asynchronously updates the memory bank to alleviate source-domain bias. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks show that our method consistently surpasses state-of-the-art AOOD methods by 1.1-5.5 mAP.

AI.tldr: 提出一种自适应开放集目标检测方法，通过类别级协作知识挖掘解决跨域泛化和新兴类别适应问题
AI.motivation: 现有目标检测器在跨域泛化和适应新兴类别方面存在困难，自适应开放集目标检测方法面临跨域表示弱、新类别模糊性和源域特征偏差等限制
AI.method: 提出类别级协作知识挖掘策略，利用跨域的类间和类内关系；构建基于聚类的记忆库编码类别原型、辅助特征和类内差异信息；设计基类到新类的选择度量发现与新类别相关的源域特征；采用自适应特征分配策略转移类别级知识
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上的实验表明，该方法始终优于最先进的自适应开放集目标检测方法，性能提升1.1-5.5 mAP
AI.conclusion: 提出的类别级协作知识挖掘策略有效解决了自适应开放集目标检测中的跨域表示弱、新类别模糊性和源域偏差问题，显著提升了检测性能

title: MathAgent: Adversarial Evolution of Constraint Graphs for Mathematical Reasoning Data Synthesis
summary: Synthesizing high-quality mathematical reasoning data without human priors remains a significant challenge. Current approaches typically rely on seed data mutation or simple prompt engineering, often suffering from mode collapse and limited logical complexity. This paper proposes a hierarchical synthesis framework that formulates data synthesis as an unsupervised optimization problem over a constraint graph followed by semantic instantiation, rather than treating it as a direct text generation task. We introduce a Legislator-Executor paradigm: The Legislator adversarially evolves structured generation blueprints encoding the constraints of the problem, while the Executor instantiates these specifications into diverse natural language scenarios. This decoupling of skeleton design from linguistic realization enables a prioritized focus on constructing complex and diverse logical structures, thereby guiding high-quality data synthesis. Experiments conducted on a total of 10 models across the Qwen, Llama, Mistral, and Gemma series demonstrate that our method achieves notable results: models fine-tuned on 1K synthesized samples outperform widely-used datasets of comparable scale (LIMO, s1K) across eight mathematical benchmarks, exhibiting superior out-of-distribution generalization.

AI.tldr: 提出一种无监督的数学推理数据合成框架，通过约束图对抗演化生成高质量数学问题数据
AI.motivation: 当前数学推理数据合成方法依赖种子数据突变或简单提示工程，存在模式崩溃和逻辑复杂度有限的问题，需要更有效的数据合成方法
AI.method: 采用立法者-执行者范式：立法者对抗演化编码问题约束的结构化生成蓝图，执行者将这些规范实例化为多样化自然语言场景，分离骨架设计与语言实现
AI.result: 在Qwen、Llama、Mistral和Gemma系列共10个模型上实验，使用1K合成样本微调的模型在八个数学基准上优于可比规模数据集，表现出优越的分布外泛化能力
AI.conclusion: 提出的分层合成框架通过约束图对抗演化和语义实例化，能够生成高质量数学推理数据，显著提升模型性能

title: Taking a Pulse on How Generative AI is Reshaping the Software Engineering Research Landscape
summary: Context: Software engineering (SE) researchers increasingly study Generative AI (GenAI) while also incorporating it into their own research practices. Despite rapid adoption, there is limited empirical evidence on how GenAI is used in SE research and its implications for research practices and governance. Aims: We conduct a large-scale survey of 457 SE researchers publishing in top venues between 2023 and 2025. Method: Using quantitative and qualitative analyses, we examine who uses GenAI and why, where it is used across research activities, and how researchers perceive its benefits, opportunities, challenges, risks, and governance. Results: GenAI use is widespread, with many researchers reporting pressure to adopt and align their work with it. Usage is concentrated in writing and early-stage activities, while methodological and analytical tasks remain largely human-driven. Although productivity gains are widely perceived, concerns about trust, correctness, and regulatory uncertainty persist. Researchers highlight risks such as inaccuracies and bias, emphasize mitigation through human oversight and verification, and call for clearer governance, including guidance on responsible use and peer review. Conclusion: We provide a fine-grained, SE-specific characterization of GenAI use across research activities, along with taxonomies of GenAI use cases for research and peer review, opportunities, risks, mitigation strategies, and governance needs. These findings establish an empirical baseline for the responsible integration of GenAI into academic practice.

AI.tldr: 对457名软件工程研究人员进行大规模调查，分析生成式AI在软件工程研究中的使用现状、影响及治理需求
AI.motivation: 尽管生成式AI在软件工程研究中迅速普及，但缺乏关于其实际使用情况、对研究实践和治理影响的实证证据
AI.method: 对2023-2025年间在顶级会议发表论文的457名软件工程研究人员进行大规模调查，采用定量和定性分析方法
AI.result: 生成式AI使用广泛，主要集中在写作和早期研究活动；研究人员感受到采用压力，虽然认可生产力提升，但担忧准确性、偏见和监管不确定性；提出了风险缓解策略和治理需求
AI.conclusion: 提供了软件工程研究中生成式AI使用的细粒度特征分析，建立了负责任整合生成式AI到学术实践的实证基准，包括使用案例分类、机会、风险、缓解策略和治理需求

title: Do Thought Streams Matter? Evaluating Reasoning in Gemini Vision-Language Models for Video Scene Understanding
summary: We benchmark how internal reasoning traces, which we call thought streams, affect video scene understanding in vision-language models. Using four configurations of Google's Gemini 2.5 Flash and Flash Lite across scenes extracted from 100 hours of video, we ask three questions: does more thinking lead to better outputs, where do the gains stop, and what do these models actually think about? We introduce three evaluation metrics. Contentfulness measures how much of the thought stream is useful scene content versus meta-commentary. Thought-Final Coverage measures how faithfully the thought stream translates into the final output. Dominant Entity Analysis identifies which subjects, actions, and settings the model focuses on. GPT-5 serves as an independent judge. We find that quality gains from additional thinking plateau quickly, with most improvement occurring in the first few hundred tokens. Flash Lite offers the best balance between quality and token usage. Tight reasoning budgets cause the model to add content in the final output that it never reasoned about, a form of compression-step hallucination. Despite being different model tiers, Flash and Flash Lite produce similar thought streams, though they differ in style: Flash discusses its reasoning process, while Lite focuses on describing the scene.

AI.tldr: 评估Gemini视觉语言模型中内部推理轨迹（思维流）对视频场景理解的影响
AI.motivation: 研究思维流如何影响视觉语言模型的视频场景理解能力，探索更多思考是否带来更好输出、增益何时停止以及模型实际思考内容
AI.method: 使用Gemini 2.5 Flash和Flash Lite四种配置，从100小时视频中提取场景，引入三个评估指标：内容充实度、思维-最终覆盖度、主导实体分析，GPT-5作为独立评判者
AI.result: 额外思考带来的质量增益快速达到平台期，大部分改进发生在最初几百个token；Flash Lite在质量和token使用之间达到最佳平衡；紧凑推理预算导致模型在最终输出中添加未推理内容（压缩步骤幻觉）；Flash和Flash Lite思维流相似但风格不同
AI.conclusion: 思维流对视频场景理解有影响但增益有限，Flash Lite提供最佳性价比，推理预算限制可能导致幻觉，不同模型层级产生相似但风格各异的思维流

title: Precision Synthesis of Multi-Tracer PET via VLM-Modulated Rectified Flow for Stratifying Mild Cognitive Impairment
summary: The biological definition of Alzheimer's disease (AD) relies on multi-modal neuroimaging, yet the clinical utility of positron emission tomography (PET) is limited by cost and radiation exposure, hindering early screening at preclinical or prodromal stages. While generative models offer a promising alternative by synthesizing PET from magnetic resonance imaging (MRI), achieving subject-specific precision remains a primary challenge. Here, we introduce DIReCT$++$, a Domain-Informed ReCTified flow model for synthesizing multi-tracer PET from MRI combined with fundamental clinical information. Our approach integrates a 3D rectified flow architecture to capture complex cross-modal and cross-tracer relationships with a domain-adapted vision-language model (BiomedCLIP) that provides text-guided, personalized generation using clinical scores and imaging knowledge. Extensive evaluations on multi-center datasets demonstrate that DIReCT$++$ not only produces synthetic PET images ($^{18}$F-AV-45 and $^{18}$F-FDG) of superior fidelity and generalizability but also accurately recapitulates disease-specific patterns. Crucially, combining these synthesized PET images with MRI enables precise personalized stratification of mild cognitive impairment (MCI), advancing a scalable, data-efficient tool for the early diagnosis and prognostic prediction of AD. The source code will be released on https://github.com/ladderlab-xjtu/DIReCT-PLUS.

AI.tldr: 开发DIReCT++模型，通过结合MRI和临床信息合成多示踪剂PET图像，用于轻度认知障碍的精准分层
AI.motivation: 阿尔茨海默病的生物学定义依赖多模态神经影像，但PET成像成本高且存在辐射暴露，限制了临床前或前驱期的早期筛查。生成模型虽然可以从MRI合成PET，但实现个体化精准合成仍面临挑战。
AI.method: 提出DIReCT++模型，结合3D整流流架构捕获跨模态和跨示踪剂复杂关系，并集成领域适应的视觉语言模型BiomedCLIP，利用临床评分和影像知识提供文本引导的个性化生成。
AI.result: 在多中心数据集上的广泛评估表明，DIReCT++不仅能生成高保真度和泛化性的合成PET图像（¹⁸F-AV-45和¹⁸F-FDG），还能准确复现疾病特异性模式。结合合成PET与MRI能实现轻度认知障碍的精准个性化分层。
AI.conclusion: DIReCT++为阿尔茨海默病的早期诊断和预后预测提供了一个可扩展、数据高效的工具，推动了临床前筛查的实用化进程。

title: EmbodiedGovBench: A Benchmark for Governance, Recovery, and Upgrade Safety in Embodied Agent Systems
summary: Recent progress in embodied AI has produced a growing ecosystem of robot policies, foundation models, and modular runtimes. However, current evaluation remains dominated by task success metrics such as completion rate or manipulation accuracy. These metrics leave a critical gap: they do not measure whether embodied systems are governable -- whether they respect capability boundaries, enforce policies, recover safely, maintain audit trails, and respond to human oversight. We present EmbodiedGovBench, a benchmark for governance-oriented evaluation of embodied agent systems. Rather than asking only whether a robot can complete a task, EmbodiedGovBench evaluates whether the system remains controllable, policy-bounded, recoverable, auditable, and evolution-safe under realistic perturbations. The benchmark covers seven governance dimensions: unauthorized capability invocation, runtime drift robustness, recovery success, policy portability, version upgrade safety, human override responsiveness, and audit completeness. We define a benchmark structure spanning single-robot and fleet settings, with scenario templates, perturbation operators, governance metrics, and baseline evaluation protocols. We describe how the benchmark can be instantiated over embodied capability runtimes with modular interfaces and contract-aware upgrade workflows. Our analysis suggests that embodied governance should become a first-class evaluation target. EmbodiedGovBench provides the initial measurement framework for that shift.

AI.tldr: 提出EmbodiedGovBench基准，用于评估具身智能体系统的治理能力，包括控制性、策略边界、可恢复性、可审计性和升级安全性等七个治理维度。
AI.motivation: 当前具身AI评估主要关注任务成功率，忽视了系统是否可治理的关键问题，如是否尊重能力边界、执行策略、安全恢复、维护审计轨迹和响应人类监督。
AI.method: 设计了一个基准框架，涵盖七个治理维度：未授权能力调用、运行时漂移鲁棒性、恢复成功率、策略可移植性、版本升级安全性、人类覆盖响应性和审计完整性，包含场景模板、扰动操作符、治理指标和基线评估协议。
AI.result: 提出了EmbodiedGovBench基准，为具身治理评估提供了初始测量框架，支持单机器人和集群设置，可实例化到具身能力运行时和模块化接口中。
AI.conclusion: 具身治理应成为首要评估目标，EmbodiedGovBench为实现这一转变提供了初始测量框架，填补了当前评估中的关键空白。

title: NeuVolEx: Implicit Neural Features for Volume Exploration
summary: Direct volume rendering (DVR) aims to help users identify and examine regions of interest (ROIs) within volumetric data, and feature representations that support effective ROI classification and clustering play a fundamental role in volume exploration. Existing approaches typically rely on either explicit local feature representations or implicit convolutional feature representations learned from raw volumes. However, explicit local feature representations are limited in capturing broader geometric patterns and spatial correlations, while implicit convolutional feature representations do not necessarily ensure robust performance in practice, where user supervision is typically limited. Meanwhile, implicit neural representations (INRs) have recently shown strong promise in DVR for volume compression, owing to their ability to compactly parameterize continuous volumetric fields. In this work, we propose NeuVolEx, a neural volume exploration approach that extends the role of INRs beyond volume compression. Unlike prior compression methods that focus on INR outputs, NeuVolEx leverages feature representations learned during INR training as a robust basis for volume exploration. To better adapt these feature representations to exploration tasks, we augment a base INR with a structural encoder and a multi-task learning scheme that improve spatial coherence for ROI characterization. We validate NeuVolEx on two fundamental volume exploration tasks: image-based transfer function (TF) design and viewpoint recommendation. NeuVolEx enables accurate ROI classification under sparse user supervision for image-based TF design and supports unsupervised clustering to identify compact complementary viewpoints that reveal different ROI clusters. Experiments on diverse volume datasets with varying modalities and ROI complexities demonstrate NeuVolEx improves both effectiveness and usability over prior methods

AI.tldr: 提出NeuVolEx方法，利用隐式神经表示的特征进行体数据探索，支持图像传递函数设计和视点推荐任务。
AI.motivation: 现有体数据探索方法存在局限性：显式局部特征表示难以捕捉更广泛的几何模式和空间相关性，而隐式卷积特征表示在用户监督有限的实际应用中性能不稳定。隐式神经表示在体数据压缩中表现出色，但其特征表示在探索任务中的潜力尚未被充分挖掘。
AI.method: NeuVolEx扩展隐式神经表示在体数据探索中的应用，利用INR训练过程中学习的特征表示作为探索基础。通过添加结构编码器和多任务学习方案增强空间一致性，改进ROI表征能力。支持图像传递函数设计和视点推荐两个核心任务。
AI.result: 在多种模态和ROI复杂度的体数据集上验证，NeuVolEx在稀疏用户监督下实现准确的ROI分类，支持无监督聚类识别互补视点。相比现有方法，在有效性和可用性方面均有提升。
AI.conclusion: NeuVolEx成功将隐式神经表示从体数据压缩扩展到探索任务，利用INR特征表示提供鲁棒的探索基础，通过结构增强和多任务学习改进空间一致性，为体数据探索提供了新的有效方法。

authors: Rixta A. H. van Eijck van Heslinga
title: Development and evaluation of CADe systems in low-prevalence setting: The RARE25 challenge for early detection of Barrett's neoplasia
comment: The final author list is currently being finalized and will be updated in subsequent versions
summary: Computer-aided detection (CADe) of early neoplasia in Barrett's esophagus is a low-prevalence surveillance problem in which clinically relevant findings are rare. Although many CADe systems report strong performance on balanced or enriched datasets, their behavior under realistic prevalence remains insufficiently characterized. The RARE25 challenge addresses this gap by introducing a large-scale, prevalence-aware benchmark for neoplasia detection. It includes a public training set and a hidden test set reflecting real-world incidence. Methods were evaluated using operating-point-specific metrics emphasizing high sensitivity and accounting for prevalence. Eleven teams from seven countries submitted approaches using diverse architectures, pretraining, ensembling, and calibration strategies. While several methods achieved strong discriminative performance, positive predictive values remained low, highlighting the difficulty of low-prevalence detection and the risk of overestimating clinical utility when prevalence is ignored. All methods relied on fully supervised classification despite the dominance of normal findings, indicating a lack of prevalence-agnostic approaches such as anomaly detection or one-class learning. By releasing a public dataset and a reproducible evaluation framework, RARE25 aims to support the development of CADe systems robust to prevalence shift and suitable for clinical surveillance workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了RARE25挑战赛，旨在开发和评估用于巴雷特食管早期肿瘤检测的计算机辅助检测系统，特别关注低患病率环境下的性能评估。
AI.motivation: 巴雷特食管早期肿瘤的计算机辅助检测是一个低患病率监测问题，临床相关发现罕见。现有CADe系统在平衡或富集数据集上表现良好，但在真实患病率下的行为特征不足，存在高估临床效用的风险。
AI.method: RARE25挑战赛建立了一个大规模、考虑患病率的基准测试，包括公开训练集和反映真实世界发病率的隐藏测试集。评估使用强调高敏感度并考虑患病率的操作点特定指标，来自7个国家的11个团队提交了多种架构、预训练、集成和校准策略的方法。
AI.result: 虽然多种方法实现了强大的判别性能，但阳性预测值仍然较低，突显了低患病率检测的困难以及忽略患病率时高估临床效用的风险。所有方法都依赖完全监督分类，缺乏患病率无关的方法如异常检测或单类学习。
AI.conclusion: 通过发布公共数据集和可复现的评估框架，RARE25旨在支持开发对患病率变化具有鲁棒性且适合临床监测工作流程的CADe系统，强调在低患病率环境中评估真实临床效用的重要性。

title: Do Instance Priors Help Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation?
summary: Semantic segmentation requires dense pixel-level annotations, which are costly and time-consuming to acquire. To address this, we present SeSAM, a framework that uses a foundational segmentation model, i.e. Segment Anything Model (SAM), with weak labels, including coarse masks, scribbles, and points. SAM, originally designed for instance-based segmentation, cannot be directly used for semantic segmentation tasks. In this work, we identify specific challenges faced by SAM and determine appropriate components to adapt it for class-based segmentation using weak labels. Specifically, SeSAM decomposes class masks into connected components, samples point prompts along object skeletons, selects SAM masks using weak-label coverage, and iteratively refines labels using pseudo-labels, enabling SAM-generated masks to be effectively used for semantic segmentation. Integrated with a semi-supervised learning framework, SeSAM balances ground-truth labels, SAM-based pseudo-labels, and high-confidence pseudo-labels, significantly improving segmentation quality. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks and weak annotation types show that SeSAM consistently outperforms weakly supervised baselines while substantially reducing annotation cost relative to fine supervision.

AI.tldr: 提出SeSAM框架，利用Segment Anything Model（SAM）和弱标签（粗掩码、涂鸦、点标注）进行弱监督语义分割，减少标注成本。
AI.motivation: 语义分割需要密集的像素级标注，成本高且耗时。现有SAM模型专为实例分割设计，无法直接用于基于类别的语义分割任务，需要适配弱监督场景。
AI.method: SeSAM将类别掩码分解为连通组件，沿物体骨架采样点提示，使用弱标签覆盖选择SAM掩码，通过伪标签迭代优化。结合半监督学习框架，平衡真实标签、SAM伪标签和高置信度伪标签。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试和弱标注类型上的实验表明，SeSAM持续优于弱监督基线方法，同时相对于精细监督显著降低标注成本。
AI.conclusion: SeSAM框架成功将SAM适配于弱监督语义分割，通过有效利用弱标签和迭代优化策略，在保持高质量分割的同时大幅减少标注工作量。

title: Cost-optimal Sequential Testing via Doubly Robust Q-learning
summary: Clinical decision-making often involves selecting tests that are costly, invasive, or time-consuming, motivating individualized, sequential strategies for what to measure and when to stop ascertaining. We study the problem of learning cost-optimal sequential decision policies from retrospective data, where test availability depends on prior results, inducing informative missingness. Under a sequential missing-at-random mechanism, we develop a doubly robust Q-learning framework for estimating optimal policies. The method introduces path-specific inverse probability weights that account for heterogeneous test trajectories and satisfy a normalization property conditional on the observed history. By combining these weights with auxiliary contrast models, we construct orthogonal pseudo-outcomes that enable unbiased policy learning when either the acquisition model or the contrast model is correctly specified. We establish oracle inequalities for the stage-wise contrast estimators, along with convergence rates, regret bounds, and misclassification rates for the learned policy. Simulations demonstrate improved cost-adjusted performance over weighted and complete-case baselines, and an application to a prostate cancer cohort study illustrates how the method reduces testing cost without compromising predictive accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文研究从回顾性数据中学习成本最优的序贯决策策略，用于临床测试选择，其中测试可用性取决于先前结果，导致信息性缺失。
AI.motivation: 临床决策通常涉及选择昂贵、侵入性或耗时的测试，需要个体化的序贯策略来决定测量内容和停止时机，但测试可用性依赖于先前结果导致信息性缺失，需要开发能够处理这种缺失数据的策略学习方法。
AI.method: 在序贯缺失随机机制下，开发了双重稳健Q学习框架，引入路径特异性逆概率权重处理异质性测试轨迹，结合辅助对比模型构建正交伪结果，实现当获取模型或对比模型之一正确指定时的无偏策略学习。
AI.result: 建立了阶段对比估计器的oracle不等式、收敛速率、遗憾界和误分类率，模拟显示相比加权和完整案例基线方法具有改进的成本调整性能，在前列腺癌队列研究中证明能降低测试成本而不损害预测准确性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的双重稳健Q学习方法能有效处理临床测试中的信息性缺失问题，学习成本最优的序贯决策策略，在保证预测准确性的同时显著降低测试成本，为临床决策提供实用工具。

title: RADA: Region-Aware Dual-encoder Auxiliary learning for Barely-supervised Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Deep learning has greatly advanced medical image segmentation, but its success relies heavily on fully supervised learning, which requires dense annotations that are costly and time-consuming for 3D volumetric scans. Barely-supervised learning reduces annotation burden by using only a few labeled slices per volume. Existing methods typically propagate sparse annotations to unlabeled slices through geometric continuity to generate pseudo-labels, but this strategy lacks semantic understanding, often resulting in low-quality pseudo-labels. Furthermore, medical image segmentation is inherently a pixel-level visual understanding task, where accuracy fundamentally depends on the quality of local, fine-grained visual features. Inspired by this, we propose RADA, a novel Region-Aware Dual-encoder Auxiliary learning pipeline which introduces a dual-encoder framework pre-trained on Alpha-CLIP to extract fine-grained, region-specific visual features from the original images and limited annotations. The framework combines image-level fine-grained visual features with text-level semantic guidance, providing region-aware semantic supervision that bridges image-level semantics and pixel-level segmentation. Integrated into a triple-view training framework, RADA achieves SOTA performance under extremely sparse annotation settings on LA2018, KiTS19 and LiTS, demonstrating robust generalization across diverse datasets.

AI.tldr: 提出RADA方法用于医学图像分割，解决在仅有少量标注切片情况下的半监督学习问题，通过区域感知双编码器辅助学习提升分割性能。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割通常需要密集标注，但3D体积扫描的标注成本高昂且耗时。现有方法通过几何连续性传播稀疏标注生成伪标签，但缺乏语义理解，导致伪标签质量低。医学图像分割本质上是像素级视觉理解任务，精度依赖于局部细粒度视觉特征质量。
AI.method: 提出RADA区域感知双编码器辅助学习框架，使用基于Alpha-CLIP预训练的双编码器提取细粒度区域特定视觉特征。结合图像级细粒度视觉特征和文本级语义指导，提供区域感知语义监督，桥接图像级语义和像素级分割。集成到三视图训练框架中。
AI.result: 在LA2018、KiTS19和LiTS数据集上，在极稀疏标注设置下实现了最先进的性能，展示了在不同数据集上的强大泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: RADA通过区域感知双编码器辅助学习，有效解决了医学图像分割中标注稀疏的问题，结合细粒度视觉特征和语义指导，显著提升了分割性能，为医学图像分析提供了有效的解决方案。

title: Boxes2Pixels: Learning Defect Segmentation from Noisy SAM Masks
comment: Accepted for presentation at the AI4RWC Workshop at CVPR 2026
summary: Accurate defect segmentation is critical for industrial inspection, yet dense pixel-level annotations are rarely available. A common workaround is to convert inexpensive bounding boxes into pseudo-masks using foundation segmentation models such as the Segment Anything Model (SAM). However, these pseudo-labels are systematically noisy on industrial surfaces, often hallucinating background structure while missing sparse defects. To address this limitation, a noise-robust box-to-pixel distillation framework, Boxes2Pixels, is proposed that treats SAM as a noisy teacher rather than a source of ground-truth supervision. Bounding boxes are converted into pseudo-masks offline by SAM, and a compact student is trained with (i) a hierarchical decoder over frozen DINOv2 features for semantic stability, (ii) an auxiliary binary localization head to decouple sparse foreground discovery from class prediction, and (iii) a one-sided online self-correction mechanism that relaxes background supervision when the student is confident, targeting teacher false negatives. On a manually annotated wind turbine inspection benchmark, the proposed Boxes2Pixels improves anomaly mIoU by +6.97 and binary IoU by +9.71 over the strongest baseline trained under identical weak supervision. Moreover, online self-correction increases the binary recall by +18.56, while the model employs 80\% fewer trainable parameters. Code is available at https://github.com/CLendering/Boxes2Pixels.

AI.tldr: 提出Boxes2Pixels框架，从噪声SAM掩码中学习缺陷分割，解决工业缺陷检测中像素级标注稀缺的问题
AI.motivation: 工业缺陷检测需要精确的像素级分割，但密集标注成本高昂。常用方法使用SAM将边界框转换为伪掩码，但这些伪标签在工业表面上存在系统性噪声，经常错误包含背景结构而遗漏稀疏缺陷
AI.method: 提出噪声鲁棒的框到像素蒸馏框架，将SAM视为噪声教师而非真实监督源。方法包括：1）在冻结的DINOv2特征上使用分层解码器保持语义稳定性；2）辅助二元定位头解耦稀疏前景发现与类别预测；3）单边在线自校正机制，在学生模型置信时放松背景监督，针对教师假阴性
AI.result: 在手动标注的风力涡轮机检测基准上，Boxes2Pixels相比最强基线，异常mIoU提升+6.97，二元IoU提升+9.71。在线自校正使二元召回率提升+18.56，同时模型使用参数减少80%
AI.conclusion: Boxes2Pixels框架有效解决了从噪声SAM掩码学习缺陷分割的问题，显著提升了工业缺陷检测性能，同时减少了模型复杂度，为弱监督工业检测提供了有效解决方案

title: A Simulation-Based Method for Testing Collaborative Learning Scaffolds Using LLM-Based Multi-Agent Systems
comment: submitted to journal of computer aisstant learning
summary: Background: Traditional research on collaborative learning scaffolding is often time-consuming and resource-heavy, which hinders the rapid iteration and optimization of instructional strategies. LLM-based multi-agent systems have recently emerged as a powerful tool to simulate complex social interactions and provide a novel paradigm for educational research. Objectives: This study proposes an LLM-based multi-agent simulation approach to investigate collaborative learning processes and the effectiveness of instructional scaffolds prior to actual classroom deployment. The research specifically examines the feasibility of simulating group discussions and the alignment of these simulations with established learning science theories. Methods: The simulation system was implemented using the MetaGPT framework and GPT-4o, comprising one teacher agent and five distinct student roles (Leader, Supporter, Expounder, Rebutter, and Summarizer). Two scaffolding strategies, "Deep Think before Speak" and "Direct Speak", were compared across ten classical Chinese poetry appreciation tasks. Evaluation was conducted through discourse analysis of quality and behavior. Results and Conclusions: The introduction of the "Deep Think before Speak" scaffold significantly improved the agents' discourse diversity and interaction depth while notably reducing content repetitiveness. Behavioral analysis showed that the scaffold encouraged more complex interaction patterns, such as reflecting, rebutting, and explaining. These findings align with the ICAP framework, as the scaffold prompted agents to move from simple "Active" participation to "Constructive" and "Interactive" knowledge co-construction. This study demonstrates the feasibility and ecological validity of using LLM-based multi-agent systems to simulate authentic collaborative learning dynamics.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于LLM多智能体系统的模拟方法来测试协作学习支架，通过模拟小组讨论过程来评估教学策略的有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统协作学习支架研究耗时耗力，阻碍教学策略的快速迭代优化，需要更高效的研究方法来提前评估教学干预效果。
AI.method: 使用MetaGPT框架和GPT-4o构建多智能体系统，包含1个教师代理和5个学生角色，比较"深度思考后发言"和"直接发言"两种支架策略在10个古诗鉴赏任务中的表现。
AI.result: "深度思考后发言"支架显著提高了话语多样性和互动深度，减少了内容重复，促进了反思、反驳、解释等复杂互动模式，符合ICAP框架的建构性和交互性知识共建。
AI.conclusion: 基于LLM的多智能体系统能够有效模拟真实协作学习动态，具有可行性和生态效度，为教育研究提供了新的高效范式。

title: rPPG-VQA: A Video Quality Assessment Framework for Unsupervised rPPG Training
summary: Unsupervised remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) promises to leverage unlabeled video data, but its potential is hindered by a critical challenge: training on low-quality "in-the-wild" videos severely degrades model performance. An essential step missing here is to assess the suitability of the videos for rPPG model learning before using them for the task. Existing video quality assessment (VQA) methods are mainly designed for human perception and not directly applicable to the above purpose. In this work, we propose rPPG-VQA, a novel framework for assessing video suitability for rPPG. We integrate signal-level and scene-level analyses and design a dual-branch assessment architecture. The signal-level branch evaluates the physiological signal quality of the videos via robust signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) estimation with a multi-method consensus mechanism, and the scene-level branch uses a multimodal large language model (MLLM) to identify interferences like motion and unstable lighting. Furthermore, we propose a two-stage adaptive sampling (TAS) strategy that utilizes the quality score to curate optimal training datasets. Experiments show that by training on large-scale, "in-the-wild" videos filtered by our framework, we can develop unsupervised rPPG models that achieve a substantial improvement in accuracy on standard benchmarks. Our code is available at https://github.com/Tianyang-Dai/rPPG-VQA.

AI.tldr: 提出rPPG-VQA框架，用于评估视频是否适合远程光电容积描记术（rPPG）的无监督训练，通过质量评估筛选训练数据以提高模型性能。
AI.motivation: 无监督rPPG训练可以利用未标记视频数据，但现实世界中低质量视频会严重降低模型性能。现有视频质量评估方法主要针对人类感知设计，不适用于评估视频对rPPG学习的适用性。
AI.method: 提出双分支评估架构：信号级分支通过多方法共识机制评估视频生理信号质量；场景级分支使用多模态大语言模型识别运动和光照不稳定等干扰。还提出两阶段自适应采样策略，利用质量分数筛选最优训练数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明，通过使用该框架筛选的大规模"野外"视频进行训练，无监督rPPG模型在标准基准测试中取得了显著的精度提升。
AI.conclusion: rPPG-VQA框架能有效评估视频对rPPG训练的适用性，通过质量筛选显著提升无监督rPPG模型的性能，为利用未标记视频数据提供了有效解决方案。

title: Environmental Footprint of GenAI Research: Insights from the Moshi Foundation Model
summary: New multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) are continuously being trained and deployed, following rapid development cycles. This generative AI frenzy is driving steady increases in energy consumption, greenhouse gas emissions, and a plethora of other environmental impacts linked to datacenter construction and hardware manufacturing. Mitigating the environmental consequences of GenAI remains challenging due to an overall lack of transparency by the main actors in the field. Even when the environmental impacts of specific models are mentioned, they are typically restricted to the carbon footprint of the final training run, omitting the research and development stages. In this work, we explore the impact of GenAI research through a fine-grained analysis of the compute spent to create Moshi, a 7B-parameter speech-text foundation model for real-time dialogue developed by Kyutai, a leading privately funded open science AI lab. For the first time, our study dives into the anatomy of compute-intensive MLLM research, quantifying the GPU-time invested in specific model components and training phases, as well as early experimental stages, failed training runs, debugging, and ablation studies. Additionally, we assess the environmental impacts of creating Moshi from beginning to end using a life cycle assessment methodology: we quantify energy and water consumption, greenhouse gas emissions, and mineral resource depletion associated with the production and use of datacenter hardware. Our detailed analysis allows us to provide actionable guidelines to reduce compute usage and environmental impacts of MLLM research, paving the way for more sustainable AI research.

AI.tldr: 分析Moshi基础模型研发过程中的计算资源消耗和环境足迹，为生成式AI研究提供可持续性指导
AI.motivation: 生成式AI快速发展导致能源消耗和温室气体排放持续增加，但该领域缺乏透明度，现有研究通常只关注最终训练阶段的碳排放，忽略了研发全过程的综合环境影响
AI.method: 对Moshi 7B参数语音文本基础模型的研发过程进行细粒度分析，量化GPU时间在不同模型组件、训练阶段、早期实验、失败训练、调试和消融研究中的分配，并采用生命周期评估方法评估从硬件生产到使用的全过程环境影响
AI.result: 首次揭示了计算密集型MLLM研究的计算资源分布情况，量化了Moshi模型研发全过程的能源消耗、水资源消耗、温室气体排放和矿产资源耗竭等环境影响，识别了主要的环境热点
AI.conclusion: 通过详细分析提出了减少MLLM研究计算使用和环境影响的可行指南，为更可持续的AI研究铺平道路，强调了研发全过程透明度和综合环境影响评估的重要性

title: Hierarchical Textual Knowledge for Enhanced Image Clustering
summary: Image clustering aims to group images in an unsupervised fashion. Traditional methods focus on knowledge from visual space, making it difficult to distinguish between visually similar but semantically different classes. Recent advances in vision-language models enable the use of textual knowledge to enhance image clustering. However, most existing methods rely on coarse class labels or simple nouns, overlooking the rich conceptual and attribute-level semantics embedded in textual space. In this paper, we propose a knowledge-enhanced clustering (KEC) method that constructs a hierarchical concept-attribute structured knowledge with the help of large language models (LLMs) to guide clustering. Specifically, we first condense redundant textual labels into abstract concepts and then automatically extract discriminative attributes for each single concept and similar concept pairs, via structured prompts to LLMs. This knowledge is instantiated for each input image to achieve the knowledge-enhanced features. The knowledge-enhanced features with original visual features are adapted to various downstream clustering algorithms. We evaluate KEC on 20 diverse datasets, showing consistent improvements across existing methods using additional textual knowledge. KEC without training outperforms zero-shot CLIP on 14 out of 20 datasets. Furthermore, the naive use of textual knowledge may harm clustering performance, while KEC provides both accuracy and robustness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种知识增强的图像聚类方法，通过构建层次化的概念-属性结构化知识来提升图像聚类性能。
AI.motivation: 传统图像聚类方法主要依赖视觉空间知识，难以区分视觉相似但语义不同的类别。现有方法通常使用粗糙的类别标签或简单名词，忽略了文本空间中丰富的概念和属性级语义信息。
AI.method: 提出知识增强聚类方法，利用大语言模型构建层次化的概念-属性结构化知识：首先将冗余文本标签浓缩为抽象概念，然后通过结构化提示自动提取单个概念和相似概念对的判别性属性，最后将这些知识实例化到每个输入图像中生成知识增强特征，与原始视觉特征结合应用于下游聚类算法。
AI.result: 在20个多样化数据集上评估，相比现有使用额外文本知识的方法均获得一致改进。无需训练的KEC在20个数据集中的14个上优于零样本CLIP。实验表明简单使用文本知识可能损害聚类性能，而KEC同时提供了准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过构建层次化的概念-属性结构化知识，能够有效利用文本空间中的丰富语义信息来增强图像聚类，在多个数据集上取得了显著性能提升，证明了结构化知识引导的重要性。

title: Naka-GS: A Bionics-inspired Dual-Branch Naka Correction and Progressive Point Pruning for Low-Light 3DGS
summary: Low-light conditions severely hinder 3D restoration and reconstruction by degrading image visibility, introducing color distortions, and contaminating geometric priors for downstream optimization. We present NAKA-GS, a bionics-inspired framework for low-light 3D Gaussian Splatting that jointly improves photometric restoration and geometric initialization. Our method starts with a Naka-guided chroma-correction network, which combines physics-prior low-light enhancement, dual-branch input modeling, frequency-decoupled correction, and mask-guided optimization to suppress bright-region chromatic artifacts and edge-structure errors. The enhanced images are then fed into a feed-forward multi-view reconstruction model to produce dense scene priors. To further improve Gaussian initialization, we introduce a lightweight Point Preprocessing Module (PPM) that performs coordinate alignment, voxel pooling, and distance-adaptive progressive pruning to remove noisy and redundant points while preserving representative structures. Without introducing heavy inference overhead, NAKA-GS improves restoration quality, training stability, and optimization efficiency for low-light 3D reconstruction. The proposed method was presented in the NTIRE 3D Restoration and Reconstruction (3DRR) Challenge, and outperformed the baseline methods by a large margin. The code is available at https://github.com/RunyuZhu/Naka-GS

AI.tldr: 提出Naka-GS框架，用于低光照条件下的3D高斯溅射重建，通过仿生学启发的双分支Naka校正和渐进点剪枝技术，联合改进光度恢复和几何初始化。
AI.motivation: 低光照条件严重阻碍3D恢复与重建，导致图像可见度降低、颜色失真，并为下游优化引入几何先验污染。现有方法在低光照下的3D高斯溅射重建效果不佳。
AI.method: 采用Naka引导的色度校正网络，结合物理先验低光照增强、双分支输入建模、频率解耦校正和掩码引导优化；引入轻量级点预处理模块，进行坐标对齐、体素池化和距离自适应渐进剪枝。
AI.result: 在NTIRE 3D恢复与重建挑战赛中大幅超越基线方法，显著提升恢复质量、训练稳定性和优化效率，且不引入沉重的推理开销。
AI.conclusion: Naka-GS框架有效解决了低光照3D高斯溅射重建问题，通过仿生学启发的校正和剪枝技术实现了高质量、高效率的3D恢复与重建。

title: Sparse Hypergraph-Enhanced Frame-Event Object Detection with Fine-Grained MoE
summary: Integrating frame-based RGB cameras with event streams offers a promising solution for robust object detection under challenging dynamic conditions. However, the inherent heterogeneity and data redundancy of these modalities often lead to prohibitive computational overhead or suboptimal feature fusion. In this paper, we propose Hyper-FEOD, a high-performance and efficient detection framework, which synergistically optimizes multi-modal interaction through two core components. First, we introduce Sparse Hypergraph-enhanced Cross-Modal Fusion (S-HCF), which leverages the inherent sparsity of event streams to construct an event-guided activity map. By performing high-order hypergraph modeling exclusively on selected motion-critical sparse tokens, S-HCF captures complex non-local dependencies between RGB and event data while overcoming the traditional complexity bottlenecks of hypergraph computation. Second, we design a Fine-Grained Mixture of Experts (FG-MoE) Enhancement module to address the diverse semantic requirements of different image regions. This module employs specialized hypergraph experts tailored for object boundaries, internal textures, and backgrounds, utilizing a pixel-level spatial gating mechanism to adaptively route and enhance features. Combined with a load-balancing loss and zero-initialization strategy, FG-MoE ensures stable training and precise feature refinement without disrupting the pre-trained backbone's distribution. Experimental results on mainstream RGB-Event benchmarks demonstrate that Hyper-FEOD achieves a superior accuracy-efficiency trade-off, outperforming state-of-the-art methods while maintaining a lightweight footprint suitable for real-time edge deployment.

AI.tldr: 提出Hyper-FEOD框架，用于融合RGB帧和事件流进行鲁棒物体检测，解决动态挑战条件下的检测问题
AI.motivation: RGB相机与事件流融合在动态条件下具有潜力，但模态异质性和数据冗余导致计算开销大或特征融合不理想，需要高效的多模态交互优化方案
AI.method: 提出两个核心组件：1) 稀疏超图增强跨模态融合(S-HCF)，利用事件流稀疏性构建事件引导活动图，对运动关键稀疏令牌进行高阶超图建模；2) 细粒度专家混合增强模块(FG-MoE)，针对不同图像区域语义需求，使用专门超图专家处理边界、纹理和背景，结合像素级空间门控机制
AI.result: 在主流RGB-Event基准测试中，Hyper-FEOD实现了优越的精度-效率权衡，优于最先进方法，同时保持轻量级适合实时边缘部署
AI.conclusion: Hyper-FEOD通过稀疏超图建模和细粒度专家混合有效解决了多模态融合的计算瓶颈，为动态条件下的鲁棒物体检测提供了高效解决方案

title: ViserDex: Visual Sim-to-Real for Robust Dexterous In-hand Reorientation
summary: In-hand object reorientation requires precise estimation of the object pose to handle complex task dynamics. While RGB sensing offers rich semantic cues for pose tracking, existing solutions rely on multi-camera setups or costly ray tracing. We present a sim-to-real framework for monocular RGB in-hand reorientation that integrates 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) to bridge the visual sim-to-real gap. Our key insight is performing domain randomization in the Gaussian representation space: by applying physically consistent, pre-rendering augmentations to 3D Gaussians, we generate photorealistic, randomized visual data for object pose estimation. The manipulation policy is trained using curriculum-based reinforcement learning with teacher-student distillation, enabling efficient learning of complex behaviors. Importantly, both perception and control models can be trained independently on consumer-grade hardware, eliminating the need for large compute clusters. Experiments show that the pose estimator trained with 3DGS data outperforms those trained using conventional rendering data in challenging visual environments. We validate the system on a physical multi-fingered hand equipped with an RGB camera, demonstrating robust reorientation of five diverse objects even under challenging lighting conditions. Our results highlight Gaussian splatting as a practical path for RGB-only dexterous manipulation. For videos of the hardware deployments and additional supplementary materials, please refer to the project website: https://rffr.leggedrobotics.com/works/viserdex/

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于单目RGB视觉的灵巧手内物体重定向的仿真到现实框架，使用3D高斯泼溅技术来弥合视觉仿真与现实之间的差距。
AI.motivation: 现有手内物体重定向解决方案依赖多摄像头设置或昂贵的射线追踪，需要精确的物体姿态估计来处理复杂的任务动态。RGB传感虽然提供丰富的语义线索，但在实际应用中面临视觉仿真到现实的差距挑战。
AI.method: 在3D高斯表示空间进行域随机化：通过对3D高斯应用物理一致、预渲染增强，生成用于物体姿态估计的逼真随机视觉数据。使用基于课程的强化学习与师生蒸馏训练操作策略，感知和控制模型可在消费级硬件上独立训练。
AI.result: 使用3DGS数据训练的位姿估计器在挑战性视觉环境中优于传统渲染数据训练的模型。在配备RGB摄像头的物理多指手上验证了系统，能够在挑战性光照条件下稳健地重定向五个不同物体。
AI.conclusion: 高斯泼溅技术为仅使用RGB的灵巧操作提供了实用路径，展示了在消费级硬件上训练感知和控制模型的可行性，为单目视觉灵巧操作开辟了新方向。

title: From Answers to Arguments: Toward Trustworthy Clinical Diagnostic Reasoning with Toulmin-Guided Curriculum Goal-Conditioned Learning
summary: The integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) into clinical decision support is critically obstructed by their opaque and often unreliable reasoning. In the high-stakes domain of healthcare, correct answers alone are insufficient; clinical practice demands full transparency to ensure patient safety and enable professional accountability. A pervasive and dangerous weakness of current LLMs is their tendency to produce "correct answers through flawed reasoning." This issue is far more than a minor academic flaw; such process errors signal a fundamental lack of robust understanding, making the model prone to broader hallucinations and unpredictable failures when faced with real-world clinical complexity. In this paper, we establish a framework for trustworthy clinical argumentation by adapting the Toulmin model to the diagnostic process. We propose a novel training pipeline: Curriculum Goal-Conditioned Learning (CGCL), designed to progressively train LLM to generate diagnostic arguments that explicitly follow this Toulmin structure. CGCL's progressive three-stage curriculum systematically builds a solid clinical argument: (1) extracting facts and generating differential diagnoses; (2) justifying a core hypothesis while rebutting alternatives; and (3) synthesizing the analysis into a final, qualified conclusion. We validate CGCL using T-Eval, a quantitative framework measuring the integrity of the diagnosis reasoning. Experiments show that our method achieves diagnostic accuracy and reasoning quality comparable to resource-intensive Reinforcement Learning (RL) methods, while offering a more stable and efficient training pipeline.

AI.tldr: 该论文的主要任务是开发一个可信赖的临床诊断推理框架，通过将Toulmin论证模型应用于诊断过程，并采用课程目标条件学习方法来训练大型语言模型生成结构化的诊断论证。
AI.motivation: 当前大型语言模型在临床决策支持中存在推理不透明和不可靠的问题，特别是在高风险医疗领域，仅凭正确答案是不够的。模型经常产生"通过错误推理得出正确答案"的现象，这反映了缺乏稳健理解，容易在面对真实临床复杂性时产生幻觉和不可预测的失败。
AI.method: 提出课程目标条件学习（CGCL）训练管道，采用渐进式三阶段课程：1）提取事实并生成鉴别诊断；2）为核心假设提供正当理由并反驳替代方案；3）将分析综合成最终的合格结论。该方法基于Toulmin模型构建结构化临床论证。
AI.result: 实验使用T-Eval定量框架评估诊断推理完整性，结果显示该方法在诊断准确性和推理质量方面与资源密集的强化学习方法相当，同时提供了更稳定和高效的训练管道。
AI.conclusion: 该研究建立了一个可信赖的临床论证框架，通过结构化论证训练提高了大型语言模型在临床诊断中的透明度和可靠性，为医疗AI系统提供了更安全、可解释的决策支持。

title: BoxTuning: Directly Injecting the Object Box for Multimodal Model Fine-Tuning
summary: Object-level spatial-temporal understanding is essential for video question answering, yet existing multimodal large language models (MLLMs) encode frames holistically and lack explicit mechanisms for fine-grained object grounding. Recent work addresses this by serializing bounding box coordinates as text tokens, but this text-coordinate paradigm suffers from a fundamental modality mismatch: object information is inherently visual, yet encoding it as text incurs a high token cost that forces aggressive temporal downsampling. We propose BoxTuning, which resolves this mismatch by injecting object spatial-temporal information directly into the visual modality. Colored bounding boxes and trajectory trails are rendered onto video frames as visual prompts, with only a concise color-to-object legend retained as text. This reduces the token cost significantly, achieving 87-93% text token reduction in practice. It also preserves full temporal resolution, where the trajectory trails further encode inter-frame motion direction and speed within each keyframe, recovering fine-grained dynamics that text-coordinate methods are forced to discard. Experimental results on five video QA benchmarks (CLEVRER, Perception Test, STAR, NExT-QA, IntentQA) show that BoxTuning surpasses text-coordinate baselines on spatially oriented tasks and nearly eliminates the accuracy degradation observed on reasoning-centric tasks, establishing visual prompting as a more natural and efficient paradigm for conveying object information to video MLLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出BoxTuning方法，通过直接在视频帧上渲染彩色边界框和轨迹轨迹来注入对象时空信息，用于多模态大语言模型的视频问答任务微调。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLMs将帧整体编码，缺乏细粒度对象定位机制。文本坐标范式存在模态不匹配问题：对象信息本质上是视觉的，但编码为文本会产生高令牌成本，迫使进行激进的时间下采样。
AI.method: BoxTuning将对象时空信息直接注入视觉模态，在视频帧上渲染彩色边界框和轨迹轨迹作为视觉提示，仅保留简洁的颜色到对象图例作为文本，显著减少令牌成本并保持完整时间分辨率。
AI.result: 在五个视频QA基准测试（CLEVRER、Perception Test、STAR、NExT-QA、IntentQA）上，BoxTuning在空间导向任务上超越文本坐标基线，在推理中心任务上几乎消除了准确度下降。
AI.conclusion: 视觉提示是向视频MLLMs传达对象信息的更自然和高效范式，BoxTuning通过直接视觉注入解决了模态不匹配问题，实现了显著性能提升。

title: AIM: Intent-Aware Unified world action Modeling with Spatial Value Maps
